title: COD10K-C: Benchmarking Robustness of Camouflaged Object Detection Under Natural Image Corruptions
summary: Camouflaged object detection has improved substantially, but most standard benchmarks evaluate models only on clean images. This is not realistic because real cameras often capture blur, sensor noise, weather effects, and compression artifacts. We present COD10K-C, a corruption robustness benchmark based on COD10K. It includes 8 corruption types and 5 severity levels, giving 40 conditions and 81,040 evaluation pairs in total. We evaluate three popular camouflaged object detection models, SINet-v2, PFNet, and ZoomNet, as well as a lightweight model called RobustCODLite. All models show clear performance drops on corrupted images. Motion blur and Gaussian blur cause the largest drops, with SINet-v2 losing 18.5 Dice points under motion blur. Brightness and fog are less harmful. RobustCODLite uses corruption augmentation, a frequency-prior branch, and an uncertainty-consistency loss. It retains 92.3% of its clean Dice score under corruption, compared with 87.7% for SINet-v2, 84.8% for ZoomNet, and 84.1% for PFNet. On the hardest corruptions, RobustCODLite matches or outperforms models that perform better on clean data. We will release the COD10K-C GitHub repository to support future research in robust camouflaged object detection.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了COD10K-C，一个针对伪装目标检测的图像腐蚀鲁棒性基准数据集，包含8种腐蚀类型和5个严重等级，并评估了多种模型的抗腐蚀能力。提出的RobustCODLite在腐蚀条件下能够保持92.3%的清洁Dice分数，显著优于现有模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的伪装目标检测基准仅使用干净图像进行评估，与实际应用场景不符。真实环境中相机常会遇到运动模糊、高斯模糊、亮度变化、雾效、噪声和压缩伪影等腐蚀问题，这导致模型在实际部署时性能显著下降。
AI.method: 构建了COD10K-C基准数据集，包含8种腐蚀类型（运动模糊、高斯模糊、亮度、雾效、噪声、压缩等）和5个严重等级，共40种条件组合和81,040个评估样本。评估了SINet-v2、PFNet、ZoomNet和RobultCODLite四种模型，其中RobustCODLite采用了三种关键技术：腐蚀增强训练、频率先验分支和不确定性一致性损失。
AI.result: 所有模型在腐蚀图像上都出现明显性能下降。运动模糊和高斯模糊造成的性能下降最为严重，SINet-v2在运动模糊下损失18.5个Dice分数。RobustCODLite在腐蚀条件下保持92.3%的清洁Dice分数，优于SINet-v2的87.7%、ZoomNet的84.8%和PFNet的84.1%。在最严重的腐蚀条件下，RobustCODLite可匹敌或超越在干净数据上表现更好的模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了伪装目标检测鲁棒性评估的空白，证明通过引入专门的防御机制可以有效提升模型对抗图像腐蚀的鲁棒性。RobustCODLite在复杂真实场景中具有更强的实用性价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about camouflaged object detection in computer vision, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on video-to-3D motion generation in computer graphics. The application domains are entirely different: object detection vs. cross-modal video-to-motion conversion. Although both involve image processing, they address fundamentally different problems with no meaningful connection to the pain points of cross-modal alignment, temporal consistency, quality control, or semantic alignment specified in the research profile.

title: AVTrack: Audio-Visual Tracking in Human-centric Complex Scenes
summary: Audio-visual speaker tracking aims to localize and track active speakers by leveraging auditory and visual cues, enabling fine-grained, human-centric scene understanding. This capability is essential for real-world applications such as intelligent video editing, surveillance, and human-computer interaction. However, existing datasets are largely limited to simple or homogeneous audio-visual scenes with coarse annotations. Such oversimplified settings bias evaluation toward static audio-visual co-occurrence, rather than rigorously assessing robust spatiotemporal modeling and cross-modal reasoning in complex, dynamic scenes. To address these limitations, we introduce AVTrack, a human-centric audio-visual instance segmentation (AVIS) dataset designed for dynamic real-world scenarios. AVTrack features diverse and challenging conditions, including camera motion, visual occlusions, and position changes. Evaluations of representative AVIS methods on AVTrack reveal substantial performance degradation, establishing AVTrack as a challenging benchmark for robust human-centric audio-visual scene understanding in complex environments. We further provide a simple yet effective baseline to facilitate future research. Project website: https://FudanCVL.github.io/AVTrack/

AI.tldr: AVTrack是一个新提出的人类中心视听实例分割(AVIS)数据集，用于动态真实场景中的说话人跟踪任务。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集局限于简单或同质化的视听场景和粗粒度注释，评估偏向于静态视听共现，无法有效评估复杂动态场景中的时空建模和跨模态推理能力。
AI.method: 构建了AVTrack数据集，包含多样化和挑战性条件如相机运动、视觉遮挡和位置变化，并提供了简单的基线方法。
AI.result: 在AVTrack上评估代表性AVIS方法显示现有方法存在显著的性能下降，AVTrack成为具有挑战性的基准。
AI.conclusion: AVTrack为复杂环境下鲁棒的人类中心视听场景理解提供了具有挑战性的 benchmark 和新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Audio-Visual Speaker Tracking and Instance Segmentation (AVIS), which is a different application domain than Video-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. While both deal with video content, the core task is completely different: the paper focuses on detecting and tracking speakers in complex scenes, not on converting 2D video to 3D skeletal motion. The methods used (audio-visual tracking) do not align with the required methods (video generation models, VLM for quality assessment, 3D motion generation). None of the four pain points (cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency, quality control, text-to-motion semantic alignment) are addressed by this work.

title: Consistent Yet Wrong: Evidence Insensitivity in Spatial Vision-Language Models

AI.tldr: ViewDiag评估协议发现前沿VLMs在多视角度量距离查询中产生稳定但错误的预测，一致性并不等于几何理解，而是先验驱动的崩溃。
AI.motivation: 空间推理对机器人和具身AI至关重要，但现代VLM在度量距离查询上不可靠。研究假设跨视角一致性反映几何基础，这一假设此前未经检验。
AI.method: 构建ViewDiag多视角评估协议，使用Hypersim、ScanNet和KITTI360数据集，包含176个对象轨跨80个场景，每轨2-10视角，从三轴评估：度量准确性、分布集中度、潜在特征探测（区分决策崩溃与表示崩溃）。
AI.result: 跨多样性模型观察到高预测稳定性与重大错误共存的模式，处于强一致性但低准确性的状态。
AI.conclusion: 挑战了跨视角一致性作为几何理解代理的常见做法，表明稳定预测可能反映先验驱动崩溃而非证据敏感推理。ViewDiag提供受控基准和诊断框架。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper evaluates VLMs on spatial reasoning and metric distance estimation tasks (AI evaluation), NOT computer graphics or video-to-3D motion generation. While both involve VLMs, the research profile requires VLMs for quality assessment in video-to-motion conversion within Computer Graphics, whereas this paper focuses on VLM spatial reasoning capabilities for robotics/embodied AI. The paper does not address any of the four pain points: cross-modal alignment for motion synthesis, temporal consistency in video-to-motion, quality control guidance features, or text-motion semantic alignment.

title: Plan2Map: A Multimodal Benchmark for Document-Grounded Geospatial Boundary Reconstruction from Planning Records
comment: Project page: https://odeb1.github.io/Plan2Map_Project_Page/. Fabian Degen and Oishi Deb Contributed Equally
summary: Planning records define restrictions over geographic areas, but their source documents often provide only indirect spatial evidence rather than machine-readable boundaries. We introduce Plan2Map, a 208-case multimodal benchmark for document-grounded geospatial boundary reconstruction from UK planning records. Given only a source planning document, systems must reconstruct a valid geospatial boundary from notice text, schedules, map plates, map labels, and boundary annotations; the reference GeoJSON is held out for scoring. We propose GeoPlanAgent, a document-grounded, geospatial-tool-in-the-loop system that decomposes the task into evidence extraction, localisation, map registration, boundary segmentation, projection, and verification. On Plan2Map, GeoPlanAgent achieves 0.736 mean IoU and 0.904 median IoU, with 67.8\% of predictions at or above 0.8 IoU, substantially outperforming direct VLM-to-GeoJSON baselines. Diagnostic analysis shows that direct VLM prediction remains unreliable, while remaining errors are concentrated in localisation and map registration, and supervised boundary segmentation substantially improves pixel-level mask quality. Plan2Map provides a concrete testbed for multimodal geospatial reconstruction from public planning records. Project page: https://odeb1.github.io/Plan2Map_Project_Page/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Plan2Map，一个包含208个案例的多模态基准数据集，用于从英国规划文件中重建地理空间边界，并设计了GeoPlanAgent系统通过证据提取、定位、地图配准、边界分割、投影和验证六个步骤完成该任务。
AI.motivation: 规划记录定义了地理区域限制，但其源文档通常只提供间接的空间证据而非机器可读的边界，因此需要一种方法从规划文档中自动重建有效的地理空间边界。
AI.method: GeoPlanAgent是一个文档接地、多模态地理空间工具集成的系统，将任务分解为六个子任务：证据提取、定位、地图配准、边界分割、投影和验证。
AI.result: 在Plan2Map上，GeoPlanAgent达到了0.736的平均IoU和0.904的中位数IoU，67.8%的预测达到或超过0.8 IoU，显著优于直接的VLM-to-GeoJSON基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 直接VLM预测仍不可靠，剩余错误主要集中在定位和地图配准阶段；监督边界分割显著改善了像素级掩膜质量；Plan2Map为公共规划文件的多模态地理空间重建提供了具体的测试平台。

relevance_reason: This paper is about geospatial boundary reconstruction from planning documents (GIS/domain), which has no connection to the Computer Graphics field of video-to-3D motion generation. The pain points are completely unrelated: one focuses on converting 2D video to 3D motion with temporal consistency and semantic alignment, while the other deals with extracting geographic boundaries from text documents. Even though both use multimodal approaches, the application domains are entirely different - computer graphics vs. geographic information systems. This paper would not help someone working on video-to-motion conversion or 3D motion generation.

title: The Epi-LLM Framework: probing LLM behavioral priors through epidemiological agent-based models
comment: Submitted to American Journal of Epidemiology
summary: Human behaviour during epidemics affects infectious disease dynamics, but quantifying this remains deeply challenging. Here we introduce the Epi-LLM framework: a novel integration of agent-based modelling, real-life epigames, and large language models (LLMs) in which a synthetic society of agents reasons and adapts dynamically over an outbreak contact network. Comparing synthetic agent behaviour against a no-intervention SEIR baseline and human participant data from the AUIB epigame study, we find that LLM agents across four different architectures reduced peak active infections, with quarantine compliance peaking at 58-65% on day six of the 15-day simulation. A binomial generalised linear model showed that perceived health severity was the strongest predictor of quarantine behaviour ($β= 0.33, p = 0.002$), yielding a pseudo-$R^2$ of 0.055, comparable to the 0.072 observed in the human trial. LLM architecture is a key determinant of epidemic dynamics: low-variance architectures offer greater internal validity for testing behavioural rules, while high-variance models may better represent real-world decision-making. Geographic labels alone do not induce culturally differentiated behaviour; explicit attitudinal parameterisation is required. This proof-of-principle work lays the groundwork for deploying the Epi-LLM framework as a scalable, risk-free simulation environment for pandemic preparedness research.

AI.tldr: Epi-LLM框架将基于智能体的建模、大型语言模型与真实流行病情境结合，构建合成社会来模拟疫情中的人类行为决策，并验证其与人类参与者行为的一致性。
AI.motivation: 流行病期间的人类行为影响疾病动态，但量化这一影响仍具挑战性，需要可扩展、低风险的模拟环境用于疫情 Preparedness研究。
AI.method: 整合ABM、真实epigame与LLM，在15天暴发接触网络上让合成智能体动态推理适应；对比无干预SEIR基线与人类AUIB数据，使用二项GLM分析行为预测因子。
AI.result: 四个LLM架构均降低峰值感染，隔离合规率在第6天达58-65%；感知健康严重度是最强预测因子(β=0.33, p=0.002)，pseudo-R²=0.055vs人类0.072；架构方差影响 epidemic dynamics。
AI.conclusion: Epi-LLLM作为疫情Prepareness模拟环境可行，LLM架构是关键差异因素，需显式态度参数化而非仅地理标签才能诱导文化差异化行为。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about epidemiological simulation using agent-based models and LLMs to study human behavior during disease outbreaks. The application domain is epidemiology/public health, which has NO overlap with Computer Graphics. Even though it uses LLMs, the use case is behavioral simulation for pandemic preparedness, not video-to-motion generation, cross-modal alignment, or any computer graphics task. This is entirely different field and application.

title: Visual Graph Scaffolds for Structural Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Graphs have been used to enhance large language models (LLMs) for structured reasoning, mostly as external knowledge sources are provided to models at test time. In this paper, we take a different view: the value of graphs for LLMs lie not only in supplying information, but also in organizing reasoning. Inspired by how humans use graph-structured mind maps to organize branching and converging thoughts, we ask whether graphs can serve as an internal form of reasoning assistance. We study this question on multi-hop question answering tasks, where teacher-provided reasoning traces are rewritten as graph mind maps and used to guide a student model. Our experiments reveal a clear modality gap. When graph structures are flattened into text, their benefits become limited once direct answer hints are removed. Under this abstract guidance setting, both reasoning efficiency and answer quality degrade substantially. In contrast, visual graph guidance remains effective without direct answer clues, and its advantage persists after supervised fine-tuning and KL-based distillation. The above findings support the claim that graphs should be studied not only as external knowledge structures for LLMs, but also as visual scaffolds for organizing reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究图结构能否作为大语言模型（LLM）的内部推理辅助工具，而非仅仅作为外部知识来源。研究者在多跳问答任务中，将教师提供的推理轨迹重写为图示思维导图来指导学生模型。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要将图作为外部知识源提供给模型，但作者提出图的价值不仅在于提供信息，还在于组织推理。借鉴人类使用图结构思维导图组织分支和汇聚思维的方式，探索图是否能作为内部推理辅助工具。
AI.method: 在多跳问答任务中，将教师提供的推理轨迹重写为图示思维导图，并用于指导学生模型。通过比较文本形式的图结构与视觉图指导的效果进行实验。
AI.result: 存在明显的模态差异：当图结构被展平为文本时，去除直接答案提示后，其益处变得有限。在抽象指导设置下，推理效率和答案质量都大幅下降。相比之下，视觉图指导无需直接答案线索仍能保持有效，且该优势在监督微调和KL散度蒸馏后仍然保持。
AI.conclusion: 图不仅应作为LLM的外部知识结构研究，还应作为组织推理的视觉脚手架来研究。这一发现拓展了图在LLM中的应用视角，强调了其作为推理组织的潜在价值。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about using graph structures as reasoning aids in Large Language Models for multi-hop QA tasks in NLP/AI, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically video-to-motion generation (converting 2D video to 3D human motion). Despite both having "visual" elements, this paper deals with visual reasoning in NLP, not computer graphics or cross-modal generation between video and motion. No alignment with any pain points or methods outlined in the research profile.

title: MetaWorld: Scaling Multi-Agent Video World Model from Single-view Video Data
summary: Video world models are a foundational generative technology for embodied AI and the Metaverse, yet existing approaches are inherently limited to a single agent observing from a single perspective. Extending these models to multi-agent settings introduces two critical challenges: data scarcity (coordinated multi-view recordings are prohibitively expensive to collect for general open-domain scenarios) and world state alignment (independently generated video streams cannot ensure that shared physical environments and events evolve consistently across views). To address these challenges, we propose MetaWorld, a novel framework that scales multi-agent video world models to open-domain environments directly from single-view videos. First, we introduce Monocular World-State Unrolling (MWSU) to explicitly decompose monocular footage into the camera operator's ego-motion and the visible subject's spatial trajectory. This camera-trajectory decomposition naturally extracts synchronized multi-agent motion data within a shared 3D space, completely bypassing the need for multi-camera setups. Second, for precise visual control, we develop the Subject-Aware World Generator to enable appearance-driven simulation conditioned on per-agent identity images. Finally, to ensure both views are grounded in the identical physical reality, we propose World-State Alignment, a per-frame inter-branch cross-attention mechanism inserted at every transformer layer of the video DiT. By jointly synchronizing the denoising process, WSA enforces both static geometric consistency and dynamic motion consistency, encouraging that the shared 3D environment and physical events remain well-aligned across both egocentric views. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MetaWorld achieves superior cross-view consistency and identity fidelity, establishing a highly scalable, physics-driven paradigm for multi-agent video world modeling.

AI.tldr: MetaWorld是一个新型框架，用于将单智能体视频世界模型扩展到多智能体开放领域环境，直接从单视角视频进行扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型方法仅支持单一智能体的单一视角，多智能体设置面临两个关键挑战：数据稀缺（协调的多视角录制成本高昂）和世界状态对齐（独立生成的视频流无法确保共享物理环境和事件在不同视角间一致演化）。
AI.method: 提出三个核心技术：1) 单目世界状态展开(MWSU)将单目 footage分解为相机操作者的自我运动和可见对象的时空轨迹；2) 开发了主体感知世界生成器，基于每个智能体的身份图像进行外观驱动模拟；3) 提出世界状态对齐(WSA)，一种每帧跨分支交叉注意力机制，插入到视频DiT的每个transformer层中。
AI.result: 通过相机-轨迹分解自然提取共享3D空间内的多智能体同步运动数据；WSA联合同步去噪过程，强制实现静态几何一致性和动态运动一致性，确保共享3D环境和物理事件在两个自我视角间保持对齐。
AI.conclusion: MetaWorld实现了卓越的跨视角一致性和身份保真度，为多智能体视频世界建模建立了高度可扩展的物理驱动范式。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video world models for multi-agent multi-view video generation consistency, which is a different application domain than the research profile's focus on 2D video-to-3D motion conversion. While both use video generation methods (Video DiT, transformer-based approaches), the goal is fundamentally different: MetaWorld focuses on expanding single-view video to consistent multi-view video generation, not on extracting 3D motion from 2D video. The temporal/spatial consistency mechanisms (WSA) are for aligning multiple video streams, not for cross-modal video-to-motion alignment. Uses similar high-level methods but wrong application domain.

title: Capability Advertisement as a Market for Lemons: A Trust Layer for Heterogeneous Agent Networks
summary:
Large language model (LLM) agents have begun to delegate work to one another. Protocols such as the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and the Agent2Agent protocol (A2A) let an agent publish what it can do and let others call it, and public registries of such agents are already appearing. These protocols assume an advertised capability is a static, truthful fact. A real agent is none of these things: its competence is probabilistic, varies with input, drifts when the underlying model is updated, and, because the agent is itself a language model, it can describe itself with complete confidence and be wrong. A caller therefore sees what an agent claims to do, not what it can do, with no principled way to tell a reliable provider from a fluent impostor.
  We argue these difficulties share one cause: the market for lemons. When quality is hidden and claims are cheap, good and bad providers become indistinguishable, honest reliability goes unrewarded, and the market decays toward its worst participants. Economics offers three remedies, signaling, screening, and reputation, and none are present in today's agent protocols.
  We make four contributions: (1) a failure taxonomy that names confident-wrong as a non-adversarial, correlated subclass of Byzantine faults that classical fault-tolerance mismodels; (2) a market-for-lemons model showing that faith-based protocols admit only a low-trust equilibrium; (3) the Trust Layer, a thin, protocol-agnostic narrow waist above MCP and A2A that adds probabilistic capability descriptors, screening, and reputation, and admits a separating equilibrium when the cost of sustaining an overclaim exceeds the gain from it; and (4) a reliability-composition bound for delegation chains with an end-to-end placement argument. The design needs no model retraining and degrades gracefully when its trust anchors are absent or corrupt.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型Agent之间相互委托工作时面临的信任问题。现有协议(MCP、A2A)假设能力声明是静态的真实信息，但实际Agent的能力是概率性的、会随输入变化、模型更新而漂移，且可能自信地描述自己但实际上做不到。论文将这种"市场柠檬"问题建模，并提出Trust Layer解决方案。
AI.motivation: 当前Agent协议假设广告能力是静态的、真实的，但真实Agent的能力是概率性的、会因底层模型更新而变化，且可以完全自信地描述自己做不了的事。调用者只能看到声称的能力，无法区分可靠提供者与虚假夸大者。这导致市场陷入低信任均衡，好坏Provider无法区分，诚实可靠性得不到回报。
AI.method: 提出四个贡献：(1)失败分类学——将"自信错误"定义为非对抗性、相关性的Byzantine故障子类；(2)市场柠檬模型——证明基于信任的协议只支持低信任均衡；(3)Trust Layer——在MCP/A2A之上的协议无关层，添加概率性能力描述、筛选和声誉机制，支持分离均衡；(4)委托链的可靠性组合界限。设计无需模型重训练，在信任锚缺失或损坏时优雅降级。
AI.result: 当维持夸大声明的成本超过收益时，Trust Layer能够实现分离均衡，使可靠Provider与不可靠Provider可以被区分。该设计在协议之上添加了一个薄的"腰部"层，不依赖具体模型实现。
AI.conclusion: 通过经济学 Remedies(信号传递、筛选、声誉)解决LLM Agent市场的柠檬问题，提出无需模型重训练的Trust Layer设计，为多Agent系统信任问题提供原则性解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses trust and reliability issues in LLM multi-agent networks (distributed systems/software engineering), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on video-to-3D motion generation. Even though both involve AI/models, they are in entirely different research fields with no overlap in methods or applications.

title: AURA: Action-Gated Memory for Robot Policies at Constant VRAM
summary:
The KV-cache is the right memory for datacenters but the wrong memory for robots. Datacenter inference batches many short requests and resets them, amortizing an attention cache across a crowd. Embodied agents instead run one long, non-resetting episode on bandwidth-limited edge hardware, where high-bandwidth memory and flash are scarce, flash has finite write endurance, and memory writes rather than compute can become the binding constraint.
  AURA-Mem (Action-Utility Recurrent Adaptive Memory) targets this regime. It wraps a frozen vision-language-action backbone with a constant-size recurrent memory and a learned gate that writes only when the current observation would change the next action: memory that knows when to stay silent. Unlike reconstruction-based memory, the gate is trained directly against a closed-loop action-error signal. Its inference state is fixed at 4,224 bytes regardless of horizon, while a KV-cache grows to 6,061 times larger at 100,000 steps.
  On a controlled synthetic benchmark, AURA-Mem matches the best O(1) baseline in accuracy while using 5.19-6.13 times fewer writes, and up to 9.19 times fewer writes on easier configurations. Budget-matched random and periodic schedules do not recover this gain, isolating the benefit to the action-surprise signal. On a trained closed-loop OpenVLA-OFT 7B panel on LIBERO-Long (n=60 episodes per arm), the gate does not hurt success: AURA-Mem matches the ungated base policy (0.233) and slightly exceeds an always-write KV arm (0.217), while using 7.0 times fewer writes and constant memory. We also instantiate an approximate-information-state value-loss bound as a methodology demonstration; at this scale, the bound is vacuous rather than a guarantee.

AI.tldr: 针对边缘设备上具身智能体的内存受限场景，提出AURA-Mem方法，通过学习门控机制只在观察改变未来动作时才写入记忆，相比KV-cache大幅减少写入次数，推理状态保持常量大小。
AI.motivation: 数据中心使用的KV-cache不适合机器人：边缘硬件带宽受限、内存稀缺、闪存写入耐力有限，且对于长episode场景，内存写入可能成为约束因素而非计算。
AI.method: AURA-Mem使用冻结的视觉-语言-动作骨干网络+常量大小循环内存+学习门控。门控直接针对闭环动作误差信号训练，而非重建 Loss。只在当前观察会改变下一个动作时写入记忆，实现"知道何时沉默的记忆"。
AI.result: 合成基准上匹配最佳O(1)基线精度，使用5.19-6.13倍更少写入（简单配置达9.19倍）。OpenVLA-OFT 7B在LIBERO-Long上，匹配无门控基线(0.233)，超过常写KV臂(0.217)，使用7.0倍更少写入。推理状态4224字节vs KV-cache 100000步时6061倍增大。
AI.conclusion: 动作惊喜信号驱动的门控记忆有效减少写入而不损害性能，为边缘具身智能提供可行内存方案。未来工作可探索层级记忆架构。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about ROBOTICS/Embodied AI (robot policies and action generation for physical robots), not Computer Graphics or 3D human motion generation. While it involves vision-language-action models, the application domain is fundamentally different: robot policy learning vs video-to-human-motion synthesis. The pain points (edge device memory efficiency, reducing memory writes, action gating based on error signals) have no connection to the research profile's focus on cross-modal video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, and text-semantic alignment for graphics purposes.

title: From Local Training to Large-Scale Mapping: A Comparative Assessment of Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Transferable Satellite-Derived Bathymetry
comment: 42 pages, 13 figures, 15 tables. Supplementary Information provided as ancillary file (anc/SI.pdf). Code and pretrained weights at https://github.com/buckai-observatory/DL_bathy
summary: Satellite-derived bathymetry (SDB) from multispectral imagery is cost-effective but scales poorly across regions, especially in optically complex coastal environments. We evaluate machine learning and deep learning for transferable SDB over the 0-20 m depth range using Sentinel-2 imagery. A Random Forest baseline and four CNNs (ResNet-50, ResNet-101, EfficientNet-B4, ConvNeXt-Large) are trained on Pratas Island and selected Great Barrier Reef regions, then evaluated on spatially independent intra- and cross-regional test areas. Preserving spatial continuity during training, by keeping contiguous reef blocks rather than random patches, is the single most impactful design choice; we further introduce a Smooth Weight Function (SWF)-weighted RMSE loss that emphasizes near-surface depths. With these choices, intra-regional RMSE ranges from 1.15 to 1.92 m over 0-20 m and is as low as 0.26 m for depths <= 3 m. Random Forest degrades sharply under cross-regional transfer (RMSE 1.53 m -> 2.99-3.78 m), while the deep models stay more robust (2.46-2.98 m). On the public MagicBathyNet aerial-RGB benchmark (0-16 m) the proposed networks reach 0.19-0.22 m RMSE, outperforming a U-Net baseline and a task-specific transformer architecture with substantially fewer parameters. We further exploit multi-temporal repeat imagery: training on it broadens diversity, and median-aggregating predictions across passes at inference reduces noise from changing sun angles, atmospheric conditions, water properties, and tides. We release optimized architectures and pretrained weights to enable scalable transfer to new sites.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了机器学习和深度学习方法在卫星测深（SDB）中的可转移性，使用Sentinel-2图像在0-20米深度范围内进行测试。研究发现保持空间连续性的训练策略和SWF加权RMSE损失是关键创新，深度模型在跨区域转移时比Random Forest更加鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 当前卫星测深方法虽然在成本上有优势，但在不同区域尤其是光学复杂的沿海环境中难以扩展应用。研究者希望找到更具可转移性的深度学习方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 使用Random Forest作为基线，并测试四种CNN架构（ResNet-50、ResNet-101、EfficientNet-B4、ConvNeXt-Large）。关键设计选择包括：1)保持空间连续性的训练策略；2)引入SWF加权RMSE损失强调近水面深度；3)利用多时相重复图像进行训练和推理。
AI.result: Intra-regional RMSE范围为1.15-1.92m（0-20m），≤3m深度可达0.26m。Random Forest在跨区域转移时RMSE从1.53m急剧下降至2.99-3.78m，而深度模型保持更稳健的性能（2.46-2.98m）。在MagicBathyNet基准上达到0.19-0.22m RMSE，优于U-Net基线和任务特定Transformer架构。
AI.conclusion: 保留空间连续性是单一最具影响力的设计选择。深度模型在跨区域转移方面显著优于传统机器学习方法，且参数量更少。多时相图像处理可进一步降低预测噪声。研究团队发布了优化架构和预训练权重以支持向新站点的可扩展转移。

relevance_reason: This paper is about satellite-derived bathymetry (remote sensing for ocean depth measurement), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and video-to-motion generation. The application domain is geospatial analysis/oceanography, not computer graphics, computer vision, or 3D motion generation. While it uses CNNs and machine learning, these methods are applied to a totally different field. No cross-modal alignment between video and 3D motion, no temporal consistency for motion, no video generation models, no quality assessment for generated content.

title: OpenAgenet/OAN: Open Infrastructure for Trusted Agent Interconnection
summary: OpenAgenet, abbreviated as OAN, is an open infrastructure project for trusted Agent interconnection. It addresses a problem that becomes visible when Agents move from isolated applications into open, multi-operator networks: before an Agent can safely discover, select, and invoke another Agent, it needs a way to verify identity provenance, governance state, discovery authorization, freshness, and pre-connection trust evidence. OAN is designed as a protocol-neutral trust layer. It does not replace Agent interaction protocols, tool protocols, model orchestration frameworks, or application-level workflows. Instead, it provides Root-governed identity admission, Registrar-assisted onboarding, Root-verified package publication, authorization-aware Discovery, and signed trusted invocation. This paper presents the motivation, architecture, roles, governance model, relationship with MCP, A2A, and ANP, deployment patterns, cooperation model, blockchain-backed authorization bulletin, prototype status, performance profile, and roadmap of OAN.

AI.tldr: OpenAgenet（OAN）是一个开放的信任层基础设施项目，旨在实现跨多运营商网络的可信Agent互联。它解决了Agent从孤立应用迁移到开放网络中面临的身份验证、授权和信任证明问题。
AI.motivation: 当Agent从孤立应用进入开放的多运营网络时，需要一种方式来验证身份来源、治理状态、发现授权、最新性和连接前的信任证据。现有协议无法满足这些需求，因此需要建立一个独立于交互协议、工具协议和编排框架的信任层。
AI.method: OAN被设计为一个协议中立的信任层，提供：Root治理的身份准入、Registrar辅助的入职引导、Root验证的包发布、授权感知的发现机制以及签名的可信调用。同时支持与MCP、A2A、ANP协议的集成，并提供区块链支持的授权公告系统。
AI.result: 已完成原型开发，具备Root-governed身份管理、Registrar辅助入职、授权感知发现等功能，性能测试表明其可用性，部署模式涵盖多种场景。
AI.conclusion: OAN为开放Agent网络提供了必要的安全基础设施，是连接可信Agent的关键中间件。其协议中立性和治理模型的结合为未来的多运营Agent网络奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about building trust layer infrastructure for AI agent interconnection (distributed systems/networking domain). It has no connection to Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D motion generation, cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, or any visual/motion-related tasks mentioned in the research profile. This is an entirely different field focusing on identity verification, authorization, and trust proofs for agents - not graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Evaluating Transformer and LSTM Frameworks for Prediction in Ungauged Basins
summary: Watershed networks exhibit convergent topologies in which multiple tributaries merge into downstream channels,integrating diverse upstream hydrological processes. In ungauged basins, the absence of direct observations increases uncertainty and limits the ability to anticipate extreme events. This study evaluates whether an encoder-only Transformer provides an advantage over an LSTM for upstream streamflow inference under limited hydrologic information, using retrospective simulations from the NOAA National Water Model (NWM). Across both upstream-only and combined configurations, the LSTM showed stronger overall performance than the Transformer model across the two configurations. Incorporating downstream information further boosted performance for all models, increasing median NNSE by more than 60%. Rather than treating this as a leaderboard-style comparison, we interpret the experiments as a test of architectural inductive bias for hydrologic sequence inference. The results indicate that recurrent memory remains better aligned with this upstream reconstruction task than an encoder-only Transformer, while downstream hydrologic context provides a strong auxiliary constraint that substantially improves prediction skill across architectures

AI.tldr: 研究比较了Encoder-only Transformer与LSTM在无观测流域上游流量推断中的表现，使用NOAA国家水资源模型的回溯模拟数据。研究发现LSTM在两种配置下均优于Transformer，融合下游信息可使所有模型的NNSE中位数提升超过60%。
AI.motivation: 流域网络具有汇流拓扑结构，无观测流域缺乏直接观测增加不确定性且限制极端事件预测能力。研究旨在评估Encoder-only Transformer相比LSTM是否在有限水文信息下提供上游流量推断优势。
AI.method: 使用NOAA国家水资源模型(NWM)的回溯模拟数据，比较上游-only和组合两种配置，应用Encoder-only Transformer和LSTM模型进行序列到序列的流量推断。
AI.result: LSTM在两种配置下整体表现均优于Transformer模型。融入下游信息进一步提升了所有模型的性能，中位数NNSE提升超过60%。
AI.conclusion: 循环记忆机制比Encoder-only Transformer更适应该上游重建任务的归纳偏置，下游水 Context提供了显著提高预测技能的一致性约束。

relevance_reason: This paper is about hydrology and water resource management (streamflow prediction in ungaged watershed basins), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. While it uses Transformer and LSTM architectures, this is a different application domain entirely - it deals with meteorological/hydrological data for flood prediction, not video-to-motion conversion, visual quality assessment, or any computer graphics/motion generation tasks. The pain points and methods in the research profile (video generation, VLM quality assessment, 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment) have no connection to this watershed flow prediction work.

title: GeoDrive-Bench: Benchmarking Region-Specific Multimodal Reasoning in Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) for autonomous driving have shown promising performance, but their ability to handle region-specific traffic rules remains underexplored, raising uncertainties about their deployment across diverse global settings. We therefore introduce GeoDrive-Bench, a novel benchmark that enables the systematic investigation of VLMs' geo-culturally grounded driving reasoning. We curated 5,053 human-validated multiple-choice QA pairs across six countries covering diverse driving cultures. Specifically, we emphasize four driving tasks: perception, prediction, planning, and region reasoning. Each question requires models to infer the correct driving behavior from visual evidence and local traffic conventions without explicit country labels. Beyond evaluation, we further design a distillation algorithm that injects region-specific traffic-rule knowledge into the internal representations of VLMs, enabling models to better align visual scene understanding with local driving policies. Experiments on nine state-of-the-art VLMs show substantial performance variations across geo-driving cultures for each task, while our proposed baseline models exhibit improved geo-cultural reasoning across regions. These results suggest that current VLMs still lack robust region-aware driving intelligence and highlight GeoDrive-Bench as a diagnostic and training-oriented testbed for deployable autonomous driving foundation models.

AI.tldr: 提出了GeoDrive-Bench基准测试，用于评估视觉语言模型(VLM)在不同地区特定交通规则下的驾驶推理能力
AI.motivation: 当前VLM在处理区域特定交通规则方面的能力尚未得到充分探索，在不同全球环境中部署存在不确定性
AI.method: 构建了包含5,053个人类验证的多选题QA对，涵盖六个国家的多样化驾驶文化；设计了一种蒸馏算法将区域特定交通规则知识注入VLM内部表示
AI.result: 在九个最先进的VLM上的实验显示，每个任务在不同地理驾驶文化之间存在显著的性能差异；提出的基线模型表现出改进的跨区域地理文化推理能力
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM仍然缺乏稳健的区域感知驾驶智能；GeoDrive-Bench作为可部署自动驾驶基础模型的诊断和训练Oriented测试平台

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about autonomous driving benchmarks (evaluating VLM reasoning for regional traffic rules), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically video-to-3D motion generation. Although both mention VLMs, they serve completely different purposes: the paper uses VLMs for driving reasoning, whereas the research profile uses VLMs for quality assessment in video-to-motion conversion. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points (cross-modal video-motion alignment, temporal consistency, quality control, text-to-motion semantic alignment).

title: OpenAgenet/OAN: Technical Architecture for Trust-Governed Agent Identity and Discovery
summary: This paper describes the technical architecture of OpenAgenet / OAN. OAN is a protocol-neutral trust layer for open Agent interconnection. It specifies the role architecture, identity objects, registration workflow, Root-governed lifecycle, Root-verified package model, authorization-aware Discovery, signed trusted invocation, verification requirements, state transitions, security properties, implementation boundaries, and deployment considerations. The design is intended to support heterogeneous Agent frameworks and interaction protocols, including MCP, A2A, ANP-like systems, and domain-specific Agent protocols. OAN does not define the entire business conversation among Agents; it defines how Agent identities become admissible, discoverable, verifiable, and safe to approach before protocol-specific interaction begins.

AI.tldr: OAN（开放代理网络）是一个协议中立的信任层，旨在实现开放代理之间的互联互通。该架构定义了角色结构、身份对象、注册工作流程、根级治理的生命周期、根级验证的包模型、授权感知的发现、可信调用、验证要求、状态转换、安全属性、实施边界和部署考虑等核心技术规范，支持异构代理框架和交互协议。
AI.motivation: 当前异构代理框架（MCP、A2A、ANP等）和协议缺乏统一的信任机制，导致代理身份验证、发现和安全接入存在障碍。研究旨在提供一个协议无关的信任基础设施，使代理在协议特定交互之前即可实现身份准入、发现、验证和安全接入。
AI.method: 采用系统架构设计方法，定义完整的信任层技术规范：包括角色架构建模、身份对象定义、注册工作流设计、根治理生命周期管理、包模型验证、授权感知发现机制、可信调用协议、状态机转换、安全属性形式化、明确实施边界和部署考量。
AI.result: 设计并规范了一个完整的协议中立信任层架构，能够支持多种异构代理框架和交互协议，实现代理身份的准入、发现、验证和安全接入，为开放代理互联提供通用可信基础设施。
AI.conclusion: OAN作为协议中立的信任层，解决了异构代理系统间的互信问题，通过定义身份管理、发现、验证和调用规范，使代理在业务对话前即可建立安全可信的交互基础，但不干涉具体的业务对话内容。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about multi-agent system architecture, trust layers, and agent identity/discovery protocols - completely outside the domain of Computer Graphics. It has zero connection to video generation, 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between video and motion, or any computer graphics methods mentioned in the research profile.

title: BehaviorBench: Modeling Real-World User Decisions from Behavioral Traces
summary: Many decision-support settings require systems that adapt to individual users, but evaluation data for this problem remain limited. Existing benchmarks for user understanding often rely on simulated users or model-generated behavior, even though recent work cautions that model-based simulations can diverge systematically from human behavior. We introduce \textsc{BehaviorBench}, a benchmark for evaluating personalized decision modeling from real-world behavioral traces. \textsc{BehaviorBench} reconstructs wallet-level decision histories from observed public prediction-market and on-chain records, and organizes them into two complementary task layers: \emph{Belief prediction}, which predicts a user's final revealed stance and confidence in a market, and \emph{Trade prediction}, which predicts the direction and amount of individual transactions. Across 2,000 evaluation wallets, the benchmark contains 141,445 Belief instances and 1,485,972 Trade instances, with disjoint support pools for retrieval-based evaluation. We evaluate frontier and open-weight generative models under four history interfaces: no personalization, direct recent history, generated user profiles, and retrieved support-wallet evidence. Personalization improves Belief prediction more consistently than Trade prediction, model rankings change across task layers and metrics, and different history interfaces expose different failure modes. \textsc{BehaviorBench} provides an evaluation setting for studying whether personalized methods can use real-world behavioral evidence rather than simulated users alone.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了BehaviorBench，一个用于评估个性化决策建模的基准测试，通过重构真实世界的预测市场和链上记录中的钱包级决策历史来评估模型性能。该基准包含2000个评估钱包、141,445个信念实例和1,485,972个交易实例，用于评估生成模型在不同历史接口下的个性化表现。
AI.motivation: 许多决策支持系统需要适应个体用户，但此类问题的评估数据有限。现有的用户理解基准依赖模拟用户或模型生成行为，而研究表明模型模拟可能与人类行为产生系统性偏离，因此需要基于真实世界行为的评估基准。
AI.method: BehaviorBench从公开的预测市场和链上记录中重建钱包级决策历史，组织为两个任务层：信念预测（预测用户最终立场和信心）和交易预测（交易方向和金额）。在四种历史接口下评估模型：无个性化、直接近期历史、生成用户画像、检索支持证据。
AI.result: 个性化对信念预测的改进比交易预测更一致；模型排名随任务层和指标变化；不同历史接口暴露不同失败模式。
AI.conclusion: BehaviorBench提供了一个使用真实世界行为证据而非模拟用户的评估设置，有助于研究个性化方法在实际场景中的应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about behavioral decision modeling using prediction markets and blockchain data, entirely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The application domain is financial/user behavior prediction, not video generation, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal alignment between video and motion. It addresses none of the pain points (video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, quality control, semantic alignment) and uses none of the specified methods (Video Generation Models, VLMs, 3D Motion Generation Models). Complete mismatch in both field and application domain.

title: Diagnosis of Human Object Interaction Detectors for Real World Educational Applications
summary: Human-object interaction (HOI) recognition is critical for automatically analyzing student behavior in complex educational environments. Although state-of-the-art (SOTA) HOI detectors perform well on benchmark datasets, their performance often degrades when deployed in real-world training environments due to domain-specific objects, occlusions, and complex visual conditions. In this paper, we introduce a diagnosis-driven framework that integrates a triplet-level HOI error taxonomy with error-factor attribution analysis for real-world educational video data. We study this problem in the context of Critical Care Air Transport Team (CCATT) mixed-reality medical training. Based on an analysis of HOI failure modes and their causes, we develop a diagnosis-informed refinement strategy for adapting pretrained HOI models to the target domain. Experiments on the CCATT dataset show that this approach improves the macro-F1 score of a pretrained CDN model from 48.6 to 90.2 through targeted refinement guided by diagnosed error factors. These results highlight the value of detailed diagnostic analysis for informing targeted adaptation of HOI models in real-world educational environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种诊断驱动的框架，用于将预训练的HOI模型适应到真实教育环境。针对Critical Care Air Transport Team混合现实医学训练数据集，通过三要素级HOI错误分类法和错误因素归因分析，识别失败模式并指导模型针对性改进，最终将CDN模型的宏F1分数从48.6提升至90.2。
AI.motivation: 现有HOI检测器在基准数据集上表现良好，但在真实教育环境中性能下降，原因包括领域特定目标、遮挡和复杂视觉条件。这种域迁移问题限制了模型的实际应用。
AI.method: 提出诊断驱动框架，整合三要素级HOI错误分类法与错误因素归因分析，对真实教育视频数据进行故障诊断。基于诊断结果开发诊断引导的 refinement策略，针对性调整预训练HOI模型以适应目标领域。
AI.result: 在CCATT数据集上，该方法将预训练CDN模型的宏F1分数从48.6提升至90.2，显著超越了 baseline性能。
AI.conclusion: 详细诊断分析对于为真实教育环境中的HOI模型提供针对性适应指导具有重要价值，这一方法可推广至其他领域的域迁移任务。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - Paper is about Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection for medical training applications (domain adaptation for detecting human-object interactions in medical education videos), which is a Computer Vision/AI detection task. This is entirely different from the Computer Graphics research profile focused on video-to-3D motion generation using video generation models and cross-modal pipelines. The application domain mismatch is fundamental: one converts video to 3D motion, the other detects objects in videos for medical training. Different field entirely.

title: MeDxAgent: Multi-Agent Consultation for Interactive Medical Diagnosis
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for health-related decision support. Yet most evaluations treat diagnosis as a single-shot task with complete information provided upfront, often as a multiple-choice selection. This diverges from clinical practice, where diagnosis is interactive and open-ended, involving sequential hypothesis refinement through targeted questioning. We address this gap. We build MeDxBench, a large-scale benchmark of 4,421 clinical cases across 20 specialties. We further propose MeDxAgent, a multi-agent consultation system for interactive diagnosis, and systematically study its prompt-, flow- and agent-level design choices. MeDxAgent achieves a 10.3% accuracy gain over the baseline on MeDxBench, closing 52.3% of the gap to a full-information oracle. We find that specific design choices: collecting demographics first, passing summarized dialogue for diagnosis, and feeding candidate diagnoses for targeted questioning, improve accuracy, mirroring how physicians reason, though their effect emerges fully only in combination. Code and dataset will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MeDxBench基准（包含4421个临床病例）和MeDxAgent多智能体诊疗系统，通过交互式诊断弥补现有LLM评估中单次问答与实际临床动态诊断的差距。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM健康决策支持评估存在严重问题：将诊断视为一次性任务，由用户预先提供完整信息并选择答案。这与实际临床实践不符，因为真实诊断是交互式的、开放性的，需要通过针对性提问逐步验证和修正假设。
AI.method: 构建包含20个专科4421个临床病例的大规模基准MeDxBench；设计多智能体诊疗系统MeDxAgent，系统研究其提示设计、工作流和智能体层面的设计选择，比较不同配置的效果差异。
AI.result: MeDxAgent在MeDxBench上相比基线提升10.3%准确率，缩小了52.3%的全信息神谕（oracle）差距。关键设计包括：先收集人口统计学信息、传递汇总对话用于诊断、输入候选诊断用于针对性提问，这些改进仅在组合使用时才能充分发挥效果。
AI.conclusion: 交互式诊断策略有效，但特定设计需组合使用才能最大化收益。该研究为LLM在临床诊断中的应用提供了更贴合实际的评估框架和优化方向。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical diagnosis and healthcare AI (MeDxAgent for clinical consultation), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, and cross-modal alignment between video and 3D motion representations. The application domains are entirely different - medical/healthcare vs computer graphics/motion synthesis. No overlap in methods or application areas whatsoever.

title: ChatHealthAI: Aligning Electronic Health Record Representations with Large Language Models for Grounded Clinical Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong natural-language reasoning abilities for clinical decision support, but struggle to effectively model structured longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs). In contrast, EHR foundation models can learn predictive patient representations, yet lack interpretable language-based reasoning. To bridge this gap, we propose ChatHealthAI, a multimodal reasoning framework that aligns structured EHR representations from a pretrained EHR foundation model with the semantic space of a frozen LLM through a task-aware resampler. By integrating longitudinal patient representations with refined clinical event descriptions, ChatHealthAI enables clinically grounded natural-language reasoning while maintaining accurate patient prediction. We evaluated ChatHealthAI on three clinical predictive tasks from the EHRSHOT benchmark. Results show that ChatHealthAI improves reasoning quality and interpretability while preserving competitive predictive performance. These findings highlight the potential of integrating EHR foundation models with pretrained LLMs for interpretable clinical prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出ChatHealthAI框架，桥接大语言模型(LLM)的自然语言推理能力与电子健康记录(EHR)基础模型的预测能力，通过任务感知重采样器对齐结构化EHR表示与LLM语义空间，实现可解释的临床预测。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs缺乏有效建模结构化纵向EHR的能力，而EHR基础模型虽然能学习预测性患者表示，但缺乏可解释的语言推理能力，两者之间存在鸿沟。
AI.method: 设计多模态推理框架ChatHealthAI，包含：(1)预训练EHR基础模型提取结构化患者表示；(2)任务感知重采样器将EHR表示对齐到LLM语义空间；(3)整合纵向患者表示与精炼临床事件描述，输入冻结的LLM进行推理。
AI.result: 在EHRSHOT基准的三个临床预测任务上评估，ChatHealthAI在保持竞争力的预测性能同时，提高了推理质量和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 研究成果表明，将EHR基础模型与预训练LLM集成是实现可解释临床预测的有效途径，具有重要应用潜力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is in Healthcare/Medical AI domain (aligning Electronic Health Records with LLMs for clinical reasoning), while the research profile is in Computer Graphics focused on video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, and cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. Although both papers mention "alignment" between modalities, the application domains are entirely different - one addresses healthcare predictions while the other addresses computer graphics/motion synthesis. The methods are also unrelated - this paper uses EHR foundation models and LLMs, not video generation or 3D motion generation models.

title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
summary: We introduce Cosmos 3, a family of omnimodal world models designed to jointly process and generate language, image, video, audio, and action sequences within a unified mixture-of-transformers architecture. By supporting highly flexible input-output configurations, Cosmos 3 seamlessly unifies critical modalities for Physical AI -- effectively subsuming vision-language models, video generators, world simulators, and world-action models into a single framework. Our evaluation demonstrates that Cosmos 3 establishes a new state-of-the-art across a diverse suite of understanding and generation tasks, demonstrating omnimodal world models as scalable, general-purpose backbones for embodied agents. Our post-trained Cosmos 3 models were ranked as the best open-source Text-to-Image and Image-to-Video models by Artificial Analysis, and the best policy model by RoboArena at the time the technical report was written. To accelerate open research and deployment in Physical AI, we make our code, model checkpoints, curated synthetic datasets, and evaluation benchmark available under the Linux Foundation's OpenMDW-1.1 https://openmdw.ai/license/1-1/ License at https://github.com/nvidia/cosmos}{github.com/nvidia/cosmos and https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/cosmos3 . The project website is available at https://research.nvidia.com/labs/cosmos-lab/cosmos3 .

AI.tldr: Cosmos 3是一个全能世界模型家族，通过统一的Mixture-of-Transformers架构同时处理语言、图像、视频、音频和动作，在多个benchmark上达到SOTA，是目前最佳的开源文本到图像和图像到视频模型。
AI.motivation: 开发一种能够统一处理和生成多种模态（语言、图像、视频、音频和动作）的全能世界模型，以支持Physical AI的发展，解决现有模型架构分散、无法有效整合的问题。
AI.method: 采用混合-transformer架构（mixture-of-transformers architecture），支持灵活的输入输出配置，统一处理多种模态。模型经过后训练（post-training）并在多个基准测试上评估。
AI.result: 在理解 and generation任务上建立新的SOTA，在Artificial Analysis的Text-to-Image和Image-to-Video排名中位列最佳开源模型，在RoboArena中成为最佳policy模型。
AI.conclusion: 证明了全能世界模型可以作为可扩展的通用基础模型用于具身智能体（embodied agents）。研究团队开源了代码、模型检查点、数据集和评估基准。

relevance_reason: While both papers deal with multi-modal generation, the application domains differ significantly. The research profile is about Computer Graphics-focused video-to-3D-motion conversion (human motion generation), while Cosmos 3 is a Physical AI/robotics world model for generating actions/policies for robots. Although both handle video and action modalities, the target application is fundamentally different - generating robot policies vs. generating human motion from video. Also, Cosmos 3 doesn't address the pain points of cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency, or VLM-based quality assessment specific to the computer graphics domain.

title: D2MDT: Department-aware Multidisciplinary Team Consultation with Deliberation for Efficient Clinical Prediction
summary: Electronic health records (EHRs) are central to clinical prediction, but existing methods either rely on correlation-driven deep models or use single large language models (LLMs), making it difficult to support multidisciplinary clinical reasoning. Recent multi-agent systems (MAS) provide a promising alternative, yet current EHR-grounded MAS methods still suffer from weak evidence differentiation across agents and redundant multi-round interaction. We propose D2MDT, a Department-aware MultiDisciplinary Team Consultation with Deliberation for Efficient clinical prediction. D2MDT first constructs structured EHR evidence and consultation-ready semantic evidence for multi-agent consultation. It then assigns patient-specific department perspectives to doctor agents and retrieves complementary evidence for collaborative consultation. To improve efficiency, D2MDT further introduces residual deliberation, which updates only unresolved consensus rather than replaying the full discussion history. Finally, D2MDT fuses the refined consensus report with structured EHR representations for prediction. Experiments on mortality prediction show that D2MDT improves both predictive performance and consultation efficiency. We release the code online to ease the reproducibility of this paper.

AI.tldr: D2MDT是一个新型的部门感知多学科团队咨询系统,通过多智能体协作和残留推理提高临床预测效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 解决现有电子健康记录(EHR)预测方法的问题:基于相关性的深度模型缺乏可解释性,单一大型语言模型缺乏多学科推理支持,且当前的多智能体系统存在证据区分不足和冗余多轮交互的问题。
AI.method: 1)构建结构化EHR证据和咨询就绪的语义证据;2)为医生智能体分配患者特定科室视角并检索补充证据进行协作咨询;3)引入残留推理,仅更新未解决的共识而非重播完整讨论历史;4)将精细化的共识报告与结构化EHR表示融合进行预测。
AI.result: 在死亡率预测任务上的实验表明,D2MDT提高了预测性能和咨询效率。
AI.conclusion: D2MDT通过部门感知的多学科团队协商机制和残留推理策略,为临床预测提供了一种更高效、更准确的多智能体协作方法,为多学科临床决策支持系统的发展提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This is a healthcare/medical informatics paper about clinical mortality prediction using EHR data and multi-agent doctor consultation systems. It has NOTHING to do with Computer Graphics. The research profile is about video-to-motion generation in computer graphics (using Video Generation Models like Wanxiang/Seedance, VLMs, 3D Motion Generation), while this paper is about medical decision support. Despite both using multi-agent systems, the application domains are completely different - medical clinical prediction vs computer graphics motion generation.

title: Traj-Evolve: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent System for Patient Trajectory Modeling in Lung Cancer Early Detection
summary: Modeling patient trajectories from longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs) requires reasoning over sparse, noisy, and long-context multimodal sequences. Existing LLM-based multi-agent systems address context length but process patients in isolation, failing to mirror how clinicians leverage accumulated experience from similar prior cases. We present Traj-Evolve, a self-evolving multi-agent system with two complementary evolving mechanisms. First, an Experience Pool (ExPool) acts as a non-parametric memory, indexing rejection-sampled reasoning traces to retrieve similar patients as few-shot contexts. Second, multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) via reward-ranked fine-tuning parametrically optimizes inter-agent and agent-memory collaboration. A leave-one-out cross-retrieval strategy unifies the two, aligning training- and inference-time behavior under retrieval augmentation. On a lung cancer prediction task utilizing up to five years of multimodal EHRs, Traj-Evolve outperforms 9 strong baselines on the overall population and a challenging never-smoker population. Analysis of the evolving dynamics highlights three key findings: (1) expanding the ExPool shifts optimal retrieval from diverse to specific samples; (2) under MARL, the manager agent's prediction loss converges quickly while the worker agents' temporal reasoning continues to benefit from more verified patients; and (3) the two mechanisms are complementary on the predicted risk, where ExPool improves specificity while MARL improves sensitivity.

AI.tldr: 提出了Traj-Evolve，一个用于从纵向电子健康记录中建模患者轨迹的自演化多智能体系统。该系统结合了经验池（非参数记忆）和多智能体强化学习两种演化机制，在肺癌预测任务上优于9个强基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统虽然解决了上下文长度问题，但孤立处理患者，无法像临床医生那样利用相似既往病例的累积经验。
AI.method: 1) 经验池(ExPool)作为非参数记忆，对拒绝采样的推理轨迹进行索引检索相似患者作为少样本上下文；2) 通过奖励排序微调的多智能体强化学习(MARL)优化智能体间协作；3) 留一交叉检索策略统一训练和推理行为。
AI.result: 在利用长达五年多模态EHR的肺癌预测任务中，Traj-Evolve在整体人群和挑战性的从未吸烟人群中均优于9个强基线。分析表明：扩展ExPool使最优检索从多样本转向特定样本；MARL中管理者智能体预测 loss 快速收敛，而工作智能体时间推理持续受益于更多验证患者；两机制互补——ExPool提高特异性，MARL提高敏感性。
AI.conclusion: ExPool和MARL两种演化机制相互补充，分别改善了模型的特异性和敏感性，为利用纵向EHR进行患者轨迹建模提供了有效的自演化框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about healthcare/medical AI (lung cancer detection from EHR data using multi-agent LLM systems), NOT Computer Graphics. The application domain is entirely different - it has nothing to do with 2D video-to-3D motion generation, video generation models, cross-modal alignment, or any computer graphics topics. Even though both papers might use AI/LLM techniques, the application domains are fundamentally different (medical diagnosis vs. computer graphics motion synthesis).

title: Automated Report-Derived Oncology VQA Benchmark for Evaluating Vision-Language Models on 3D Medical Imaging
summary: Evaluating vision-language models (VLMs) on medical images requires benchmarks that are clinically grounded, scalable, and controlled for evaluation confounds. Existing public benchmarks are limited in scale, manually annotated, or potentially leaked into VLM pretraining corpora. We present an automated agent-driven pipeline that generates multiple-choice VQA datasets directly from paired private radiology reports and 3D oncology imaging, producing two complementary question types: RADS-style questions deterministically derived from clinician-defined reporting schemas, and radiology report-derived questions generated by an LLM from radiologist findings and verified against the source report. Applied to four in-house cancer cohorts, the pipeline yields an instance-contamination-controlled benchmark without per-question human annotation. Zero-shot evaluation of six VLMs reveals no dominant model and substantial headroom across all cells. A blind ablation reveals that visual reliance is highly dataset-specific: liver Report-derived questions genuinely require the image, while Lung CT is essentially solvable without it - the leading closed model exceeds its sighted accuracy on Lung CT when blinded - indicating that even private clinical data does not guarantee a contamination-controlled read of visual capability. The pipeline is released as an open agent skill for in-house redeployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化代理管道，从私人癌症影像报告生成多个选择VQA数据集，用于评估视觉语言模型在医学影像上的表现。该方法无需人工标注即可生成污染控制的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有医学VLM基准测试存在规模有限、人工标注成本高、且可能泄漏到VLM预训练数据中导致评估结果不准确的问题。需要一种临床相关、可扩展且能控制评估干扰因素的基准生成方法。
AI.method: 1) 建立自动化代理驱动管道，从成对的私人放射学报告和3D肿瘤影像直接生成多选题VQA数据集；2) 生成两种互补问题类型：RADS风格问题（从临床定义的报告模式推导）和报告派生问题（由LLM从放射学家发现生成并验证）；3) 应用到四个内部癌症队列；4) 对六个VLM进行零样本评估并进行盲 ablation 实验。
AI.result: 1) 生成的基准测试在实例级别控制污染且无需每题人工标注；2) 零样本评估显示没有主导模型，各指标均有很大提升空间；3) 盲 ablation 发现视觉依赖高度数据集特异性：肝脏报告派生问题真正需要图像，而肺CT即使不用图像也可解决——顶级闭源模型在肺CT上失明后准确性反而提升，表明即使是私人临床数据也无法保证对视觉能力的无污染评估。
AI.conclusion: 该自动化管道能够大规模生成无污染的医学VLM评估基准，但揭示出当前模型在特定任务上存在严重的数据泄露问题。管道已作为开源代理技能发布供内部重新部署。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about medical imaging (oncology VQA benchmarks for 3D CT/scans) while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically video-to-3D human motion generation. Even though both mention VLMs and "3D imaging," medical tumor CT scans are fundamentally different from 3D human motion representations. The paper addresses medical visual question answering, not cross-modal video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, or semantic alignment for graphics animation.

title: Toward a Modular Architecture for Embedded AI Agent Systems at the Edge
summary:
The rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) has enabled agentic AI capable of complex reasoning and tool use; however, deploying such autonomy in pervasive computing environments remains challenging due to the strict memory and energy constraints of embedded microcontrollers. Existing frameworks typically assume server-class resources or continuous connectivity, leaving a gap for deeply embedded systems. This paper proposes a modular reference architecture for Embedded Agent Systems that bridges the divide between deterministic real-time control and agentic intelligence.
  We introduce a tiered design that decouples On-Device Agents - executing highly compressed neural networks and rule-based logic for low-latency, privacy-critical tasks - from Cloud-Augmented Agents that leverage Small Language Models (SLMs) for higher-level reasoning and planning. A key contribution is the integration of a cross-cutting Governance Layer, ensuring observability, policy enforcement, and safety across distributed fleets of autonomous devices. Rather than presenting purely empirical benchmarks, we analyze architectural design principles and trade-offs regarding latency, energy, and reliable execution in resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对嵌入式系统的模块化参考架构，通过分层设计将本地设备上的轻量级代理与云端增强的Small Language Model相结合，并引入治理层来实现分布式自主设备的管理。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽能实现复杂推理和工具使用，但嵌入式微控制器的内存和能源限制阻碍了其在深度嵌入环境中的部署，现有框架通常假设服务器级资源或持续连接能力，导致深层嵌入式系统存在技术缺口。
AI.method: 提出分层设计架构，将On-Device Agents（执行压缩神经网络和规则逻辑用于低延迟、隐私关键任务）与Cloud-Augmented Agents（利用小语言模型进行高级推理和规划）解耦，并集成跨切面的Governance Layer确保可观测性、政策执行和安全性。
AI.result: 通过分析架构设计原则和权衡，提供了一种在资源受限环境中实现延迟、能源和可靠执行之间平衡的方法，弥合了确定性实时控制与代理智能之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为分布式自主设备车队提供了在严格资源约束下实现代理智能的可行路径，通过模块化设计和治理层的集成，可在隐私敏感的低延迟任务与云端高级推理之间取得平衡。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application. This paper addresses embedded AI agent systems at the edge - dealing with resource-constrained microcontrollers, on-device agents, and cloud-augmented language models. There is no connection to Computer Graphics, video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, cross-modal feature alignment, or any of the visual/video generation methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain mismatch is absolute - embedded systems architecture has zero relevance to video-to-motion generation in computer graphics.

title: An Exploration of Collision-based Enemy Morphology Generation
summary: Despite a great deal of prior research into Procedural Content Generation (PCG), relatively little prior work has explored generating enemies for video games. In particular, there is almost no work on generating enemy morphologies, the basic body plan or collision information for in-game enemies, despite the existence of related morphology generation work in robotics. In this paper, we explore three different novel approaches to generate enemy morphologies based on player collision information. We found that each approach provides different strengths and weaknesses, but all had equivalent or better performance than an evolutionary baseline adapted from prior robotics morphology work.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何基于玩家碰撞信息生成视频游戏中敌人的形态（morphology），即敌人的基本体型和碰撞数据。作者提出了三种新颖的方法，并发现这些方法在性能上均优于或等同于从机器人学相关研究中改编的进化基准方法。
AI.motivation: 虽然程序化内容生成（PCG）已有大量研究，但针对游戏敌人形态生成的研究却相对匮乏。敌人形态是指敌人的基本体型或碰撞信息，这在游戏中是非常重要的元素。之前几乎没有这方面的专门研究，即使机器人学中有关于形态生成的工作。
AI.method: 作者探索了三种不同的方法来基于玩家的碰撞信息生成敌人的形态，并将这些方法与之前在机器人学领域中改进的进化基准方法进行了比较。
AI.result: 结果表明，这三种方法各具优势与不足，但在性能上都达到或超过了从机器人学改编的进化基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于玩家碰撞信息生成敌人形态是可行的，且可以取得良好的效果，为视频游戏的程序化内容生成提供了一个新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses a game design problem (enemy morphology/collision generation) rather than computer graphics for video-to-motion conversion. While technically related to computer graphics as a broader field, this paper focuses on procedural content generation for video games using player collision data—a completely different application domain than the research profile's focus on cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency, VLM-based quality assessment, and text-to-semantic motion alignment. The paper lacks any mention of video generation models, VLMs, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal feature extraction pipelines specified in the methods.

title: Principled Reflection Separation via Nonlinear Superposition and Feature Interaction
summary: Single-image reflection separation is fundamentally challenged by the entanglement of transmission and reflection layers under complex image formation processes. Existing approaches largely rely on simplified assumptions or independent modeling, limiting their ability to handle real-world scenarios. In this work, we revisit the problem from a unified perspective and identify a key issue of existing approaches, i.e., the widely adopted linear composition model in the sRGB domain fails to capture the nonlinear coupling introduced by real-world image signal processing pipelines. To address this, we introduce a learnable nonlinear superposition model that more faithfully characterizes layer interactions and improves decomposition fidelity. Building upon this formulation, we propose a generalized dual-stream interactive framework that explicitly models bidirectional dependencies between transmission and reflection through feature exchange. This framework unifies activation-, gating-, and attention-based interaction mechanisms, and is compatible with both CNN and Transformer backbones. Extensive experiments on diverse real-world benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves superior performance with strong generalization capability. More importantly, our study reveals that reflection separation is not about undoing a linear mixture, but about learning nonlinear formation and interaction}, offering new insights into the design of principled image decomposition models. Code and models are publicly available at https://mingcv.github.io/DIRS-Page.

AI.tldr: 本文针对单图像反射分离问题，指出传统线性合成模型无法捕捉真实图像信号处理 Pipeline 中的非线性耦合，提出可学习的非线性叠加模型和双向特征交互的通用双流框架，在多个真实基准数据集上实现优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖简化假设或独立建模，难以处理真实场景。单图像反射分离的根本挑战在于透射层与反射层在复杂图像形成过程中的纠缠。现有广泛采用的 sRGB 域线性合成模型未能捕捉实际图像信号处理流程引入的非线性耦合。
AI.method: 提出一种可学习的非线性叠加模型，更准确地描述层间交互；基于此构建双向特征交换的通用双流交互框架，显式建模透射层与反射层之间的双向依赖。该框架统一了基于激活、门控和注意力的交互机制，同时兼容 CNN 和 Transformer 主干网络。
AI.result: 在多种真实世界基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法具有优越的性能和强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明反射分离的本质不是撤销线性混合，而是学习非线性形成与交互，为设计原则性图像分解模型提供新思路。代码和模型已公开可用。

relevance_reason: Complete mismatch in application domain. The research profile is about 2D video to 3D motion generation (video-to-motion conversion) in computer graphics, while this paper is about single image reflection separation (separating reflected and transmitted light layers in photographs). The疼痛点 and methods are completely different: profile needs video generation models, VLMs, and cross-modal alignment between video and motion; paper addresses low-level image layer decomposition using non-linear superposition and feature interaction. Even though both are in computer graphics, they deal with entirely different sub-fields - one is motion generation, the other is image restoration/enhancement. No overlap in goals or methodologies.

title: When Helping Hurts and How to Fix It: Multi-Agent Debate for Data Cleaning
comment: 27 pages, 4 figures, 12 tables. Includes appendix with full experimental results, prompt templates, and dataset statistics
summary: When does multi-agent debate help data cleaning, and when does it hurt? Across three benchmarks, four model families, and over 6,000 task-condition pairs, we find debate's effect reverses sign: it degrades generation across all four models (-1.6 to -15.5pp) through critique-induced confusion (CIC), hallucinated Critic feedback that the Generator accepts uncritically, yet improves error detection (+27.4pp F1, d=1.0). We derive a debate benefit condition: debate helps when the probability of rescuing a wrong output (Critic verification odds weighted by fixability) exceeds the probability of destroying a correct one. A factorial experiment proves adversarial separation is essential: self-verification with identical tools fails, while a separate Critic with code-execution grounding and evidence-gated generation produces the first debate configuration to significantly exceed single-agent on a generative task (+5.3pp, p<0.05). The condition correctly predicts all nine task types and generalizes with zero false positives across 19 published comparisons in seven domains.

AI.tldr: 研究多智能体辩论对数据清洗的影响，发现辩论效果会反转：虽然通过批评诱导混淆(CIC)降低所有模型的生成质量(-1.6到-15.5pp)，但显著提升错误检测能力(+27.4pp F1)。并推导出辩论有益的条件公式。
AI.motivation: 探究多智能体辩论在数据清洗中何时有帮助、何时有损害，解决当前研究中辩论效果不一致的问题。
AI.method: 跨三个基准、四个模型家族、超过6,000个任务-条件对进行大规模评估，并设计因子实验验证对抗分离的必要性。
AI.result: 辩论效果反转：降低生成质量但提升错误检测。辩论有益条件为 rescue概率 > destroy概率。分离的 Critic+代码执行接地+证据门控生成首次在生成任务上显著超越单智能体(+5.3pp)。该条件正确预测九种任务类型，泛化19个已发表比较无假阳性。
AI.conclusion: 辩论并非普遍有益，需要满足特定条件才有效。自验证失败，对抗性分离配置是关键。该条件可推广到七个领域的多种任务。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about multi-agent debate for data cleaning in NLP/Machine Learning contexts, focused on error detection in text/code generation. It has no relation to Computer Graphics, video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, cross-modal video-motion alignment, or visual quality assessment. The methods discussed (debate, CIC, error detection) are unrelated to the video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLMs for visual assessment, or 3D motion generation pipelines needed in this research profile.

title: Thinking Past the Answer: Evaluating Harmful Overthinking in Large Reasoning Models
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) improve performance by generating explicit intermediate reasoning traces through increased test-time compute, yet the assumption that longer reasoning is consistently beneficial remains under-examined. While recent evidence shows that additional reasoning can lead models to overthink, we ask: "Once a model has reached the correct answer, does further reasoning refine the solution, or deviate from it?" To study the dynamics after correctness, we introduce a prefix-level trajectory evaluation protocol grounded in reasoning sufficiency, defining the minimum reasoning budget required for a model to first generate the correct answer. This allows us to disentangle verbose overthinking, where additional reasoning is redundant but harmless, from harmful overthinking, where continued reasoning destabilizes an already-correct trajectory. Starting from multimodal benchmarks, we find that many instances considered reasoning-intensive require surprisingly little reasoning. Moreover, stopping at the first correct prefix improves accuracy over standard reasoning up to 21%, revealing that current models are limited not only by their ability to reason, but also by their inability to stop at the right time. Furthermore, while common efficiency strategies like early stopping substantially reduce verbose overthinking (up to 50%), they fail to mitigate harmful overthinking. Failure analysis reveals that correctness deviations are mainly driven by logical drift and visual reinterpretation. Finally, we show that our findings generalize to language-only reasoning benchmarks, highlighting harmful overthinking as a broader reliability risk. Code available at https://simonecaldarella.github.io/thinking-past-the-answer.

AI.tldr: 研究大型推理模型（LRMs）在得出正确答案后继续推理是否会是多余的甚至有害的。通过引入前缀级轨迹评估协议，发现在首次出现正确答案时停止推理反而能提高准确率高达21%，揭示了当前模型不仅缺乏推理能力，也缺乏适时停止的能力。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型通过增加测试时间计算来生成中间推理步骤以提升性能，但假设更长的推理总是有益的尚未得到充分验证。近期证据表明额外推理可能导致模型过度思考，因此需要研究：当模型已经得出正确答案后，进一步推理是在精炼解决方案还是让它偏离正确方向？
AI.method: 引入基于推理充足性的前缀级轨迹评估协议，定义模型首次生成正确答案所需的最小推理预算，从而区分冗余但无害的verbose overthinking和会破坏已正确轨迹的harmful overthinking。从多模态基准开始实验。
AI.result: 发现许多被认为是需要深度推理的任务实际上只需要很少的推理。在第一个正确前缀处停止比标准推理提高准确率高达21%。常见的效率策略如early stopping可以显著减少verbose overthinking（高达50%），但无法缓解harmful overthinking。正确性偏差主要由逻辑漂移和视觉重新解释驱动。这些发现在纯语言推理基准上也能泛化，突显harmful overthinking是更广泛的可靠性风险。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs的限制不仅在于推理能力不足，也在于无法在正确时机停止。过早停止可提升性能，有害过度思考是一个需要解决的可靠性问题，尤其在涉及逻辑推理和多模态理解的任务中。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM reasoning evaluation and "harmful overthinking" in large language models - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has nothing to do with video generation, 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, or any of the specified methods (Video Generation Models, VLMs for quality assessment, 3D Motion Generation). The application domain is AI/LLM research, not computer graphics or video-to-motion conversion.

title: Pathway-Structured Privileged Distillation for Deployable Computational Pathology
summary: Integrating transcriptomics and histopathology can improve cancer risk modelling, yet practical use is constrained by the limited availability of RNA profiling in routine settings. Here we introduce Mixture of Pathway Experts (MoPE), a knowledge-distillation framework that reframes multimodal learning as privileged distillation for histology-only inference. MoPE is motivated by the partial observability between RNA profiles and whole-slide images: histology can capture morphology-linked consequences of certain molecular programmes, but cannot be expected to reconstruct the full transcriptomic state. MoPE encodes RNA-derived pathways and transfers the molecular supervision to pathway-indexed pathology experts through memory-usage alignment. Across diverse public benchmarks and two independent breast cancer cohorts, MoPE consistently improved WSI-only inference performance relative to baseline methods. Pathway-usage analyses and human-audited visual inspection provide bounded inspection of model behaviour and candidate morphology-linked readouts. These results support pathway-structured privileged distillation as a promising route to using molecular information during training while preserving RNA-free inference.

AI.tldr: MoPE（Mixture of Pathway Experts）是一种知识蒸馏框架，通过将多模态学习重新表述为特权蒸馏，实现仅使用组织病理学图像进行癌症风险预测。该方法利用RNA衍生的通路知识，在训练时监督病理模型，从而在推理时无需RNA-seq数据。
AI.motivation: 整合转录组学和 组织病理学可以改善癌症风险建模，但常规临床实践中RNA分析难以获取。MoPE旨在解决这一矛盾：如何在训练时利用分子信息，而在推理时仅依赖病理切片。
AI.method: MoPE编码RNA衍生通路，将分子监督信息通过记忆使用对齐方式迁移到通路索引的病理专家模型。该框架将多模态学习重新表述为特权蒸馏问题，利用RNA-derived pathways作为特权信息训练 histology-only 模型。
AI.result: 在多个公共基准数据集和两个独立乳腺癌队列中，MoPE始终改善了WSI（即Whole-Slide Image，仅组织切片图像）推理性能，相较于基线方法获得提升。通路使用分析和人工审查的视觉检查提供了模型行为的边界 inspection。
AI.conclusion: 通路结构化的特权蒸馏是一种有前景的方法，可以在训练时利用分子信息，同时保持推理时无需RNA分析。这为克服常规临床实践中分子数据不可用的限制提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Research profile is in Computer Graphics focusing on video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, and cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. The paper is about computational pathology - medical image analysis for cancer risk prediction using histopathology images and RNA-derived pathway knowledge. These are entirely different fields: medical informatics/healthcare AI vs computer graphics. The pain points, methods (knowledge distillation for medical imaging vs video generation and motion synthesis), and application context have no meaningful overlap.

title: AUDITFLOW: Executable Symbolic Environments for Structured Financial Reporting Verification
summary: Structured financial audit verification is difficult for language-model agents because correctness depends on structured evidence rather than text alone. A model must link reported facts to taxonomy concepts, traverse calculation or dimensional relations, and recompute expected values before applying an audit rule. We propose AuditFlow, a graph-grounded multi-agent framework that separates adaptive search from deterministic verification. AuditFlow builds a symbolic environment from a static US-GAAP taxonomy graph and a dynamic XBRL filing graph, and exposes it through typed tools for fact retrieval, taxonomy traversal, numerical checking, and rule evaluation. Two junior auditors inspect each case from regulatory and evidentiary views, while a senior auditor resolves disagreements and can request further investigation. The final reports are fused through evidential aggregation to produce an audit verdict, expected value, evidence trail, and trustworthiness score. On a FinAuditing-derived FinMR sample, AuditFlow reaches 82.09% joint audit accuracy under GPT-5.5, outperforming the strongest baseline by 14.93 points. Removing deterministic checks drops accuracy to 17.91%, showing that the symbolic environment performs the verification step that the model cannot reliably replace.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AuditFlow，一个用于财务审计验证的图grounds多智能体框架，通过分离自适应搜索与确定性验证提升语言模型的审计准确性。
AI.motivation: 结构化财务审计验证对语言模型智能体困难，因为正确性依赖结构化证据而非文本。模型需将报告事实链接到taxonomy概念、遍历计算或维度关系、在应用审计规则前重新计算预期值。
AI.method: 提出AuditFlow图 grounded多智能体框架，分离自适应搜索与确定性验证。基于US-GAAP taxonomy构建符号环境，通过XBRL filing graph动态扩展，暴露typed tools用于事实检索、taxonomy遍历、数值检查和规则评估。采用双Junior Auditor多视角检查+Senior Auditor争议解决+证据融合的报告生成流程。
AI.result: 在FinAudiving-derived FinMR样本上，AuditFlow在GPT-5.5下达到82.09%的联合审计准确率，比最强基线高出14.93个百分点。去除确定性检查后准确率降至17.91%。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明确定性检查对准确率至关重要，去除后准确率降至17.91%，证明了符号环境在验证步骤中不可替代的作用。

relevance_reason: This paper is about financial auditing verification using multi-agent systems, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The application domain is finance/accounting, not video-to-motion generation or 3D motion synthesis. The methods (multi-agent frameworks, symbolic environments) have no connection to the required methods (Video Generation Models like Wanxiang/Seedance, VLMs, 3D Motion Generation Models). This is a completely different field with no relevance to the research profile.

title: Tiny Collaborative Inference for Occlusion-Robust Object Detection
summary: Small edge devices such as IoT surveillance nodes and search-and-rescue (SAR) platforms are increasingly expected to run computer vision locally. On ultra-low-end hardware, however, object detection is limited by available memory and compute, by communication costs when several devices cooperate, and by the loss of accuracy caused by occlusion. The work evaluates occlusion-robust object detection on devices with less than 1 MB SRAM by combining an MCUNet backbone, a YOLOv2 detection head, and TensorFlow Lite quantisation. We evaluate two collaborative inference strategies: feature-level fusion, which concatenates intermediate feature maps, and decision-level fusion via Weighted Boxes Fusion (WBF). Under the tested occlusion settings, WBF outperforms feature-level fusion and gives gains of up to +0.2736 mAP in asymmetric occlusion scenarios. Extending fusion to three views improves accuracy further (up to +0.3827 mAP) while adding communication overhead (approximately 1.3 KB per exchange). The hardware experiments start with a host-assisted USB-relay baseline and then move to a Wi-Fi peer-to-peer deployment on two Coral Dev Board Micro units, where WBF runs on-device and communication energy remains small relative to inference. In a representative 301.9 s autonomous session comprising 108 frames, fused output is observed on 61 frames compared with 47 for Board 2 alone, a frame-level coverage gain of +29.8%. We also include a small exploratory decentralised federated learning (DFL) feasibility note, but do not treat it as a main result because performance remains limited under non-iid local data. The results support decision-level fusion as a viable option for improving occlusion robustness in small-scale edge object detection, including host-free multi-board operation on ultra-low-end hardware.

AI.tldr: 在超低功耗边缘设备(<1MB SRAM)上实现鲁棒的目标检测，通过结合MCUNet、YOLOv2和TensorFlow Lite量化，并采用决策级融合(WBF)协同多设备视角提升遮挡场景下的目标检测精度。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备运行计算机视觉面临内存和算力限制、多设备协作通信开销、以及遮挡导致的精度损失问题，需要一种适合超低硬件规格的遮挡鲁棒目标检测方案。
AI.method: 1) 采用MCUNet作为骨干网络，YOLOv2作为检测头，TensorFlow Lite量化部署；2) 评估两种协作推理策略：特征级融合(拼接中间特征图)和决策级融合(WBF)；3) 在Coral Dev Board Micro上进行Wi-Fi点对点部署实验。
AI.result: WBF在非对称遮挡场景下优于特征级融合，最高获得+0.2736 mAP增益；三视角融合可进一步提升至+0.3827 mAP，通信开销约1.3KB/次；在301.9s自主会话中，融合输出覆盖61帧vs单板47帧，覆盖率提升29.8%。
AI.conclusion: 决策级融合是提升超低功耗边缘目标检测遮挡鲁棒性的可行方案，支持无主机的多板超低功耗硬件分布式协作运行。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant. It addresses edge device object detection for IoT/embedded systems using MCUNet and YOLOv2, which is a computer vision/embedded systems problem - NOT Computer Graphics. The research profile requires video-to-3D-motion generation (Computer Graphics), using methods like Video Generation Models (Wanxiang/Seedance) and VLMs. The application domain is completely different: object detection vs. 3D motion generation from video. The pain points and methods have no overlap whatsoever.

title: Solipsistic Superintelligence is Unlikely to be Cooperative
comment: 24 pages, 1 figure, Accepted at Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, 2026
summary: AI's central challenge is shifting from capability to coexistence. The dominant paradigm in AI research focuses on developing powerful agents that treat the world as an exogenous and stationary source of feedback. We contend that superintelligence, an extremely capable task solver, born out of such a solipsistic approach to AI design, is unlikely to be cooperative. Deploying AI systems induces endogenous non-stationarity, resulting in a train-test-deploy gap where historical distributions diverge from the deployment context. We refer to this as the self-undermining property of unilateral optimization. Closing this gap requires AI that participates in cooperation: the equilibrium-selection process through which multiple actors navigate their interdependence. We call for a non-solipsistic research paradigm that treats this interdependence as a core design principle rather than approaching cooperation as a task to solve. This entails building dynamic evaluation testbeds involving adaptive counterparties, treating institutions as design primitives, and preserving human agency as a structural feature of the systems we build.

AI.tldr: 论文提出AI研究范式需要从"孤立智能"转向"合作智能"，认为当前以开发强大但孤立的代理为中心的范式存在根本性缺陷——这种"自我削弱"特性导致训练与部署环境不匹配。解决方案是构建将相互依存作为核心设计原则的非孤立研究范式。
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究的主流范式是开发强大的智能体，将世界视为外生和静态的反馈来源。然而这种方法存在根本性问题：超级智能在这种"孤立主义"设计下不太可能具有合作性，因为部署AI系统会引入内生非平稳性，导致历史分布与部署上下文产生差距（即训练-测试-部署gap）。作者将此称为"单边优化的自我削弱特性"。
AI.method: 论文提出三项具体研究方向：(1) 构建包含自适应对手方的动态评估测试平台；(2) 将制度（institutions）视为设计原语；(3) 在系统中保留人类能动性作为结构性特征。核心是将合作视为equilibrium-selection过程，通过这一过程多个行为者导航其相互依存关系。
AI.result: 论文的核心贡献在于识别了当前AI范式的根本性缺陷——"自我削弱特性"，并指出解决训练-测试-部署差距需要AI参与合作——即作为equilibrium-selection过程而非作为待解决问题的任务。提出将相互依存作为核心设计原则而非事后考虑的"非孤立主义"研究范式。
AI.conclusion: AI的中心挑战正从能力转向共存。需要彻底转变研究范式：从将AI视为独立强大的问题解决者，转变为将AI视为参与复杂性 equilibrium-selection 的参与者，其中相互依存而非个体能力成为核心设计原则。这要求在构建系统时将人类能动性作为结构性特征保留。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI safety and alignment - specifically arguing for a "cooperative AI" paradigm shift rather than "solipsistic superintelligence." It discusses equilibrium-selection processes, institutional design, and addressing training-deployment gaps in AI systems. This has absolutely no connection to Computer Graphics or video-to-motion generation. The research profile explicitly asks for papers on cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, visual quality assessment, and specific methods like Seedance/Wanxiang video generation models and 3D motion generation. These are completely unrelated domains.

title: Don't Gamble, GAMBLe: An Analytical Framework for AI-Driven Research Systems
comment: Preprint. 21 pages (10 main, 11 appendix). 6 figures (2 in main, 4 in appendix)
summary: AI-Driven Research Systems (ADRS) -- systems coupling LLMs with automated evaluation to discover algorithms, proofs, and designs -- are being optimized and adopted across domains, but the tools to analyze them have not kept pace.
