This paper is about WiFi-based human activity recognition (using wireless signals to classify human movements), which is in the domain of ubiquitous/pervasive computing and sensor networks, NOT Computer Graphics. It has no connection to the research profile's focus on video-to-3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), or Visual Language Models for quality assessment. The application domain is entirely different - HAR from WiFi signals vs. generating 3D motion from video.

title: The Road Ahead in Autonomous Driving: The KITScenes Multimodal Dataset
summary: Existing autonomous driving datasets have enabled major progress, but fall short in sensor fidelity, map completeness, or geographic diversity. We present KITScenes Multimodal, a European dataset built around high-fidelity sensors and maps. Our fully synchronized sensor suite combines high-resolution global-shutter cameras, long-range lidar beyond 400m, 4D imaging radar, and redundant GNSS/INS localization. Our HD maps are, to our knowledge, the most complete of any sensor dataset, validated through autonomous driving trials on open-source software. For the first time in a public dataset, all driving-relevant traffic elements, such as traffic lights, are mapped in 3D to a reprojection-accurate level with full topological connectivity. Recorded in cities with irregular street layouts and mixed traffic modes, our dataset complements existing datasets by broadening the available geographic diversity. We also introduce four benchmarks, each advancing spatial learning for embodied AI: online HD map construction, long-range depth estimation, novel view synthesis, and end-to-end driving. Project page: https://kitscenes.com/

AI.tldr: KITScenes Multimodal是一个欧洲自动驾驶数据集，采用高分辨率传感器（摄像头、激光雷达、4D成像雷达）和高精度GNSS/INS定位，配合ToF深度估计和HD地图构建。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集在传感器精度、地图完整性和地理多样性方面存在不足，需要构建一个更高质量的数据集来推动空间学习研究。
AI.method: 数据集采用同步传感器套件，包括高分辨率全局快门摄像头、远距离激光雷达(>400m)、4D成像雷达和高精度GNSS/INS定位。HD地图经过实车 autonomous driving验证，涵盖交通元素并进行3D重建。
AI.result: 该数据集在四个任务上实现了benchmark:在线HD地图构建、远距离深度估计、新视图合成和端到端驾驶。数据录制于不规则街道布局和混合交通模式的城市环境中。
AI.conclusion: KITScenes Multimodal数据集通过高保真传感器、全面HD地图和独特地理多样性,为自动驾驶领域提供了新的研究基础,有潜力推进embodied AI的空间学习能力。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics: converting 2D video to 3D motion generation for character animation (video-to-motion synthesis). The paper is about autonomous driving datasets for self-driving vehicles - focusing on tasks like HD mapping, depth estimation, and driving scene perception. While both involve computer vision techniques, the end application is entirely different - one is for creative/content generation (motion synthesis), the other is for autonomous vehicle perception. No cross-modal feature alignment between video and motion for character animation is addressed.

title: Inducing Reasoning Primitives from Agent Traces
summary: ReAct-style LLM agents often rediscover the same reasoning routines across problems, yet leave those routines trapped in transient scratchpads. We introduce Reasoning Primitive Induction, a single-pass method that mines successful ReAct traces, clusters recurrent reasoning moves, and converts the most frequent moves into a compact library of typed pseudo-tools. Each pseudo-tool is specified by a natural-language docstring interpreted by an LLM at invocation time, and a standard ReAct loop composes these primitives at test time. The central result is that induced libraries outperform the very agent that generated their traces: by +44pp on RuleArena NBA (30 -> 74), +30pp on MuSR team allocation (38 -> 68), and +22pp on NatPlan meeting planning (7 -> 29). Across five comparable subtasks spanning narrative deduction, rule application, and constraint-satisfaction planning, a single fixed configuration improves over zero-shot Chain-of-Thought on every subtask, matches or surpasses expert-authored decompositions, and outperforms AWM at lower average inference cost.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为"推理原语归纳"的方法,从ReAct代理的轨迹中自动挖掘和提取可重用的推理模式,将其转换为伪工具库,在测试时通过标准ReAct循环组合使用。
AI.motivation: ReAct风格的LLM代理经常在不同问题上重复相同的推理步骤,但这些推理过程只存在于临时笔记中,无法被保留和复用。本文希望从成功的ReAct轨迹中提取常见的推理模式,建立可重用的推理库。
AI.method: 该方法包含三个步骤:(1)单次遍历挖掘成功的ReAct轨迹;(2)聚类分析找出反复出现的推理移动;(3)将最频繁的推理移动转换为带有自然语言文档说明的紧凑型伪工具库。推理原语由LLM在调用时解释的标准文档字符串指定,测试时通过标准ReAct循环组合这些原语。
AI.result: 诱导得到的推理库超越了生成这些轨迹的原始代理:RuleArena NBA上提升44个百分点(30→74),MuSR团队分配任务上提升30个百分点(38→68),NatPlan会议规划任务上提升22个百分点(7→29)。在五个可比对的子任务上,单一固定配置始终优于零样本思维链,与专家编写的分解方法相当或超越,且推理成本低于AWM。
AI.conclusion: 从成功代理轨迹中自动诱导的推理原语库可以显著超越原代理的性能,并且能够匹配或超越人类专家设计的任务分解方法,为构建更高效、可复用的LLM推理代理提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. The paper is about LLM agent reasoning extraction (NLP/AI), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically video-to-3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment, and visual quality assessment. There is no overlap in methods or applications.

title: Hand Trajectory Fusion for Egocentric Natural Language Query Grounding
comment: Accepted for the poster session at the Egocentric Vision (EgoVis) Workshop in Conjunction with CVPR 2026
summary: Egocentric Natural Language Query (NLQ) grounding asks a model to localize, in a long first-person video, the temporal interval that answers a free-form text query. Existing methods fuse video appearance with the query but ignore hand motion, despite the fact that roughly 41% of Ego4D NLQ queries are answered at a moment of hand--object manipulation or their immediate outcomes.We propose a hand-trajectory encoder for converting a sequence of hand skeletons into highly-semantic hand kinematic features, which are then aligned and combined with pretrained video--text features through a cross-attention fusion strategy with adaptive gating. On the Ego4D NLQ v2 validation split, the clearest gains appear for Hand-Object Interaction queries (+2.54 R1@IoU=0.3) and Quantity/State queries (+4.32 R1@IoU=0.3), indicating that hand trajectory provides grounding cues beyond appearance alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于手部轨迹编码器的自我中心自然语言查询( NLQ )接地方法，通过将手部骨骼序列转换为运动学特征，并与视频-文本特征进行跨注意力融合 gated ，在 Ego4D NLQ 数据集上取得显著提升，尤其在手-物体交互和数量/状态查询任务上。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅融合视频外观与查询文本，忽略了手部运动信息。实际上 Ego4D NLQ 中约 41% 的查询涉及手-物体操作或其即时结果，手部轨迹能提供超越纯外观的定位线索。
AI.method: 提出手部轨迹编码器，将连续手部骨骼序列编码为高语义手部运动学特征；通过跨注意力融合策略并结合自适应门控机制，将手部特征与预训练视频-文本特征对齐并组合。
AI.result: 在 Ego4D NLQ v2 验证集上，手-物体交互查询的 R1@IoU=0.3 提升 +2.54，数量/状态查询提升 +4.32，表明手部轨迹提供了超越外观的定位线索。
AI.conclusion: 引入手部轨迹信息可有效补充视觉外观特征的不足，为自我中心视频中的自然语言查询定位提供更全面的上下文理解。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses egocentric natural language query grounding (NLP-based spatial localization), which is a computer vision/multimodal learning task completely different from Computer Graphics' 3D motion generation. Although it mentions hand trajectory/motion features, it's about interpreting hand movements for query answering, not generating 3D character motions. The application domain is fundamentally different: video understanding vs video-to-motion synthesis.

title: Towards Compact Autonomous Driving Perception with Balanced Learning and Multi-sensor Fusion
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems. https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9712213
summary: We present a novel compact deep multi-task learning model to handle various autonomous driving perception tasks in one forward pass. The model performs multiple views of semantic segmentation, depth estimation, light detection and ranging (LiDAR) segmentation, and bird's eye view projection simultaneously without being supported by other models. We also provide an adaptive loss weighting algorithm to tackle the imbalanced learning issue that occurred due to plenty of given tasks. Through data pre-processing and intermediate sensor fusion techniques, the model can process and combine multiple input modalities retrieved from RGB cameras, dynamic vision sensors (DVS), and LiDAR placed at several positions on the ego vehicle. Therefore, a better understanding of a dynamically changing environment can be achieved. Based on the ablation study, the model variant trained with our proposed method achieves a better performance. Furthermore, a comparative study is also conducted to clarify its performance and effectiveness against the combination of some recent models. As a result, our model maintains better performance even with much fewer parameters. Hence, the model can inference faster with less GPU memory utilization. Moreover, the result tends to be consistent in 3 different CARLA simulation datasets and 1 real-world nuScenes-lidarseg dataset. To support future research, we share codes and other files publicly at https://github.com/oskarnatan/compact-perception.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种紧凑的深度多任务学习模型，可以在单次前向传播中同时处理多种自动驾驶感知任务，包括语义分割、深度估计、激光雷达分割和鸟瞰视图投影。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要同时处理多个感知任务，现有方法通常依赖多个独立模型，导致计算资源消耗大且效率低下。同时面临多任务学习中任务不平衡学习的挑战。
AI.method: 提出自适应损失加权算法解决任务不平衡问题；采用数据预处理和中间传感器融合技术处理来自RGB相机、动态视觉传感器(DVS)和激光雷达的多种输入模态。
AI.result: 模型变体在 ablation study 中表现更好，与近期模型组合相比保持更优性能，且参数更少推理更快、GPU内存占用更低。在3个CARLA仿真数据集和1个真实nuScenes-lidarseg数据集上结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 该紧凑多任务学习模型能够高效处理自动驾驶多种感知任务，在保持较好性能的同时显著降低了计算资源需求，适用于资源受限的自动驾驶场景。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving perception (multi-task learning for semantic segmentation, depth estimation, LiDAR segmentation, BEV projection), which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics and video-to-motion generation. Although both involve multi-modal inputs and deep learning, this paper addresses autonomous driving scene understanding rather than 2D video to 3D motion conversion, cross-modal alignment for motion generation, or any computer graphics techniques. The pain points, methods, and target applications are entirely unrelated.

title: TriEval: A Resource-Efficient Pipeline for LLM Bias, Toxicity, and Truthfulness Assessment
summary: LLMs have evolved from basic chatbots to the backbone of the AI ecosystem, now widely used in healthcare, schools, and government services. The domain-wide adoption of LLMs necessitates continuous evaluation to ensure their safety and fairness. Common issues encountered after deploying LLMs include inconsistent outputs and hallucinations of incorrect information. Although numerous LLM evaluation tools exist, most are limited to testing a single parameter at a time or require massive computational resources that are not accessible to most researchers. TriEval addresses these challenges by evaluating LLM outputs across multiple parameters, including bias, toxicity, and truthfulness together, while minimizing computing resources. The pipeline is compatible with both open- and closed-source models and runs on a standard laptop without a GPU cluster. TriEval has been tested on four models: Llama 3 8B, Mistral 7B, Gemma 2 9B, and Claude Haiku. The results show clear differences between open-source and closed-source models, especially in terms of toxicity and truthfulness. TriEval is being released as open source to enable broader access for researchers with limited computational resources.

AI.tldr: TriEval是一个在标准笔记本上运行的开源LLM评估工具，可同时评估偏见、毒性和真实性等多个参数，兼容开源和闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM评估工具存在局限性，多数仅能测试单一参数或需要大量计算资源。部署后的LLM常出现输出不一致和幻觉等问题，亟需全面评估以确保其安全性和公平性。
AI.method: 该工具已在四种模型上进行测试：Llama 3 8B、Mistral 7B、Gemma 2 9B和Claude Haiku，结果显示开源模型和闭源模型之间存在明显差异，尤其在毒性和真实性方面。
AI.result: 该工具作为开源软件发布，旨在让计算资源有限的研究人员也能获得更广泛的访问权限。
AI.conclusion: 该工具作为开源发布，降低了LLM评估的门槛，使更多研究人员能够参与LLM的安全性和公平性评估工作。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM evaluation (bias, toxicity, truthfulness assessment) - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It deals with NLP model safety evaluation, while the research profile focuses on video-to-motion conversion and 3D motion generation. The application domains are entirely different - no cross-modal video-motion alignment, no temporal consistency for video-to-motion, no quality control for visual guidance features. This is an NLP/AI safety paper, not a computer graphics paper.

title: MUSE: A Unified Agentic Harness for MLLMs
summary: Despite rapid progress, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still fail on tasks that humans solve effortlessly, such as navigating a grid maze from a screenshot or selecting the correct puzzle piece. Rather than retraining the model, we ask a complementary question: how much capability can be elicited from a frozen MLLM purely by improving the execution scaffold around it? We introduce MUSE, a multimodal unified structured execution harness that wraps any off-the-shelf MLLM with composable modules for task representation, visual processing, perception tool use, structured parsing, deterministic verification, and verifier-guided repair, without any model retraining. We evaluate MUSE across diverse benchmarks spanning visual spatial planning, visual perception, multimodal reasoning, and fine-grained visual discrimination, using multiple state-of-the-art MLLMs. MUSE delivers consistent gains over the bare model in all settings, with the largest jumps on challenging instances. Further analysis reveals that many MLLM failures arise from harness-level shortcomings rather than fundamental model deficits, and can be addressed through verifier-guided repair without touching the model. These findings highlight the agentic multimodal harness as a critical yet underexplored design dimension, offering an orthogonal avenue for improving MLLMs beyond model-centric optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MUSE框架，通过改进冻结的多模态大语言模型(MLLM)的外围执行脚手架而非重新训练模型，来提升模型在视觉空间规划、视觉感知、多模态推理和细粒度视觉辨识等任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在人类轻松解决的任务（如网格迷宫导航、拼图块选择）上仍存在失败，作者探讨能否通过改进执行脚手架来激发冻结模型的潜在能力，而非对模型进行重训练。
AI.method: 提出MUSE（多模态统一结构化执行 harness），包含可组合模块：任务表示、视觉处理、感知工具使用、结构化解析、确定性验证器和验证器引导的修复。无需任何模型重训练即可包装任意的现成MLLM。
AI.result: MUSE在多种 benchmarks 上相比裸模型实现一致的性能提升，在挑战性最大的实例上提升幅度最显著。分析表明许多MLLM失败源于脚手架层面的缺陷而非模型本身的基础不足，可以通过验证器引导的修复来解决。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了代理性多模态脚手架是一个关键但未被充分探索的设计维度，为超越以模型为中心的优化提供了正交路径。未来应重视脚手架设计作为提升MLLM能力的有效途径。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses general multimodal LLM reasoning (maze navigation, jigsaw tasks) rather than Computer Graphics-specific applications like video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal alignment between video and motion. While it mentions "visual processing" and "perceptual tool use," these are abstract visual reasoning tasks, not the concrete video graphics and motion synthesis domain in the research profile. The paper also doesn't directly relate to video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), temporal consistency in video-to-motion, or semantic alignment between text prompts and 3D motion output—which are the core pain points mentioned.

title: RelGT-AC: A Relational Graph Transformer for Autocomplete Tasks in Relational Databases
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures. Code and model checkpoints available at https://github.com/jiangdmv/graph-transformer
summary: Relational databases underpin modern enterprise, scientific, and healthcare systems, yet predictive machine learning on such data remains challenging due to their multi-table, heterogeneous, and temporal structure. Relational Deep Learning (RDL) addresses this by representing databases as heterogeneous graphs and applying graph neural networks (GNNs) directly. RelBench v2 recently introduced autocomplete tasks -- a practically motivated task type where the goal is to predict an existing column value from relational context, analogous to an intelligent form-filling assistant. We propose RelGT-AC (Relational Graph Transformer for Autocomplete), extending the RelGT architecture with three targeted contributions: (1) a column masking strategy that prevents trivial solutions by masking the target column during subgraph encoding; (2) a unified task head supporting binary classification, multiclass classification, and regression autocomplete tasks within a single model; and (3) a TF-IDF text encoder that automatically detects and encodes free-text columns, recovering strong lexical signal that categorical encoders discard. Across 7 tasks spanning 3 RelBench v2 datasets (rel-trial, rel-f1, rel-stack), RelGT-AC outperforms the GraphSAGE baseline on all 3 regression autocomplete tasks and achieves up to +10 AUROC points on text-heavy eligibility tasks via the TF-IDF encoder.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RelGT-AC（面向自动填充任务的 Relational Graph Transformer），通过扩展 RelGT 架构解决关系数据库预测问题。核心贡献包括：(1) 列掩码策略防止子图编码时的trivial解；(2) 统一任务头支持二分类/多分类/回归三种自动填充任务；(3) TF-IDF文本编码器自动检测并编码自由文本列。在RelBench v2的3个数据集( rel-trial, rel-f1, rel-stack)共7个任务上验证，RelGT-AC在所有回归任务上超越GraphSAGE基线，并在文本密集型 eligibility任务上获得+10 AUROC提升。
AI.motivation: 关系数据库是企业、科学和医疗系统的核心，但因其多表、异构和时序结构，在其上进行预测性机器学习仍有挑战。RelBench v2引入autocomplete任务——根据关系上下文预测现有列值，类似于智能表单填写助手，这是一项实用且新穎的任务类型。
AI.method: RelGT-AC提出三项针对性改进：(1) 列掩码策略——在子图编码阶段对目标列进行掩码，防止模型学习到trivial捷径解；(2) 统一任务头——单一模型框架内支持二分类、多分类和回归三类自动填充任务；(3) TF-IDF文本编码器——自动检测free-text列并用TF-IDF方法编码，充分挖掘类别编码器会丢失的词汇信号。
AI.result: 实验覆盖7个任务、3个RelBench v2数据集(rel-trial, rel-f1, rel-stack)。RelGT-AC在全部3个回归自动填充任务上超越GraphSAGE基线，且在text-heavy eligibility任务上通过TF-IDF encoder获得最高+10 AUROC的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: RelGT-AC通过列掩码、统一任务头和TF-IDF文本编码三项创新，有效解决了关系数据库自动填充任务的核心挑战。实验结果表明该方法在回归任务和文本密集型任务上均显著优于基线，为实际关系数据预测提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about relational database autocomplete prediction tasks using Graph Transformers and TF-IDF encoding - it has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, video-to-motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile (video generation models, VLMs, 3D motion generation). The application domain is entirely different: database systems/data science vs computer graphics/motion synthesis.

title: FCUS-rPPG: A Fast-Converging Unsupervised Framework for Remote Photoplethysmography via Gradient Oscillation Suppression
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact extraction of blood volume pulse (BVP) signals using consumer-grade cameras. Recent unsupervised rPPG methods learn BVP representations without requiring ground-truth physiological annotations, yet their optimization is often hindered by noisy and unstable gradients, resulting in slow convergence and limited cross-domain generalization. In this paper, we propose FCUS-rPPG, a fast-converging unsupervised rPPG framework with strong generalization capability. Motivated by the observation that BVP representations exhibit both multi-spectral covariation and low-dimensional manifold structure, we design a spectrally shared backbone that facilitates BVP feature disentanglement while improving optimization efficiency. To jointly enhance convergence stability and generalization performance, we further develop a unified optimization framework operating at the gradient, loss-landscape, and feature-representation levels. Specifically, a post-verification masking mechanism filters out misleading gradients according to the weak-amplitude physiological prior of BVP signals; a perturbation-based loss landscape smoothing strategy steers optimization toward more generalizable flat minima; and a noise-aware null-space regularization constrains feature updates to the orthogonal complement of the noise subspace, thereby mitigating noise-induced representation drift. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that FCUS-rPPG requires only one training epoch, whereas existing methods typically require tens to hundreds of epochs. Notably, FCUS-rPPG consistently achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in cross-dataset evaluations. This study provides an efficient and robust solution to the real-world deployment of unsupervised rPPG. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/JiaJieLee/FCUS-rPPG.

AI.tldr: FCUS-rPPG是一种快速收敛的无监督远程光电容积脉搏波(rPPG)框架，通过多光谱特征解耦、梯度掩码验证、损失景观平滑和噪声感知空域正则化等技术实现在仅1个训练轮次内完成训练，并在跨数据集评估中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督rPPG方法面临梯度噪声和不稳定问题，导致收敛缓慢且跨域泛化能力有限，需要大量训练轮次（数十到数百）才能达到较好效果。
AI.method: 提出三大核心技术创新：1）光谱共享骨干网络促进BVP特征解耦；2）后验证掩码机制基于弱振幅生理先验过滤误导梯度；3）基于扰动的损失景观平滑策略引导优化至更泛化的平坦极小值；4）噪声感知空域正则化将特征更新约束至噪声子空间的正交补空间。
AI.result: 在5个数据集上实验表明：仅需1个训练轮次即可完成训练（现有方法通常需要数十到数百轮）；在跨数据集评估中始终保持最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: FCUS-rPPG为无监督rPPG的实际部署提供了一种高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. This paper is about remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) - measuring heart rate/pulse signals from video for medical/biomedical purposes. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focusing on 3D motion generation from video, cross-modal alignment between video and motion, and video generation models. Despite both dealing with video analysis, they are in completely different fields: biomedical signal processing vs. computer graphics/motion generation. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, quality control for motion generation, semantic alignment with text prompts).

title: ToolGate: Token-Efficient Pre-Call Control for Tool-Augmented Vision-Language Agents
summary: Tool-augmented vision-language agents can acquire external perceptual evidence through OCR, detection, segmentation, and other tools, but executing every proposed tool call is costly and sometimes unnecessary. We study the pre-call control problem: after a ReAct-style VLM agent proposes a perceptual tool call, should the call be executed, or skipped before its output enters the context? Across five benchmarks, we find that the baseline agent exhibits poor local selectivity: helpful and harmful calls occur at similar rates (11.8% vs. 9.9%), while most calls do not change the immediate forced-answer prediction. We introduce ToolGate, a lightweight external controller that predicts execute/skip decisions from trajectory text and simple structural features. Across two Qwen3-VL backbones, ToolGate reduces token cost to 64-69% of the unrestricted ReAct baseline while preserving average accuracy in cross-domain settings. With matched-domain trajectory training on Qwen3-VL-30B, it further improves average accuracy by 1.65 points. These results show that tool-augmented VLM agents benefit not only from better perceptual tools, but also from explicit control over when tool outputs are worth paying for.

AI.tldr: ToolGate是一种轻量级外部控制器，解决视觉语言模型代理的预调用控制问题，决定是否执行或跳过感知工具调用。在保持精度的同时，将token成本降低至64-69%。
AI.motivation: 工具增强的VLM代理可以调用OCR、检测、分割等外部感知工具，但执行每个工具调用代价高昂且有时不必要。当前ReAct风格的VLM代理在本地选择性上表现不佳：有益和有害调用发生率相似（11.8% vs 9.9%），大多数调用不会改变即时强制回答预测。因此需要研究预调用控制问题：在代理提出感知工具调用后，是否应该执行该调用，还是在输出进入上下文前直接跳过。
AI.method: 引入ToolGate，一个轻量级外部控制器，从轨迹文本和简单结构特征预测执行/跳过决策。采用五个基准测试评估，在两个Qwen3-VL backbone上进行跨域训练，并在Qwen3-VL-30B上进行匹配域轨迹训练。
AI.result: 基线代理表现出较差的本地选择性：有益调用和有害调用发生率相近（11.8% vs 9.9%），大多数调用不会改变即时强制回答预测。ToolGate将token成本降低至无限制ReAct基线的64-69%，同时在跨域设置中保持平均精度。通过在Qwen3-VL-30B上进行匹配域轨迹训练，进一步提高平均精度1.65个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 工具增强的VLM代理不仅受益于更好的感知工具，还受益于对工具输出是否值得付费的显式控制。ToolGate证明了一种有效的轻量级方法来实现这种控制，在成本和精度之间取得良好平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses a completely different application domain. It focuses on VLM agent tooling efficiency (deciding when to execute OCR/detection/segmentation tools in LLM agents) - which falls under AI agents/inference optimization, not Computer Graphics. While both fields mention "Visual Language Models," the research profile is specifically about video-to-3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment, and temporal consistency in motion synthesis. ToolGate is about reducing unnecessary tool calls in multimodal agents - there's no mention of video, motion generation, computer graphics, or any relevant application to the research profile's pain points.

title: ROBUST-WT: Robust Uncertainty-aware Segmentation Transform via Whitening and Training Enhancements
summary: Generalized segmentation of medical images prevents performance degradation when different imaging devices and clinical protocols are used across multiple domains. The Whitening Transform-based Probabilistic Shape Regularization Extractor (WT-PSE), published in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging in 2024, addresses this challenge by employing feature decorrelation and Wasserstein distance-based knowledge distillation to achieve robust cross-domain segmentation. This study systematically examines improvements to the WT-PSE learning framework. Four limitations in the original implementation are identified: limited training augmentations that fail to simulate real scanner variations, reliance on per-pixel binary cross-entropy loss that is sensitive to edge noise, the absence of a scheduled loss weighting strategy that may destabilize early training, and the lack of ablation switches for controlled scientific comparison. To address these issues, we propose four enhancements: (1) domain-adaptive augmentation including random erasing, gamma correction, and salt-and-pepper noise; (2) a hybrid BCE and Dice loss function for improved edge-aware segmentation under noisy conditions; (3) a curriculum-based Dice weight scheduling strategy; and (4) command-line control flags for systematic ablation studies. Experiments on the fundus optic disc segmentation benchmark demonstrate that the improved pipeline achieves a final epoch optic-disc Dice score of 0.956 and an ASD score of 13.31, outperforming the baseline epoch-5 Dice score of 0.939. These results indicate that training-level improvements can provide consistent performance gains without modifying the underlying WT-PSE architecture.

AI.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中跨域泛化难题，提出对WT-PSE框架的四项训练级改进：域适应数据增强、混合BCE+Dice损失、课程学习Dice权重调度及 ablation控制开关。在视盘分割数据集上最终Dice达0.956，ASD为13.31。
AI.motivation: 现有WT-PSE存在四大局限：训练增强不足以模拟真实扫描器变化、二元交叉熵损失对边缘噪声敏感、缺乏scheduled loss权重策略导致训练不稳定、缺少ablation开关影响科学对比。通过改进训练流程而非修改核心架构实现跨域分割性能提升。
AI.method: 提出四项增强：(1)域适应增强含随机擦除、gamma校正、盐椒噪声模拟设备差异；(2)混合BCE和Dice损失函数实现边缘感知分割抗噪；(3)课程学习Dice权重调度策略改善早期训练稳定性；(4)命令行ablation控制标志支持系统化消融研究。
AI.result: 在眼底视盘分割基准数据集上，改进pipeline最终epoch Dice得分0.956，ASD得分13.31，相较于基线epoch-5 Dice得分0.939有显著提升。表明无需修改WT-PSRE底层架构即可获得持续性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 通过训练流程优化而非架构修改可有效提升跨域医学图像分割性能，域适应增强、混合损失函数及课程学习调度是关键改进措施。该方法为其他医学影像任务的鲁棒性提升提供了可迁移的改进范式。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical image segmentation (optic disc segmentation) for cross-domain generalization in medical imaging. The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics - it has nothing to do with video-to-motion generation, 3D motion synthesis, or cross-modal alignment between video and motion representations. The methods (medical image segmentation, BCE+Dice loss, domain adaptation augmentation) are entirely unrelated to the research profile's methods (Video Generation Models, VLM for quality assessment, 3D Motion Generation Models). This is a medical imaging/computer vision paper that does not address any of the specified pain points or fall within the Computer Graphics field.

title: SkillDAG: Self-Evolving Typed Skill Graphs for LLM Skill Selection at Scale
summary: As LLM agents adopt large skill libraries, selecting the right subset becomes a structural problem rather than a similarity-matching one: skills depend on, conflict with, specialize, or duplicate one another, a structure invisible to both full enumeration and embedding similarity. We present SkillDAG, which models inter-skill relationships as a typed directed graph and exposes it to an LLM agent as an inference-time, agent-callable structural retrieval interface, queried and evolved during execution rather than baked into a fixed retrieval pipeline: each search returns vector matches, typed-edge neighbors, and conflict signals, and a propose-then-commit protocol lets the agent register execution-backed edges so the graph accumulates structure across episodes. On ALFWorld and SkillsBench with MiniMax-M2.7, SkillDAG reaches 67.1% success and 27.3% reward, exceeding the strongest reported Graph-of-Skills baseline by +12.8 and +8.6 points; the advantage ports to gpt-5.2-codex, and intrinsic SkillsBench Ret@K rises from 65.5 to 78.2 under matched queries. These gains trace to isolable mechanisms: candidate ranking that stays robust as the pool grows 10x where a fixed seeding-diffusion pipeline degrades, and set-monotone online edits that enlarge ground-truth recall without evicting prior hits.

AI.tldr: SkillDAG是一种将技能间关系建模为类型化有向图的系统，为LLM智能体提供推理时可调用的结构化检索接口，支持向量匹配、类型边邻居和冲突信号搜索，并通过提议-提交协议允许智能体注册执行支持的边，使图在执行过程中累积结构。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体采用大型技能库，选择正确的技能子集成为结构性问题而非相似度匹配问题：技能之间存在依赖、冲突、特化或重复关系，这种结构对全枚举和嵌入相似度均不可见。
AI.method: 将技能间关系建模为类型化有向图，作为推理时可调用的结构化检索接口，每次搜索返回向量匹配、类型边邻居和冲突信号，并使用提议-提交协议让智能体注册执行支持的边，使图跨episode累积结构。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和SkillsBench上，SkillDAG达到67.1%成功率和27.3%奖励，比最强Graph-of-Skills基线分别提升+12.8和+8.6点；优势迁移到gpt-5.2-codex，SkillsBench内在Ret@K从65.5升至78.2。候选排名在池增长10x时保持鲁棒，而固定seeding-diffusion管道退化；集合单调在线编辑扩大真值召回而不驱逐先前命中。
AI.conclusion: SkillDAG通过结构化技能关系建模和动态图更新机制，有效解决大规模技能库的选择问题，其可隔离机制包括随池增长的鲁棒候选排名和无驱逐的集合单调在线编辑，为LLM智能体的技能选择提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM skill selection and agent orchestration using graph-based structured retrieval interfaces - entirely in the AI/NLP domain. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from videos, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), and visual quality assessment. There is no application domain overlap whatsoever - they are completely different research fields.

title: TGV-KV: Text-Grounded KV Eviction for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) inherit the auto-regressive generation paradigm and cache the keys and values (KV) of all previous tokens to accelerate inference, resulting in memory consumption that scales linearly with context length. This issue is particularly pronounced in VLMs due to substantial redundancy in the visual modality. Although KV cache eviction approaches can effectively reduce inference memory, they often incur significant performance degradation in VLMs, as most are designed for language models and overlook the inherent gap between text and vision. By systematically analyzing the modality gap in VLMs in this work, we argue that the importance of visual information should be grounded in textual guidance and accordingly propose a Text-Grounded KV Eviction method for VLMs (TGV-KV). TGV-KV comprises three submodules: (1) Text-Vision Budgeting (TVB) assigns budget to each layer based on the mutual information interaction. (2) Text-Weighted Ranking (TWR) assesses the priority of text and ranks vision importance based on weighted text-image attention. (3) Text-Prioritised Retention (TPR) policy strategically preserves text KV to avoid acute information loss. We evaluate TGV-KV across five models with different sizes and architectures, showing that TGV-KV preserves 99.2% full-KV accuracy on the VizWiz-VQA task with LLaVA-NeXT and boosts end-to-end throughput by 52.6% with an extreme retention budget of 5%. Code is available at https://github.com/Danielement321/TGV-KV.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TGV-KV方法解决视觉语言模型(VLM)中KV缓存内存开销过大的问题。通过利用文本指导来评估视觉信息的重要性，结合三个子模块(TVB、TWR、TPR)进行高效的KV缓存淘汰。在LLaVA-NeXT上实现99.2%精度保持的同时，将吞吐量提升52.6%。
AI.motivation: VLM采用自回归生成范式，会缓存所有先前token的KV以加速推理，导致内存消耗随上下文长度线性增长。视觉模态存在大量冗余，现有的KV缓存淘汰方法主要针对语言模型设计，忽视了文本与视觉之间的固有差距，在VLM上往往导致显著的性能下降。
AI.method: 提出文本导向的KV缓存淘汰方法TGV-KV，包含三个子模块：(1)文本-视觉预算分配(TVB)基于互信息交互为每层分配预算；(2)文本加权排序(TWR)基于加权文本-图像注意力评估文本优先级并排序视觉重要性；(3)文本优先保留(TPR)策略性地保留文本KV以避免关键信息损失。
AI.result: 在5个不同规模和架构的模型上评估，TGV-KV在VizWiz-VQA任务上使用LLaVA-NeXT可保留99.2%的完整KV精度，在5%的极端保留预算下将端到端吞吐量提升52.6%。
AI.conclusion: TGV-KV通过充分利用文本与视觉之间的模态差距，结合文本指导来评估视觉信息的重要性，有效解决了VLM中KV缓存内存开销与性能之间的权衡问题，为多模态大模型的高效推理提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on KV cache memory optimization for Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in general VQA tasks - an LLM efficiency/modelling problem, not Computer Graphics. While the research profile mentions using VLMs for quality assessment in video-to-motion generation, this paper only addresses computational efficiency (memory reduction, throughput improvement) for VLMs, not any aspect of video processing, 3D motion generation, or quality assessment. The application domain is completely misaligned - this is systems/HPC work focused on inference optimization, not computer graphics or cross-modal video-to-motion generation.

title: CORE: Conflict-Oriented Reasoning for General Multimodal Manipulation Detection
summary: The rapid rise of generative AI has made multimodal fake news increasingly realistic and pervasive, posing severe threats to public trust and social stability. Existing detection methods rely heavily on manipulation-specific models and large-scale labeled data, resulting in poor generalization to emerging manipulation types. We observed that the essence of manipulated misinformation lies in its intrinsic conflicts, \textbf{i.e.,} semantic or physical inconsistencies either across modalities or with common world knowledge. Inspired by this observation, we propose \textbf{C}onflict-\textbf{O}riented \textbf{RE}asoning (\textbf{CORE}) framework, an effective paradigm that learns to endows multimodal large language models (MLLMs) with explicit conflict-capturing capability. To this end, CORE first constructs the Conflict Attribution Corpus (CAC) with fine-grained annotations of conflict factors and sources, providing essential data support for subsequent conflict perception training. By performing conflict-oriented representation enhancement and reasoning based on CAC, CORE achieves robust and generalizable conflict detection, effectively and rapidly adapting to unseen manipulation types with a few samples or in even zero-shot settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CORE surpasses state-of-the-art models. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/shen8424/CORE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORE框架，通过检测多模态假新闻中的内在冲突来实现 robust 的假新闻检测。该方法创新性地构建了冲突归因语料库(CAC)，并赋予多模态大语言模型显式捕获冲突的能力，能够在少样本或零样本设置下快速适应新出现的操纵类型。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI使得多模态假新闻越来越逼真和普遍，对公众信任和社会稳定造成严重威胁。现有检测方法依赖特定Manipulation模型和大规模标注数据，对新出现的操纵类型泛化能力差。作者观察到操纵的假新闻本质在于存在语义或物理上的内在冲突。
AI.method: 提出CORE框架，包含三个核心部分：1)构建带有细粒度注释的冲突归因语料库(CAC)，提供冲突因素和来源的标注；2)基于CAC进行冲突导向的表示增强和推理训练；3)实现对未见操纵类型的少样本或零样本适应。
AI.result: 实验表明CORE框架性能超越了当前的state-of-the-art模型。
AI.conclusion: CORE框架通过利用多模态内容中的内在冲突信息，实现了有效且通用的多模态假新闻检测，能够快速适应新的操纵类型，不需要大规模特定领域的标注数据，具有良好的泛化性和实用性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about multimodal fake news detection (media forensics/NLP domain), not Computer Graphics or video-to-motion conversion. While it uses multimodal models, the application domain is entirely different - it's about detecting manipulated fake news content, not about generating 3D motion from video or cross-modal alignment in computer graphics. The research profile targets video-to-motion generation (animation/graphics), while this paper focuses on misinformation detection. No overlap in application domain, pain points, or intended use case.

title: Hierarchical Federated Learning with Dynamic Clustering and Adaptive Regularization for Robust Infrastructure Inspection
summary: The deployment of data-driven computer vision models for structural health monitoring (SHM) is heavily constrained by the data silo dilemma due to stringent privacy and security regulations. While federated learning (FL) offers a privacy-preserving collaborative alternative, its application to nationwide infrastructure networks is severely hindered by the challenge of ``double heterogeneity'': macro-level physical divergence across disparate structural types and micro-level statistical imbalances within local datasets. To overcome this challenge, this paper proposes a novel hierarchical federated learning framework. The framework orchestrates a synergistic two-tier optimization strategy. At the macro-level, a dynamic gradient-based clustering mechanism autonomously aggregates distributed clients into specialized expert groups based on their structural degradation trajectories, circumventing the need for prior geographical metadata. Concurrently, at the micro-level, an intra-cluster Dynamic Region-Adaptive Proximal Regularization (DRAPR) module computes a real-time statistical Non-IID Intensity Score for each client. By adaptively modulating a proximal penalty based on local label skewness and gradient divergence, DRAPR effectively calibrates local updates, mitigates client drift, and prevents the catastrophic forgetting of minority damage classes. Comprehensive evaluations on a large-scale, real-world structural inspection dataset demonstrate that the hierarchical integration of macro-clustering and micro-regularization successfully neutralizes dual-level heterogeneity, yielding highly robust and specialized diagnostic models for complex infrastructure inspection.

AI.tldr: 针对结构健康监测中的双重异构性问题，提出分层联邦学习框架，结合宏观动态聚类和微观区域自适应正则化，实现跨区域基础设施网络的稳健诊断。
AI.motivation: 数据孤岛困境限制了数据驱动SHM模型的部署；联邦学习虽提供隐私保护方案，但面临双重异构性挑战——宏观层面结构类型物理差异，微观层面本地数据集统计不平衡。
AI.method: 提出分层联邦学习框架，采用两层级优化：1)宏观层面动态梯度聚类，基于结构退化轨迹自动聚合客户端为专家组；2)微观层面DRAPR模块，计算非IID强度分数，自适应调节近端惩罚以缓解客户漂移和灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 宏观聚类和微观正则化的分层集成成功中和双层异构性，产生高度健壮和专业的复杂基础设施诊断模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决跨区域基础设施网络中双重异构性问题，为全国性结构健康监测提供可行的隐私保护协作学习方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about infrastructure structural health monitoring using federated learning, which is Civil Engineering. The research profile requires Computer Graphics focused on video-to-motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. There is zero application domain match: infrastructure inspection vs. 3D motion generation from video. The methods (hierarchical federated learning, dynamic clustering for SHM) are entirely different from required methods (video generation models like Seedance, VLMs, 3D motion generation models). Different field entirely.

title: DELTAMEM: Incremental Experience Memory for LLM Agents via Residual Trees
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents increasingly rely on memory to learn from experiences over continual interactions. However, storing experiences as independent, flat units leads to substantial redundancy and retrieval conflicts, as similar episodes repeat overlapping content and subtle scene variations cause retrieved memories to offer contradictory guidance. To address this, we introduce residual experience, positing that newly acquired experience is often an incremental variation of existing knowledge. We propose DeltaMem, a framework that organizes experience memory into two independent residual trees, one storing goal-conditioned task experience as reusable skills and another for scene-level environment knowledge. Each tree uses a root node for generalized base experiences and incremental delta nodes for subsequent variations, allowing related experiences to share a common foundation without duplication. For retrieval, a failure-penalized similarity scan locates the best match, reconstructing the full experience via root-to-match chain composition. An autonomous consolidation mechanism distills high-frequency paths into new root nodes, enabling the trees to self-organize from general heuristics to specialized variants. Experiments across diverse interactive environments show that DeltaMem consistently outperforms existing baselines. To facilitate future research, we release the code at https://github.com/import-myself/DeltaMem.

AI.tldr: DeltaMem是一个用于LLM代理的内存组织框架，通过将经验存储为残余树结构来解决传统平面记忆的冗余和检索冲突问题。该框架包含两种残余树：目标条件任务经验树和场景级环境知识树，并通过失败惩罚的相似度扫描进行检索，以及自动整合机制将高频路径蒸馏为新的根节点。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理使用记忆学习持续交互经验，但将经验存为独立平面单元导致相似经验重复存储且检索时出现冲突，因为相似情节包含重叠内容而细微场景变化导致检索到的记忆提供矛盾指导。
AI.method: 提出残余经验概念，认为新获取的经验往往是现有知识的增量变体。构建两个独立的残余树：一个存储目标条件任务经验作为可重用技能，另一个存储场景级环境知识。每棵树用根节点存储泛化基础经验，增量delta节点存储后续变体，使相关经验可共享公共基础而无重复。检索时采用失败惩罚的相似度扫描找到最佳匹配，通过根到匹配链重构完整经验。自动整合机制将高频路径蒸馏为新根节点，使树从泛化启发式自组织到专业化变体。
AI.result: 在多样化交互环境中的实验表明DeltaMem始终优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DeltaMem通过残余经验建模有效解决了LLM代理记忆系统中的冗余和检索冲突问题，为代理的记忆组织提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM agent memory systems using residual tree structures for organizing experience data - entirely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile targets video-to-motion conversion and 3D motion generation, while this paper addresses memory management for LLM agents. The application domain (AI agents/memory retrieval) has no connection to cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, nor to video generation or 3D motion generation methods.

title: Zero-Shot 3D Question Answering via Hierarchical View-to-Token Transportation
summary: Recently, zero-shot 3D scene understanding via 2D Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has gained increasing research interest due to their promising spatial reasoning capabilities. Typically, multiple 2D views are sampled from a 3D point cloud and fed into pre-trained VLMs to answer a given question. This paradigm highlights the critical role of input context quality and raises the challenge of retaining as many task-relevant 3D details as possible under a limited input budget. We propose \texttt{KeyVT}, a hierarchical approach for input context collection at both the view and token levels. Specifically, we combine pixel features with camera parameters and assess view importance based on both semantic content and geometric position, resulting in spatially consistent and task-relevant views. Furthermore, we address redundancy among patches across selected views by identifying representative tokens under the optimal transport (OT) framework, where view tokens and key tokens are formulated as two discrete distributions in the embedding space. These key tokens are expected to cover all view features by minimizing the OT distance. We evaluate our framework on three widely used benchmarks, demonstrating significant improvements over existing tuning-free methods and performance comparable to training-based approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了KeyVT，一种利用2D视觉语言模型进行零样本3D场景理解的分层方法，通过视图级和token级的输入上下文收集来选择任务相关的关键视图和代表性token。
AI.motivation: 零样本3D场景理解由于2D VLMs的空间推理能力受到关注，但有限的输入预算如何保留尽可能多的任务相关3D细节是一个挑战。现有方法忽略了视图重要性的评估和token冗余问题。
AI.method: 提出分层方法KeyVT：1) 结合像素特征和相机参数，基于语义内容和几何位置评估视图重要性，选择空间一致且任务相关的视图；2) 在最优传输框架下，将视图token和关键token形式化为两个离散分布，通过最小化OT距离识别代表性token以消除patch间的冗余。
AI.result: 在三个广泛使用的基准数据集上评估，相较于现有的免调优方法取得显著改进，性能与训练基方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过分层视图和token选择有效解决了有限输入预算下的上下文质量问题，为基于2D VLMs的零样本3D场景理解提供了有效框架。

relevance_reason: While both involve 3D understanding and Visual Language Models, this paper focuses on zero-shot 3D Question Answering/scene understanding - a fundamentally different application domain than video-to-motion conversion in Computer Graphics. The paper addresses selecting key views and tokens for 3D scene Q&A, not cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion generation, nor temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, nor quality control for video-generated motion. The methods (hierarchical OT for view-token selection) are also unrelated to video generation models or motion synthesis pipelines mentioned in the profile.

title: The Shadow Price of Reasoning: Economic Perspective on Optimal Budget Allocation for LLMs
summary:
Inference-time scaling has emerged as a critical avenue for enhancing Large Language Models' performance, yet real-world deployment is constrained by strict computational budgets. In this work, we formulate inference budget allocation as a global constrained optimization problem governed by economic principles. By modeling per-query reasoning utility with a shifted-surge function, we derive an optimal allocation policy based on a global shadow price that equilibrates marginal utility under resource scarcity. Based on this theory, we propose Constrained Latent-utility Equilibrium Allocation for Reasoning (CLEAR). It performs rational abandonment and reallocates resources from insolvent queries to solvable queries near their emergence thresholds.
  Extensive experiments on several reasoning tasks with different traffic streams demonstrate that CLEAR significantly improves the Pareto frontier of total token cost versus mean accuracy. In resource-scarce regimes, CLEAR achieves up to a 3x improvement in global accuracy compared to uniform allocation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLEAR方法，通过将推理预算分配建模为受经济约束的全局优化问题，在有限计算资源下实现LLM推理时间的智能分配。核心思想是基于边际效用均衡的影子价格进行资源配置，实现从无法解决的问题到可解决问题的资源再分配。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的推理时间扩展已成为提升性能的关键途径，但实际部署受限于严格的计算预算约束。现有方法难以在稀缺资源条件下实现最优的资源利用效率。
AI.method: 将推理预算分配形式化为受经济原理支配的全局约束优化问题。使用移位激增函数(shifted-surge function)建模每查询推理效用，推导出基于全局影子价格的最优分配策略，实现理性的资源放弃与再分配。
AI.result: 在多个推理任务和不同流量流的广泛实验中，CLEAR显著改善了总token成本与平均准确率的帕累托前沿。在资源稀缺条件下，相比均匀分配获得最高3倍的全局准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于经济学原理的约束优化框架能够有效解决LLM推理资源的智能分配问题，为推理时间扩展的实际部署提供了可行且高效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM reasoning budget allocation using economic optimization methods, while the research profile is focused on Computer Graphics domain, specifically video-to-3D motion generation. The application domains are entirely different: one deals with optimizing computational resources for language model inference, and the other deals with converting 2D video to 3D human motion with cross-modal alignment. Zero method overlap as well - CLEAR economic optimization has no relation to video generation models, VLMs for quality assessment, or 3D motion generation models needed for this research area.

title: Inverting the Generation Process of Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models: Empirical Evaluation and a Novel Method
summary: This paper studies the problem of inverting the DDIM image generation process to recover latent variables, particularly the initial noise map, from a generated image. Existing methods often struggle with accuracy in this task. We propose a novel hybrid approach that combines direct inversion via gradient descent for the first step, followed by a fixed-point method for subsequent steps. Empirical evaluations across three datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves the prediction of initial latent variables while achieving superior reconstruction accuracy. Additionally, we introduce a new evaluation, called the self-interpolation test, which assesses the quality of images generated from interpolated points between the true and predicted latent maps, offering deeper insights into performance. Our results reveal that while existing methods perform reasonably well in reconstruction, they consistently fail to accurately predict the initial latent variables, resulting in poor performance on the self-interpolation test. In contrast, our method outperforms all others across all metrics, providing valuable insights into diffusion models and enhancing their applications in image generation and editing.

AI.tldr: 本文研究DDIM图像生成过程的逆问题，旨在从生成的图像中恢复初始噪声图等潜在变量。提出一种混合方法：先用梯度下降直接反演第一步，再用不动点方法迭代后续步骤。在三个数据集上评估表明，该方法显著提升了初始潜在变量的预测精度和重建准确性，并引入自插值测试来评估插值 latent 点生成的图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在从DDIM生成图像中恢复初始潜在变量（尤其是初始噪声图）时存在精度不足的问题，需要一种更准确的反演方法。
AI.method: 提出一种混合反演方法：(1) 第一步使用梯度下降直接反演；(2) 后续步骤使用不动点迭代法。此外引入了自插值测试作为新的评估指标。
AI.result: 实验在三个数据集上表明，该方法显著提升了初始潜在变量的预测精度和重建质量，在所有指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提混合方法能更准确地预测DDIM的初始潜在变量，显著提高重建和自插值性能，为扩散模型的应用提供了有价值的见解。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses diffusion model inversion for IMAGE generation (recovering initial noise from generated images), which is a different application domain than the research profile's focus on Video-to-3D Motion generation. Although both use diffusion models, they operate in fundamentally different domains: computer vision/image synthesis vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis. The profile specifically needs methods for converting 2D video to 3D human motion with cross-modal alignment and temporal consistency. The paper's method (DDIM inversion) targets image generation tasks, not motion generation. This represents a case of using similar methods in different application domains.

title: Decomposing how prompting steers behavior
summary: Prompting steers large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs) without weight updates, but it remains unclear how instruction changes reshape internal representations to produce behavior. We introduce a nested geometric decomposition framework that treats prompting as a transformation of the representational geometry of the content following the prompt. For each prompt pair, we align representations of the same stimuli under two prompts using increasingly expressive stimulus-invariant maps: translation, rigid transformation with uniform scaling, sequential axis scaling, affine transformation, and nonlinear transformation. We then causally test each map by replacing a single layer's prompt-A hidden state for held-out stimuli with its mapped counterpart and measuring recovery of prompt-B representational geometry and behavior. Across three LLMs, three VLMs, and six text or image datasets spanning style, emotion, scene content, and number, prompts consistently reshape representations toward the instructed task structure. Cross-validated variance decomposition shows that much prompt-induced activation change is captured by shape-preserving maps, especially translation and rigid transformation with uniform scaling, while tier profiles reveal model- and task-specific routing strategies across layers. Crucially, although translation and rigid tiers already improve behavioral agreement, affine transformation is the first tier to nearly recover target-prompt task geometry and yields corresponding behavioral gains. This suggests that cross-dimensional linear mixing is a key mechanism by which prompts reorganize representations toward instructed task structure. Our framework decomposes prompt-induced representational change into interpretable geometric components and reveals how models route task-relevant structure to produce prompt-driven behavior.

AI.tldr: 研究提示词(prompt)如何在不更新权重的情况下改变LLMs和VLMs的内部表征。提出嵌套几何分解框架，将prompt视为对表征几何结构的变换，通过不同复杂度层级(平移→刚体变换→仿射变换→非线性变换)来对齐和分析表征变化，发现跨维线性混合是prompt重组表征的关键机制。
AI.motivation: 探究性理解：prompting是一种无需权重更新的高效控制方法，但其工作机制不明——不清楚指令如何重塑内部表征进而产生行为变化。需要量化分析prompt诱导的表征变化的几何结构。
AI.method: 嵌套几何分解框架：设计5个递进层级的刺激不变映射(平移、均匀缩放刚体变换、顺序轴缩放、仿射变换、非线性变换)；对同一刺激在不同prompt下的表征进行对齐；通过替换单层隐藏态进行因果测试，测量表征几何和行为恢复程度。实验涉及3个LLM、3个VLM及6个文本/图像数据集(风格、情感、场景、内容、数字)。
AI.result: 发现：(1)Prompt一致地将表征重塑向指令任务结构；(2)大部分激活变化可由保形映射(尤其平移和刚体变换)解释；(3)存在模型和任务特定的跨层路由策略；(4)仿射变换是首个能够几乎完全恢复目标prompt任务几何并带来相应行为增益的层级；(5)跨维线性混合是prompt重组表征的核心机制。
AI.conclusion: 提出一种将prompt诱导的表征变化分解为可解释几何分量的框架，揭示了模型如何路由任务相关结构以产生prompt驱动行为。核心贡献在于识别出仿射变换层面的跨维线性混合是关键作用机制，为理解和优化prompting提供理论依据。

relevance_reason: This paper studies how prompts affect internal representations in LLMs and VLMs for language/vision tasks - it's AI/NLP research, not Computer Graphics. Although it mentions VLMs, the application domain is completely different from video-to-3D motion generation. The paper analyzes representation geometry in text/image models, not video or 3D motion generation. This is a theoretical NLP paper that doesn't address any of the pain points: cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency, quality control for video generation, or text-to-motion semantics.

title: FAF-CD: Frequency-Aware Fusion for Change Detection under Imperfect Multimodal Remote Sensing
comment: Code will be released at https://github.com/VimsLab/FAF-CD
summary: Remote sensing change detection for real-world monitoring often relies on imperfect heterogeneous observations, where pre- and post-event images may be asynchronous, cross-sensor, or affected by illumination, seasonal, and modality shifts. This setting is especially challenging for EO-SAR disaster mapping, where nuisance variation can resemble structural damage. We propose FAF-CD, a frequency-aware hybrid framework with a DINOv3-pretrained ConvNeXt encoder and a linear-complexity VMamba-based decoder. Its rectification-aware tri-branch fusion module combines deformable spatial alignment with Fourier and Haar-wavelet comparisons, using adaptive gating to aggregate complementary cues across scales. On BRIGHT validation, a matched heterogeneous EO-SAR adaptation improves clean and perturbed tc-mIoU/tc-mAP over NeXt2Former-CD. FAF-CD also generalizes to binary optical CD, achieving 0.924 cF1 on LEVIR-CD and 0.955 cF1 on WHU-CD, and obtains the best average perturbed cIoU/cF1 on both binary datasets among M-CD and NeXt2Former-CD under pseudo-change-aligned stress tests. It further reduces cost by approximately 24 GFLOPs relative to NeXt2Former-CD while maintaining or improving accuracy.

AI.tldr: FAF-CD是一种面向远感异构观测的变化检测框架,采用DINOv3预训练ConvNeXt编码器与线性复杂度VMamba解码器,通过傅里叶和小波比较、可变形空间对齐及自适应门控聚合多尺度特征,实现跨传感器、跨模态图像的鲁棒变化检测。
AI.motivation: 现实监测中异构观测(跨传感器、跨模态、光照季节变化)普遍存在,现有方法难以有效区分结构损伤与干扰变化,亟需设计能抑制无关干扰变化、聚焦真实变化的鲁棒变化检测方法。
AI.method: 提出频率感知混合框架FAF-CD:1)DINOv3预训练ConvNeXt编码器提取视觉特征;2)VMamba解码器保持线性复杂度;3)矫正感知三支路融合模块结合可变形空间对齐、傅里叶/小波比较和自适应门控,跨尺度聚合互补线索。
AI.result: BRIGHT数据集上tc-mIoU/tc-mAP优于NeXt2Former-CD;LEVIR-CD达0.924 cF1,WHU-CD达0.955 cF1;伪变化压力测试中平均 perturbed cIoU/cF1最佳;计算成本降低约24 GFLOPs同时保持或提升精度。
AI.conclusion: FAF-CD有效解决异构观测变化检测难题,频率域分析能区分结构损伤与干扰变化,具有良好泛化性和实用性,为灾害制图等实际应用提供技术支撑。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about remote sensing change detection (satellite imagery analysis), which is in a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics/video-to-motion generation. While both use computer vision elements, the goals are opposite: this paper analyzes/detects changes in real aerial images, whereas the research profile needs to CREATE synthetic 3D motion from video. Pain points are unrelated (change detection vs cross-modal alignment for motion synthesis), and methods - despite some architectural similarities (convnets) - serve entirely different purposes.

title: From Long News to Accurate Forecast: Importance-Aware Fusion and PRM-Guided Reflection for Time Series Forecasting
summary: Incorporating news into time series forecasting is appealing because news can reveal abrupt exogenous events that historical values alone cannot recover. However, existing LLM-based news-forecasting pipelines face two practical limitations: relevant news articles often exceed the model's context window, and iterative retrieval of supplementary news is typically unguided, leading to redundant updates and slow convergence. We address these issues with a novel framework that combines importance-aware news compression and process-level retrieval supervision. First, we train an importance reward model that estimates the forecasting utility of each article and uses this signal to allocate compression budgets during sequential pairwise fusion, preserving informative content within a fixed context limit. Second, we introduce a process reward model (PRM) that ranks multiple supplementary-news candidates conditioned on the current error profile and the history of previously selected articles, replacing one-shot blind retrieval with quality-controlled selection. Both components are trained offline using historical data with ground truth; inference uses the frozen filtering logic and compression modules without any reflection loop. Experiments on finance, energy, traffic, and bitcoin forecasting benchmarks show that our method improves prediction accuracy over strong baselines, significantly reduces the number of refinement iterations compared to the iterative baseline, and remains effective when relevant articles span thousands of tokens.

AI.tldr: 一种新型LLM时间序列预测框架，通过重要性感知新闻压缩和过程级检索监督来解决现有方法的两个实际问题：新闻文章超过模型上下文窗口的限制，以及无指导迭代检索导致的冗余更新和收敛缓慢。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的新闻预测管道面临两个实际限制：相关新闻文章经常超过模型的上下文窗口，且补充新闻的迭代检索通常是无导向的，导致冗余更新和收敛缓慢。
AI.method: 提出两个组件：1）重要性奖励模型估计每篇文章的预测效用，并在顺序成对融合过程中分配压缩预算；2）过程奖励模型(PRM)根据当前错误画像和先前选择文章的历史对多个候选新闻进行排序。
AI.result: 在金融、能源、交通和比特币预测基准上的实验表明，该方法相比强基线提高了预测精度，显著减少了迭代次数，并且在相关文章达数千token时依然有效。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了LLM新闻预测中上下文窗口限制和低效检索的问题，在减少迭代次数的同时实现了更好的预测精度。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about LLM-based time series forecasting for financial/energy/bitcoin prediction using news articles, while the research profile is specifically in Computer Graphics for video-to-3D motion generation. Even though both papers mention "reward models," the application domains are entirely unrelated - this paper deals with finance forecasting, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: GuidedBridge: Training-freely Improving Bridge Models with Prior Guidance
summary: Guidance methods, such as classifier-free guidance (CFG) and auto-guidance (AG), have advanced noise-to-data generation in diffusion models. Recently, bridge models have introduced a data-to-data generative process that can exploit an instructive clean prior. In this work, inspired by previous methods creating quality difference between denoising results as guidance, we propose a training-free bridge guidance method, termed Prior Guidance (PG). Specifically, we introduce a weak prior, which is unseen during bridge pre-training, hindering prior exploitation and thereby degrading denoising result. Then, we contrast it with the seen prior to highlight and enhance prior exploitation via a scaling factor. Moreover, we analyze the underlying mechanism of prior exploitation in the bridge process and design frequency-modulated prior guidance (FMPG), which tailors the guidance scale to low- and high-frequency bands coherent with bridge generative dynamics. To address prior exploitation in image in-painting, we develop a cascaded framework, CFG-FMPG, which first generates a noisy hidden representation via CFG and then exploits it as a generative prior with FMPG, fulfilling their complementary strengths without compromising inference efficiency. Experiments demonstrate that our PG methods consistently improve pre-trained bridge models across diverse image translation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Prior Guidance (PG)方法，通过对比弱先验与可见先验来增强桥接模型中的先验利用，并进一步设计频率调制先验_guidance和级联框架CFG-FMPG，用于图像翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 桥接模型虽能利用清洁先验进行数据到数据生成，但弱先验（训练中未见过）会阻碍先验利用，降低去噪效果。如何在不改变模型参数的情况下增强先验利用是关键问题。
AI.method: 提出训练无关的Prior Guidance (PG)方法：引入弱先验与可见先验进行对比，通过缩放因子增强先验利用。进一步分析桥接过程中先验利用机制，设计频率调制先验_guidance (FMPG)，根据低频和高频波段调整引导尺度。针对图像修复，开发级联框架CFG-FMPG，先用CFG生成噪声隐藏表示，再用FMPG将其作为生成先验进行利用。
AI.result: 实验表明，PG方法在多种图像翻译任务中持续提升预训练桥接模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 先验对比和频率调制是增强桥接模型先验利用的有效策略，PG方法为数据到数据生成任务提供了新的训练无关引导范式。

The methods also differ - the paper focuses on bridge models for image translation rather than video generation or 3D motion generation models. This is a case of using similar ML methods (diffusion, generative models) in entirely different application domains.

title: DeskCraft: Benchmarking Desktop Agents on Professional Workflows and Human-in-the-Loop Collaboration
summary: Real-world professional desktop workflows in specialized creative and engineering software unfold over long horizons and often require human-in-the-loop coordination, where agents proactively seek necessary information and users provide additional instructions, clarifications, feedback, or corrections as the task progresses. Yet existing desktop GUI benchmarks mostly reduce this setting to short, simplified tasks with all user instructions provided upfront. To address this issue, we introduce DeskCraft, a desktop GUI benchmark targeting long horizon creative and engineering workflows and proactive human-agent collaboration. DeskCraft organizes tasks into a multilevel difficulty taxonomy, with long horizon tasks requiring over 50 execution steps, and covers professional creative software across design, video, audio, and 3D creation. Furthermore, DeskCraft formalizes human-agent collaboration into an interaction protocol covering mid-turn and post-turn exchanges. Mid-turn interaction captures both agent-initiated clarification under uncertainty and user-initiated interruption during execution, while post-turn interaction accommodates user-driven feedback after the agent signals completion, together spanning the full space of realistic collaboration patterns. We evaluate 18 proprietary and open source agents on 538 tasks and find that GPT-5.4 reaches 31.6% on standard tasks and 27.6% on interactive tasks. Further analyses reveal persistent failures in long horizon workflow delivery and proactive clarification. We will open-source all evaluation codes, tasks, and data at https://github.com/mrwwk/DeskCraft.

AI.tldr: DeskCraft是一个针对专业创意和工程软件的长时序桌面GUI基准测试，重点关注人机协作场景，涵盖设计、视频、音频和3D创作等专业软件，以及中turn和post-turn交互协议。
AI.motivation: 现有桌面GUI基准测试大多简化为短任务，用户指令一次性给出，无法反映真实专业工作流程中的长时序和主动式人机协作需求。
AI.method: 构建多层级难度分类体系，设计538个任务评估18种代理，形式化人Agent协作为包含mid-turn和post-turn交换的交互协议。
AI.result: GPT-5.4在标准任务上达到31.6%，在交互任务上达到27.6%，显示出长时序工作流交付和主动澄清仍存在持续失败。
AI.conclusion: 当前代理在处理专业桌面工作流和主动人机协作方面仍有显著不足，需要进一步研究和改进。

title: KC-3DGS: Kurtosis-Constrained Gaussian Splatting for High-Fidelity View Synthesis
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables real-time novel view synthesis by representing scenes as collections of anisotropic Gaussians optimized via differentiable rasterization. However, standard pixel-space losses (L1, SSIM) constrain only aggregate reconstruction error, permitting the optimization to redistribute error across frequency scales. This leads to oversmoothing and structural artifacts, particularly in sparse-view settings where supervision is limited. We propose KC-3DGS, which augments 3DGS training with wavelet-domain supervision based on natural image statistics. Our method combines three components: (1) a multi-scale wavelet coefficient alignment loss that explicitly penalizes missing high-frequency detail, (2) a supervised kurtosis concentration loss that encourages rendered images to match the heavy-tailed frequency statistics of ground-truth images, and (3) a cross-band covariance penalty that promotes frequency specialization. We provide theoretical analysis showing that pixel-space losses admit a family of indistinguishable perturbations under wavelet redistribution, and that our joint objective excludes degenerate solutions. Experiments across MipNeRF360, Tanks&Temples, MVImgNet, DeepBlending, and WRIVA-ULTRRA demonstrate consistent improvements in perceptual quality. On the challenging WRIVA-ULTRRA outdoor dataset, KC-3DGS achieves a 9.48% improvement in DreamSim while also improving PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS. In sparse-view settings with only 12 training images, our method improves PSNR by up to 0.5 dB on MipNeRF360 while maintaining perceptual quality. The approach integrates seamlessly into existing 3DGS pipelines as a plug-and-play regularization strategy.

AI.tldr: KC-3DGS通过引入小波域监督来解决3DGS在稀疏视角下oversmoothing和结构伪影的问题。
AI.motivation: 标准像素空间损失(L1, SSIM)只约束聚合重建误差，允许优化在不同频率尺度间重新分配误差，导致oversmoothing和结构伪影，特别是在稀疏视角设置下。
AI.method: 提出三种组件：(1)多尺度小波系数对齐损失，明确惩罚缺失的高频细节；(2)监督峰度集中度损失，鼓励渲染图像匹配ground-truth的重尾频率统计；(3)跨带协方差惩罚，促进频率专业化。
AI.result: 在MipNeRF360、Tanks&Templates、MVImgNet、DeepBlending和WRIVA-ULTRRA数据集上实验，显示在感知质量上一致改进。在WRIVA-ULTRRA户外数据集上，KC-3DGS在DreamSim上实现9.48%提升，同时改善PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS。在只有12张训练图像的稀疏视角设置下，在MipNeRF360上PSNR提升高达0.5 dB。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可作为即插即用的正则化策略无缝集成到现有3DGS管道中。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses a completely different application domain than the research profile. The profile focuses on video-to-motion conversion (2D video → 3D motion generation), while KC-3DGS focuses on novel view synthesis/rendering using 3D Gaussian Splatting. Although both are in Computer Graphics, they deal with different problems: view synthesis vs. motion generation. The methods are also unrelated - the paper uses wavelet-based loss functions for 3DGS quality improvement, not video generation or cross-modal alignment for motion synthesis. The pain points (cross-modal alignment, temporal consistency, semantic text-motion alignment) are not addressed by this paper.

title: EvoTrainer: Co-Evolving LLM Policies and Training Harnesses for Autonomous Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Autonomous LLM training is often framed as recipe search, which leaves the training harness largely static. This limitation sharpens in agentic RL, where shifting bottlenecks and scalar rewards mask diverse failure modes. We introduce EvoTrainer, an autonomous training framework that co-evolves LLM policies and training-side harnesses through empirical feedback: it diagnoses rollout-level evidence, revises diagnostics, backtests interventions, and accumulates reusable skills. Evaluated on mathematical reasoning, competitive-programming code generation, and repository-level software engineering, EvoTrainer matches or exceeds the human-engineered RL references under the same data, codebase, and evaluation protocol, with the largest gain on long-horizon agentic SWE. Trajectory analyses show that retained strategies diverge across domains, evolving diagnostics prevent invalid high-scoring branches from being promoted, and reusable skills shape later search. Autonomous LLM RL should move beyond recipe search toward joint evolution of policies and the training harnesses that interpret them.

title: Disentangling Visual and Factual Correctness in LVLMs' Visualization Literacy
comment: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG). 23 pages, 9 figures
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) show strong visualization interpretation, yet it is unclear whether their responses reflect genuine reasoning over visual evidence or factual priors learned during training. Current evaluations mix these two sources, obscuring when correct visual interpretation is overridden by memorized facts. We present a framework that isolates visual correctness from factual correctness, revealing validity limitations in existing visualization literacy assessments. Across three experiments with 15 state-of-the-art LVLMs: (1) several models reach human-level performance on standard tests (VLAT), but this may reflect factual recall rather than visual understanding, while randomized-data tests (reVLAT) underestimate literacy when correct visual interpretation is superseded by factual priors. (2) Using our Counterfactual Visualization Literacy Assessment Test (CVLAT) with capability-normalized arbitration metrics, we classify models by the sign of their visual-factual reliance index (VFRI), revealing a visualization-oriented majority and a factual knowledge-oriented minority, though several near-zero cases warrant caution. A human baseline (N=30) on the same counterfactual items confirms that people overwhelmingly follow the chart under conflict, providing a human reference point. (3) Prompt-based intervention can shift prioritization, but its effectiveness is highly model-dependent and direction-asymmetric, and high chart-reading capability does not predict prompt-controllability. Overall, high visualization accuracy is not sufficient evidence of faithful visual reasoning: reliable integration into visual analytics requires evaluating not only visualization literacy but also how models arbitrate between visual evidence and factual priors when the two diverge. Benchmark and code: https://github.com/JaeyoungKim-HCIL/CVLAT

AI.tldr: 本文提出CVLAT框架，用于区分LVLMs是否真正进行视觉推理还是仅回忆训练时习得的事实先验。研究发现多个模型在标准测试中达到人类水平，但可能是事实Recall而非真正的视觉理解。模型可分为视觉导向型和知识导向型，prompt干预效果因模型而异。
AI.motivation: 当前评估混合了视觉正确性和事实正确性，无法清楚判断LVLMs的正确响应是基于真实视觉推理还是基于训练时记忆的事实先验。这导致高估或低估模型的视觉素养。
AI.method: 提出三个实验：(1)使用标准VLAT和随机化数据测试reVLAT对比；(2)使用反事实视觉素养评估测试CVLAT和VFRI指标分类模型；(3)prompt干预测试。研究包含15个SOTA LVLMs和30人基线对比。
AI.result: 多个模型在标准测试达到人类水平，但可能反映事实Recall；reVLAT在视觉解释被事实先验超越时会低估视觉素养；根据VFRI将模型分为视觉导向型、事实知识导向型和中间型；人类基线显示人在冲突时绝大多数遵循图表；Prompt干预可改变优先级但效果高度依赖模型且方向不对称。
AI.conclusion: 高视觉准确率不足以证明忠实的视觉推理；可靠的视觉分析集成不仅需要评估视觉素养，还需评估模型在视觉证据与事实先验分歧时如何仲裁。视觉能力不能预测prompt可控性。

The research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically for 3D motion generation from 2D video conversion. title: Uncertainty-Aware Clarification in LLM Agents with Information Gain
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents often operate under underspecified user instructions, where latent uncertainty over user intent leads to erroneous tool actions. To address this challenge, we propose a goal-oriented clarification framework that aligns clarification behavior with ambiguity resolution. Central to our approach is the Information Gain Reward, a metric that quantifies the utility of clarification questions by measuring the Bayesian belief update towards the ground-truth goal induced by the clarification exchange. We train the clarifier (LLM) using this reward to optimize for high information gain, ensuring that clarifications effectively reduce uncertainty and improve task completion within the agent-tool-user environment. We validate our framework within a clarification-enhanced $τ$-Bench environment, conducting cross-agent evaluations across five heterogeneous backbones. Empirical results demonstrate that our method consistently improves the success rate by 3.7\% over the no-clarification baseline, while adding only 0.3 total interaction steps on average.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种目标导向的LLM智能体澄清框架，通过Information Gain Reward奖励机制优化澄清问题质量，在τ-Bench环境中实现成功率提升3.7%。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体常在用户指令不明确的情况下操作，对用户意图的不确定性导致工具执行错误，需要一种能够有效降低不确定性、提高任务完成率的澄清机制。
AI.method: 提出信息增益奖励(Information Gain Reward)度量标准，通过贝叶斯信念更新来量化澄清问题对真实目标的效用，训练clarifier LLM优化高信息增益，确保澄清有效减少不确定性。
AI.result: 在澄清增强的τ-Bench环境中进行五个异构骨干模型的跨智能体评估，结果显示方法比无澄清基线成功率提升3.7%，平均仅增加0.3个交互步骤。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能够一致性地改善任务完成率，同时保持较低的操作复杂度，为LLM智能体在处理模糊用户指令方面提供了有效的解决方案。

title: $A^2$: Smaller Self-Supervised ViTs Localize Better than Larger Ones
summary: Robust visual classification often depends on localizing the main foreground objects in an image while ignoring contextual distractors. Surprisingly, we find that the attention maps of smaller self-supervised ViTs localize foreground objects better than those of larger ViTs. However, we still need large ViTs, because they extract richer representations from each patch. To get the best of both worlds, good localization and rich representations, we propose $A^2$, a simple method that leverages this inverse scaling finding by decoupling where to look (a small attention model) from what to extract (a large embedding model): we crop around the attention peaks of a small model and embed the crops with a larger model. $A^2$ uses entirely pretrained features, requires no group labels, and does not require per-dataset attention or backbone training. Across 5 benchmarks, $A^2$ is competitive with backbone-matched loss-level methods like DFR, and outperforms end-to-end attention training under stronger distribution shifts.

title: Think-Before-Speak: From Internal Evaluation to Public Expression in Multi-Agent Social Simulation
summary:
LLM-based multi-agent simulation offers a promising way to study social interaction, deliberation, and collective opinion dynamics. However, many existing dialogue simulation frameworks represent interaction mainly as observable turn exchange or aggregated outputs, leaving the internal evaluative processes behind silence, speaking intention, and public expression difficult to examine. We introduce TBS (Think-Before-Speak), an interval-based multi-agent simulation framework that separates agents' private reasoning from public utterance generation. At each interval, all agents update structured internal states based on the shared dialogue history and their own memory. These states include dissonance-related appraisal, perceived opinion climate, perceived isolation risk, response strategy, and willingness to speak. The orchestrator then resolves competing speaking intentions and commits one utterance to the public dialogue, allowing internal evaluation and public interaction to co-evolve over time.
  We evaluate TBS in simulated town hall discussions on a climate-related policy issue. Results show that TBS produces coherent internal-state traces and that these traces vary systematically across turn-allocation, silence, and memory conditions. Dissonance-related appraisal increases agents' willingness to speak, whereas silence-pressure appraisal decreases it. Once speaking intention is formed, public expression is shaped mainly by turn-allocation rules. These findings suggest that TBS supports mechanism-sensitive social simulation by making the pathway from internal evaluation to public expression observable and analyzable.

AI.tldr: TBS是一个基于间隔的多智能体模拟框架,将智能体的私人推理与公共话语生成分离,通过结构化内部状态(不和谐评估、感知观点气候、感知孤立风险、响应策略和发言意愿)来模拟从内部评估到公共表达的路径,使社会互动机制可观察和分析。
AI.motivation: 现有对话模拟框架主要将交互表示为可观察的轮次交换或聚合输出,难以考察内部评估过程(如沉默、发言意图和公共表达背后的心理机制),需要一种能分离私人推理与公共话语生成的框架。
AI.method: 在每个间隔,所有智能体基于共享对话历史和自身记忆更新结构化内部状态,包括不和谐相关评估、感知观点气候、感知孤立风险、响应策略和发言意愿。编排器解决竞争性发言意图并将一个话语提交给公共对话,允许内部评估与公共交互协同演化。
AI.result: TBS产生连贯的内部状态轨迹,且这些轨迹在不同轮次分配、沉默和记忆条件下系统变化。不和谐相关评估增加发言意愿,而沉默压力评估降低发言意愿。公共表达主要由轮次分配规则塑造。
AI.conclusion: TBS通过使从内部评估到公共表达的路径可见和可分析,支持机制敏感的社会模拟,为研究社会互动、 deliberative和集体意见动态提供有前景的方法。

title: NVIDIA OmniDreams: Real-Time Generative World Model for Closed-Loop Autonomous Vehicle Simulation
summary: As autonomous vehicle capabilities advance, the safe evaluation of driving policies in long-tail scenarios remains a critical bottleneck. In closed-loop simulation, the driving policy model actively interacts with the environment, where its actions dynamically update the simulator state and directly influence the next set of generated sensor observations. While recent reconstruction-based neural simulators offer photorealism, they are fundamentally constrained by their initial captured data and struggle to generalize to highly dynamic or novel scenes. To overcome these limitations, we introduce OmniDreams, a foundation generative world model mid- and post-trained from the Cosmos diffusion model to autoregressively generate action-conditioned videos in real time. By leveraging the rich visual priors of Cosmos and mid- and post-training on 21k hours of driving scenarios, OmniDreams synthesizes complex, unobserved phenomena that are hard for traditional simulators to capture, such as extreme weather and unpredictable dynamic agent behaviors. Crucially, it autoregressively conditions its photorealistic sensor generation on past frames, the current simulator state, and immediate driving actions. Deployed in a closed-loop system with the Alpamayo 1 policy model and AlpaSim orchestrator, OmniDreams acts as a highly responsive, reactive environment, providing a scalable and comprehensive solution for training and evaluating next-generation autonomous driving policies. We additionally show preliminary results indicating that a world-action model (WAM) post-trained from OmniDreams achieves strong performance on the Physical AI Autonomous Vehicles NuRec dataset, surpassing the VLA-based Alpamayo 1.5 research policy model while using only 1/5 the total parameters. These results highlight the potential for a real-time world model like OmniDreams to also serve as a backbone for policy architectures.

AI.tldr: OmniDreams是一个基于Cosmos扩散模型的基础生成式世界模型，通过在21k小时驾驶场景数据上进行训练后，能够在闭环系统中实时生成动作条件的视频，用于自动驾驶策略的训练和评估。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶能力的发展，长尾场景下的安全评估成为关键瓶颈。传统重建型神经模拟器受限于初始采集数据，难以泛化到高度动态或新颖的场景。
AI.method: 利用Cosmos扩散模型的丰富视觉先验，在21k小时驾驶场景数据上进行训练和后训练，构建能够自动回归生成动作条件视频的OmniDreams世界模型，并将其部署在包含Alpamayo 1策略模型和AlpaSim编排器的闭环系统中。
AI.result: 基于OmniDreams后训练的WAM（世界-动作模型）在NuRec数据集上性能超越VLA基础的Alpamayo 1.5研究策略模型，同时仅使用1/5的参数总量。
AI.conclusion: OmniDreams展示了实时生成式世界模型作为策略架构backbone的潜力，为下一代自动驾驶策略的训练和评估提供了可扩展的整体解决方案。

While both use diffusion models, the application domain is completely different: AV simulation vs human motion generation. The paper doesn't address any of the stated pain points (cross-modal video-motion alignment, temporal consistency for character animation, quality control for visual guidance, or semantic text-to-motion alignment). This is essentially a simulation/robotics paper using diffusion for image generation in driving scenarios, not related to computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: GTBench: A Curriculum-Grounded Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs as Mathematical Research Assistants in Graph Theory
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as self-study assistants in technical disciplines, yet their reliability as mathematical reasoning assistants remains poorly understood. We introduce GTBench, a curriculum-grounded benchmark for evaluating LLMs as mathematical research assistants in graph theory, comprising 63 problems organized into three groups of increasing difficulty: undergraduate definitions and basic properties (Group 1), algorithm tracing and structural reasoning (Group 2), and graduate-level proof construction (Group 3). Problems are sourced from verified academic materials including Diestel's Graph Theory. We evaluate five frontier models -- GPT-5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, Llama 3.3 70B, and Mistral Large 3 -- under zero-shot and chain-of-thought prompting, using exact-match and LLM-as-judge evaluation for Groups 1 and 2, and a hybrid human expert and LLM-as-judge protocol for Group 3. Our results reveal a pronounced performance hierarchy: GPT-5 approaches ceiling on Group 1 (95.8% zero-shot) and maintains meaningful accuracy on graduate proofs (82%), while all other models degrade substantially with difficulty, with Llama achieving 0% under human evaluation on Group 3 zero-shot. Failure mode analysis shows that correct algorithm, wrong execution errors dominate Groups 1 and 2, while Group 3 additionally surfaces incomplete reasoning failures and reveals systematic disagreement between human evaluators and the automated judge, particularly on verbose or near-complete proofs (kappa = 0.48-0.83 across human pairs). GTBench provides the first curriculum-grounded evaluation framework for graph-theoretic reasoning in LLMs, with direct implications for the governance of AI tools in mathematical education and scientific research.

AI.tldr: GTBench是一个基于课程图的论基准，用于评估大型语言模型作为数学研究助手的可靠性，包含63个难度递增的问题，来自Diestel's Graph Theory等验证学术材料。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在技术学科中作为自学助手的使用日益增加，但它们作为数学推理助手的可靠性尚未得到充分理解和评估。
AI.method: 评估五个前沿模型（GPT-5、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite、Llama 3.3 70B、Mistral Large 3），使用零样本和思维链提示，采用精确匹配和LLM作为评判者进行第1、2组评估，第3组采用人类专家和LLM混合评判协议。
AI.result: GPT-5在第1组接近天花板（95.8%零样本），在研究生证明题上保持有意义准确率（82%），而其他模型随难度增加显著下降，Llama在第3组零样本人类评估中为0%。失败模式分析显示算法正确但执行错误是关键问题，第3组还存在不完整推理失败，人类评估者与自动评判之间存在系统性分歧（κ=0.48-0.83）。
AI.conclusion: GTBench提供了首个基于课程的图论推理评估框架，对AI工具在数学教育和科学研究中的治理具有直接意义。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about evaluating LLMs as mathematical research assistants in graph theory - entirely different field. The application domain has zero match with Computer Graphics/video-to-motion generation. Methods involve evaluating LLM performance on math problems rather than any cross-modal video-to-motion alignment or 3D motion generation. The pain points (cross-modal alignment, temporal consistency, quality control for visual guidance, semantic text-motion alignment) are completely absent.

title: SRENet: Spectral Re-Entry Network for Point Cloud Action Recognition
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
summary: Recognizing human actions from point cloud sequences is critical for 3D perception driven applications such as autonomous driving and human-computer interaction. However, the irregular structure and temporal inconsistency of point clouds pose unique challenges for spatio-temporal representation learning, especially in capturing both global motion context and fine-grained temporal dynamics. We propose SRENet, a spectral-aware framework designed to explicitly learn both global context and fine-grained temporal dynamics of motion from a frequency perspective for action recognition. SRENet introduces a Spectral Decomposition Block (SDeBlock) that performs wavelet-based analysis along temporal and spatial axes, disentangling features into low- and high-frequency components with frequency-specific attention. To recover residual dynamics and re-align temporal frequency structures distorted during semantic fusion, a Spectral Re-entry Block (SReBlock) performs secondary temporal decomposition.
