Furthermore, a spectral-aware learning strategy is devised to enhance discriminability in both frequency subspaces via contrastive loss and a curriculum schedule that gradually shifts focus from low- to high-frequency spaces in line with coarse to detailed motion patterns. Extensive experiments on MSR-Action3D, NTU-RGBD and NTU-RGBD120 demonstrate that SRENet achieves state-of-the-art performance, validating the effectiveness of frequency modeling in point cloud-based action understanding.

AI.tldr: SRENet是一种基于频谱分析的点云动作识别框架,通过小波变换分解低频和高频分量来学习全局运动上下文和细粒度时间动态,在MSR-Action3D、NTU-RGBD和NTU-RGBD120数据集上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 点云序列的不规则结构和时间不一致性给时空表示学习带来独特挑战,现有方法难以同时捕捉全局运动上下文和细粒度时间动态,而频谱分析视角提供了一种解耦不同频率特征的潜在方案。
AI.method: 提出SRENet框架包含三个核心创新:1)光谱分解块(SDeBlock)对时间和空间轴进行小波分析,将特征解耦为低频和高频分量并使用频率特定注意力;2)光谱重入块(SReBlock)执行二次时间分解以恢复残差动态;3)光谱感知学习策略通过对比损失和课程调度增强频率子空间的区分性。
AI.result: 在MSR-Action3D、NTU-RGBD和NTU-RGBD120三个主流点云动作识别数据集上进行了广泛实验,验证了频谱建模的有效性,SRENet实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 从频率视角建模动作为点云动作理解提供了新思路,低频组件捕获粗略运动模式,高频组件编码精细时间动态,该框架为主动驾驶和人体交互等3D感知应用提供了有效的技术方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about point cloud action recognition from 3D sensor data (RGB-D cameras like Kinect), which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on video-to-motion generation (converting 2D video to 3D motion). The application domain mismatch is critical: the profile deals with 2D video → 3D motion conversion, while this paper deals with recognizing actions from pre-existing 3D point cloud sequences. Additionally, the methods are completely different - the paper uses spectral/wavelet analysis for point clouds, whereas the profile uses video generation models (Seedance/Wanxiama), VLMs, and cross-modal feature alignment pipelines. There is no cross-modal alignment involved, no video input processing, no quality assessment, and no text-to-motion generation - zero alignment with the stated pain points.

title: ClinicalMC: A Benchmark for Multi-Course Clinical Decision-Making with Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely adopted in healthcare, yet they still encounter significant challenges in complex clinical decision-making scenarios. Existing benchmarks primarily assess LLM performance in single-course settings and lack systematic evaluation in multi-course scenarios, where a patient's condition evolves over time. To address this gap, we propose ClinicalMC, a benchmark for multi-course clinical decision-making. It includes 1,275 Chinese and 5,804 English samples across four stages from admission to discharge. These stages cover triage, first-course examination/diagnosis/treatment, subsequent multi-course examination/assessment/treatment, and final diagnosis. In ClinicalMC, patients in the English dataset undergo an average of 5.11 clinical courses, whereas those in the Chinese dataset undergo 3.42. To assess LLM performance, we construct a multi-agent evaluation framework that includes patient, examiner, and doctor agents. Based on the benchmark and framework, we design two experimental settings -- a single-turn static setting and a multi-turn dynamic setting -- and assess three categories of LLMs: 1) closed-source LLMs like GPT5-mini; 2) open-source LLMs like DeepSeek-V3.2; and 3) medical LLMs like HuatuoGPT-o1. Through extensive evaluation, we aim to better understand LLM performance in the medical domain and support its effective deployment in healthcare.

AI.tldr: 提出了ClinicalMC基准，用于评估大型语言模型在多疗程临床决策中的表现，包含1,275个中文和5,804个英文样本，涵盖入院到出院四个阶段，并构建了多智能体评估框架进行单轮静态和多轮动态实验设置。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM基准主要评估单一疗程设置，缺乏在多疗程场景下的系统评估，而临床中患者病情随时间演变，现有方法无法有效评估LLM在这一复杂过程中的决策能力。
AI.method: 构建了包含四阶段的ClinicalMC基准（分诊、首次诊疗、多次复诊/评估/治疗、最终诊断），设计多智能体评估框架（患者、检查者、医生智能体），并设置单轮静态和多轮动态两种实验环境，测试封闭源、开源和医学专用三类LLM。
AI.result: 英文数据集平均每个患者经历5.11个疗程，中文数据集为3.44个疗程；已对GPT5-mini、DeepSeek-V3.2、HuatuoGPT-o1等模型进行评估。
AI.conclusion: 该基准和方法有助于更好理解LLM在医学领域的表现，支持医疗健康领域的有效部署。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Clinical Decision-Making with Large Language Models in healthcare/medical AI, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The application domain is entirely different - it has nothing to do with video generation, 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between video and motion, or any of the computer graphics methods mentioned in the research profile.

title: JAVEDIT: Joint Audio-Visual Instruction-Guided Video Editing with Agentic Data Curation
comment: Equal contributions from first two authors. Project page: https://ryanchenyn.github.io/projects/JAVEdit Code: https://github.com/RyanChenYN/JAVEdit Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Coraxor/JAVEdit-100k
summary: While instruction-based video editing has seen significant progress, joint audio-visual editing remains constrained by the absence of dedicated datasets and benchmarks. To bridge this gap, we present JAVEdit-100k, the first large-scale, high-quality dataset tailored for instruction-guided joint audio-visual editing. Focusing on human-centric videos, JAVEdit-100k comprises approximately 100K editing triplets spanning five distinct categories, including subject editing and speech editing. This dataset is rigorously constructed via four meticulously designed generation pipelines, seamlessly paired with an agent-in-the-loop quality control mechanism. Furthermore, to address the lack of standardized evaluation within the field, we introduce JAVEditBench, a comprehensive benchmark featuring curated source videos and human-aligned instructions across all editing categories. Finally, we propose JAVEdit, a pioneering baseline model for instruction-guided joint audio-visual editing. Experiments show that \model\ outperforms all baselines on five of six evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: JAVEdit-100k是首个用于指令引导的联合视听编辑的大规模高质量数据集，包含约10万个人类中心视频的编辑三元组，涵盖五个不同类别，并配有JAVEditBench基准测试和JAVEdit基线模型。
AI.motivation: 当前基于指令的视频编辑已取得显著进展，但联合视听编辑缺乏专门的数据集和基准测试，导致该领域研究受到约束。
AI.method: 通过四人精心设计的生成管道构建数据集，并与"人在环中"的质量控制机制配对；同时创建了包含精选源视频和对齐人类指令的综合基准测试；提出JAVEdit作为联合视听编辑的基线模型。
AI.result: JAVEdit-100k是首个大规模高质量的视听编辑数据集；在六个评估指标中的五个上优于所有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了联合视听编辑领域数据集和基准测试的空白，为该方向的后续研究提供了重要的资源和基线。

relevance_reason: While JAVEDIT is a video-related paper in computer graphics, it focuses on AUDIO-VISUAL VIDEO EDITING (modifying/editing existing videos based on instructions), which is entirely different from the research profile's focus on VIDEO-TO-MOTION GENERATION (converting 2D video to 3D motion). The application domains are completely different: video editing vs. cross-modal video-to-3D motion conversion. Even though both involve video, JAVEDIT does not address any of the pain points (cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency for motion generation, quality control for motion guidance, semantic alignment between text and 3D motion output). The methods are also unrelated - JAVEDIT focuses on dataset curation for editing rather than motion generation pipelines.

title: MedCUA-Bench: A Screenshot-Only Benchmark for Clinical Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-use agents could automate repetitive screen-based clinical work, but their reliability in medical graphical user interfaces remains largely unvalidated. Existing benchmarks focus on general web or desktop tasks and underrepresent medical software, which requires domain knowledge, exhibits markedly different UI design from mainstream applications, lacks public testing environments, and demands safety validation beyond task completion. We introduce MedCUA-Bench, an interactive benchmark for clinical computer-use agents. It covers 18 clinical scenarios across 10 medical domains, reconstructed from real product manuals and open-source medical systems to capture authentic clinical interfaces while avoiding licensing and privacy constraints. Each task ships with paired intent- and step-level goals to disentangle clinical reasoning from UI execution, and is evaluated by a deterministic checker over task completion and five clinical safety dimensions. Across 23 agents, the best closed-source model reaches 54.2% strict success, while all models remain below 9% on the real OpenEMR. Open-source agents average only 2.5%, with the best reaching 16.2%. MedCUA-Bench exposes the gap between current agents and reliable clinical software use, providing a reproducible testbed for future research.

AI.tldr: MedCUA-Bench是一个用于评估临床计算机使用智能体的交互式基准测试，覆盖18个临床场景和10个医学领域。最佳闭源模型达到54.2%的严格成功率，但在真实OpenEMR系统上所有模型均低于9%，开源模型平均仅2.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试专注于通用网页或桌面任务，未能代表医疗软件的特殊性。医疗软件具有独特的UI设计、需要领域知识、缺乏公开测试环境，且需要超越任务完成的安全性验证。因此需要专门的医疗GUI智能体基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含18个临床场景的MedCUA-Bench，涵盖10个医学领域，从真实产品手册和开源医学系统重建，以捕捉真实临床界面。每个任务配备意图级和步骤级目标，通过确定性检查器评估任务完成情况和五个临床安全维度。对23个智能体进行了评估。
AI.result: 最佳闭源模型达到54.2%的严格成功率，但所有模型在真实OpenEMR上均低于9%。开源智能体平均仅2.5%，最佳为16.2%。
AI.conclusion: 当前智能体与可靠的临床软件使用之间存在显著差距。MedCUA-Bench提供了可复现的测试环境，为未来研究奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical/healthcare AI agents for clinical computer use (GUI agents for OpenEMR system). It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between video and motion, or any computer graphics applications. The application domain is healthcare/medical AI, which is entirely different from the research profile's focus on computer graphics and motion generation.

title: Ask When It Pays: Cost-Aware Open-Ended Interaction for Instance Goal Navigation
summary: Instance Goal Navigation (IGN) requires an embodied agent to find a specific object instance among distractors from an underspecified natural-language description. Such ambiguity often cannot be resolved from perception and language alone, making interaction with an oracle a natural mechanism for disambiguation. Prior interactive methods allow oracle queries but treat lightweight clarification and route-level guidance alike, letting agents boost success rate through repeated high-information questions rather than by resolving the underlying ambiguity efficiently. We recast interactive IGN as a cost-sensitive uncertainty-reduction problem, where the agent should ask the question whose answer provides the largest reduction in navigation uncertainty relative to its penalty. To this end, we apply an information-gain analysis on existing navigation corpora to identify which cues reduce navigation uncertainty, yielding a compact set of question types and data-derived weights.However, existing interactive navigation benchmarks do not model the cost of different question types or evaluate how efficiently agents use interaction, making them unsuitable for studying cost-sensitive interaction. Based on this taxonomy, we construct a benchmark for diagnosing interaction behavior and efficiency, together with a Weighted Success Rate metric that penalizes each query by its derived cost. We further propose a zero-shot MLLM navigator that selectively queries at each decision step only when the expected uncertainty reduction justifies the interaction cost.

AI.tldr: 针对实例目标导航(IGN)任务，将交互式导航重新定义为成本敏感的不确定性减少问题，提出基于信息增益的分析方法来确定最优问题类型，并构建了新的基准和加权成功率评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式IGN方法将轻量级澄清和路线级指导同等对待，导致智能体通过重复高信息量问题而非高效消除底层歧义来提高成功率，且现有基准未考虑不同问题类型的成本及交互效率。
AI.method: 对现有导航语料库进行信息增益分析，识别可减少导航不确定性的线索类型；构建含加权成功率指标的新基准；提出零样本MLLM导航器选择性查询策略。
AI.result: 生成紧凑的问题类型集合和基于数据的权重，建立了可诊断交互行为和效率的基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架可实现成本敏感的智能交互，使智能体仅在预期收益大于成本时才发起询问，从而更高效地解决导航中的歧义问题。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is in Computer Graphics focused on video-to-3D motion generation with cross-modal alignment (video generation models like Seedance/Wanxiang, VLM for quality assessment). The paper is about Instance Goal Navigation (robotics/embodied AI) - a completely different field focused on spatial reasoning, agent navigation, and interactive questioning strategies. Even though both may use multimodal models, the application domains are entirely different.

title: Effect of Demographic Bias on Skin Lesion Classification
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) , 26 pages, 12 figures
summary: In this study, we evaluate the performance of skin lesion classification using ResNet-based convolutional models, focusing on the impact of demographic bias in training data, particularly variations in patient sex and age. We use linear programming to generate datasets with controlled demographic characteristics, allowing systematic investigation of bias effects. Three learning strategies are evaluated: a single-task model, a reinforcing multi-task model, and an adversarial learning scheme. Our sex-based analysis indicates that sex-specific training datasets optimise model performance. Notably, including male patients in the training data improved performance for the male subgroup, even in female-majority cases. Reinforcing and adversarial learning schemes narrowed or eliminated bias gaps in balanced and female-majority datasets. However, these strategies proved less effective in male-majority settings, where models continued to perform better for males than females. The two learning schemes showed marginal bias reduction compared to the baseline model in predominantly male patient populations. Age-based analysis demonstrates comparable baseline performance across the three model approaches, with performance declining across age categories. Younger groups consistently achieve the highest performance, regardless of training data distribution. Although balanced training yields optimal results for the youngest age category, performance decreases in older categories. We find that sex biases arise mainly from data imbalances, while age biases consistently favour younger groups regardless of distribution. These distinct mechanisms require targeted mitigation strategies. Additionally, cross-dataset validation on two external datasets revealed that domain shifts notably affect performance and patterns of demographic bias.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了ResNet卷积模型在皮肤病变分类中的性能，重点分析了训练数据中的人口统计学偏见(性别和年龄)。通过线性编程生成控制人口统计学特征的数据集，评估了三种学习策略的效果。
AI.motivation: 解决皮肤病变分类模型中存在的性别和年龄偏见问题，确保模型在不同人口统计学群体中的公平性和准确性。
AI.method: 使用线性编程生成具有控制人口统计学特征的数据集，评估三种学习策略:单任务模型、强化多任务模型和对抗学习方案，并在两个外部数据集上进行跨域验证。
AI.result: 性别偏见主要由数据不平衡引起，对抗学习和强化多任务学习可有效消除平衡和女性为主数据集中的偏见，但在男性为主数据集中效果有限。年龄偏见始终有利于年轻组，与数据分布无关。跨数据集验证显示领域转换显著影响性能和偏见模式。
AI.conclusion: 性别和年龄偏见具有不同的形成机制，需要针对性的缓解策略。由于领域转换的影响，在实际应用中需考虑模型的可迁移性和泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image classification (skin lesions) and addressing demographic bias in healthcare ML models. The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics - there is no relationship to video-to-motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, or any of the specified methods (Video Generation Models, VLM for quality assessment, 3D Motion Generation). This is medical image analysis for fairness/bias detection, not computer graphics.

title: GLINT: Sparsely Gated Vision-Language Alignment for Fine-Grained Radiology Representations
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) for radiology have emerged as a scalable paradigm by leveraging image-report pairs naturally produced in clinical workflows. However, this pairing reveals a mismatch in scale: each finding occupies only a small region of the image, yet supervision is provided only at the global image-report level. This poses a central challenge: prior approaches spread weight densely across all patches rather than concentrating on the sparse subset relevant to a given query. To address this, we present GLINT (Gated Language-Image alignmeNT), a framework that explicitly models this sparse correspondence. On the alignment side, we introduce Sparsely Gated Alignment, a novel architecture in which a sigmoid gate over a separate gate embedding space activates only the patches relevant to each textual query, enforcing explicit sparsity. On the representation side, we add Dense Feature Regularization, which anchors the trainable encoder's intermediate features to a frozen self-supervised learning (SSL) teacher, preserving the fine-grained patch features that the gate relies on. The same recipe applies to both 2D chest X-ray (CXR) and 3D chest computed tomography (CT), built with DINOv3 and V-JEPA 2.1, respectively. GLINT enables zero-shot classification, grounding, and segmentation from free-text queries, and to our knowledge is the first to demonstrate zero-shot segmentation on 3D CT volumes without mask supervision. Notably, the most pronounced gains arise on zero-shot grounding and segmentation, where sparse, query-specific localization is required, consistent with our design intent. In downstream evaluation, GLINT outperforms both SSL encoders and medical VLMs on classification, report generation, and segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLINT框架，解决医学影像中图像报告对标注粒度不匹配的问题。传统方法对所有图像区域均匀分配权重，但实际诊断发现仅占图像的稀疏区域。GLINT通过门控对齐机制实现稀疏的查询特定定位，并结合密集特征正则化保持细粒度特征。该方法首次在无需掩码监督的情况下实现3D CT的零样本分割。
AI.motivation: 核心动机是解决医学VLM中的尺度不匹配问题：诊断发现仅占用图像的稀疏区域，但现有方法对全局图像-报告级别进行监督，导致模型将注意力分散到所有patch而非相关区域。这限制了需要精确 localization 的任务性能（如grounding和segmentation）。
AI.method: 提出两个核心技术：1）稀疏门控对齐(Sparsely Gated Alignment)：使用sigmoid门控机制基于查询嵌入空间激活相关的patch子集，实现显式稀疏性；2）密集特征正则化(Dense Feature Regularization)：将可训练编码器的中间特征锚定到冻结的自监督学习教师网络，保持细粒度patch特征。基于DINOv3(2D CXR)和V-JEPA 2.1(3D CT)构建，支持零样本分类、grounding和分割。
AI.result: GLINT在下游任务中超越自监督编码器和医学VLM，在分类、报告生成和分段任务上取得最优性能。尤其在需要查询特定定位的零样本grounding和分割任务上提升最显著，验证了设计意图。首次实现了3D CT volumes的零样本分割，无需任何掩码监督。
AI.conclusion: GLINT成功解决了医学VLM中的稀疏对应建模问题，通过门控机制实现查询相关的patch选择，结合特征正则化保持表示质量。该框架统一处理2D和3D医学影像，为放射学AI提供了高效的无需大规模标注的训练范式，具有重要的临床应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging (radiology CT/X-ray analysis) rather than computer graphics or video-to-motion generation. While it uses Vision-Language alignment methods, the application domain is completely different - medical diagnosis and radiology reporting, not 3D motion generation from video. The pain points addressed (sparse feature localization in medical images) have no relation to the research profile's concerns (temporal consistency, cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, semantic text-to-motion alignment). This is a Medical AI/VLM paper, not a computer graphics or motion generation paper.

title: Perceive Before Reasoning: A Pre-Reasoning Perception Framework for Efficient and Reliable Proactive Mobile Agents
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have substantially advanced mobile agents, yet proactive mobile assistance remains challenging because agents must decide \emph{when} to intervene before determining \emph{how} to assist. Existing systems often implement these two decisions within a unified MLLM-based pipeline, leading to goal misalignment between conservative intervention filtering and comprehensive assistance generation, as well as redundant inference when the agent should remain silent. To address these limitations, we propose the \textbf{Pre-Reasoning Perception Framework (PRPF)}, a two-stage framework built on perceiving before reasoning. PRPF introduces a lightweight Multimodal Proactive Perceptor (MPP) for intervention gating and context compression, and activates the Proactive Agent Reasoner (PAR) only when intervention is warranted. Experiments on the ProactiveMobile benchmark show that PRPF substantially reduces false trigger rates (FTR) while improving success rates (SR) and inference efficiency over the ProactiveMobile baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出预推理感知框架(PRPF)，解决移动端多模态大语言模型中主动干预时机决策与帮助生成之间的目标冲突问题，通过引入轻量级的多模态主动感知器(MPP)进行干预门控和上下文压缩，只有在需要干预时才激活主动Agent推理器(PAR)。
AI.motivation: 现有系统将"何时干预"和"如何帮助"两个决策统一在MLLM管道中实现，导致保守的干预过滤与全面的帮助生成之间存在目标错位，且当智能体应该保持沉默时会产生冗余推理。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架PRPF，包含：1)轻量级多模态主动感知器(MPP)用于干预门控和上下文压缩；2)主动智能体推理器(PAR)，仅当干预被触发时才激活。
AI.result: 在ProactiveMobile基准上的实验表明，PRPF显著降低了误触发率(FTR)，同时提升了成功率(SR)和推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离感知与推理阶段，PRPF有效解决了移动智能体中主动干预决策的目标冲突问题，实现了更精准的干预门控和更高的计算效率。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper is about proactive mobile agents and intervention timing in multimodal LLMs - not Computer Graphics, not video-to-motion generation, not 3D motion synthesis. The methods (intervention gating, context compression for mobile agents) have no relation to the research profile's methods (video generation models, VLMs for quality assessment, cross-modal video-motion pipelines). The pain points addressed ("when to intervene" timing conflicts in agent systems) are entirely unrelated to video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, quality control, or text-motion semantic alignment. This is a mobile computing/AI agent paper with zero overlap to the computer graphics research area.

title: Reinforcement Learning from Cross-domain Videos with Video Prediction Model
summary: Reinforcement learning from expert videos across visually distinct domains is challenging due to the absence of reward signals and the presence of domain gaps. We introduce XIPER (Cross-domain Video Prediction Reward), a reward model for learning from expert videos collected in a visually different domain, where the agent's appearance differs due to factors such as color, morphology, or the sim-to-real gap. More specifically, XIPER trains a cross-domain video prediction model that maps agent observations into the expert domain and uses the prediction likelihood as a reward signal. Experiments on the DMC Color Suite (8 tasks) and DMC Body Suite (3 tasks) show that XIPER consistently outperforms baselines despite domain gaps such as differences in agent color and morphology. We further analyze XIPER on a sim-to-real transfer dataset, demonstrating that it produces meaningful reward signals for real-robot observations given only simulated expert videos. Code, pretrained models, datasets and video demonstrations can be found on our project webpage: https://sites.google.com/view/xiper

AI.tldr: XIPER是一个跨域视频预测奖励模型，用于从视觉上不同的域中收集的专家视频进行强化学习，能够在存在领域差距（如智能体颜色、形态差异或模拟到真实差距）的情况下学习。
AI.motivation: 当从专家视频学习时，强化学习面临缺乏奖励信号和领域差距的挑战，特别是当智能体的外观因颜色、形态等因素而有所不同，或在模拟到真实的转移中存在差距时。
AI.method: XIPER训练一个跨域视频预测模型，将智能体观察映射到专家域，并使用预测似然作为奖励信号。在DMC Color Suite（8个任务）和DMC Body Suite（3个任务）上进行实验。
AI.result: XIPER始终优于基线方法，尽管存在领域差距如智能体颜色和形态的差异。在sim-to-real转移数据集上也展示出能够为真实机器人观察产生有意义的奖励信号。
AI.conclusion: XIPER可以有效地从视觉上不同的域中收集的专家视频学习，为解决模仿学习和域适应问题提供了一个新的奖励建模方法。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. This paper is about reinforcement learning and robotics (sim-to-real transfer), not Computer Graphics video-to-motion generation. While it uses video prediction models, the goal is reward signal computation for RL, not extracting 3D motion from 2D video. It addresses domain gaps (color/morphology differences) in robot learning, which is unrelated to the pain points of cross-modal 2D-to-3D motion alignment, temporal consistency, visual guidance quality control, or text-to-motion semantic alignment in computer graphics.

title: Follow-Your-Preference++: Rethinking Preference Alignment for Image Inpainting
comment: 23 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2509.23082
summary: We study preference alignment for image inpainting. Rather than proposing yet another method, we revisit the problem from first principles and reassess its core challenges. We adopt the widely used direct preference optimization framework and construct preference training data with publicly available reward models. Our empirical study spans nine reward models, two benchmarks, and two baseline inpainting models that differ in architecture and generative mechanism. Our main findings are: (1) Most reward models provide valid signals for preference data construction, although some are unreliable as evaluators. (2) Across models and benchmarks, preference data exhibits consistent trends under both candidate and sample scaling. (3) Reward models display pronounced biases--particularly in brightness, composition, and color scheme--that make them prone to inducing reward hacking. (4) A simple ensemble of reward models mitigates such biases and yields robust, generalizable performance. {\color{rebuttal_blue}(5) Preference alignment is transferable to the object removal task, where the goal shifts from open-ended creative generation to coherent background completion. (6) Further analysis reveals that a calibrated ensemble method further mitigates hacking and improves robustness.} Without modifying model architectures or introducing additional datasets, our models substantially outperform prior state-of-the-art models on standard metrics, large vision-language model evaluations, and human assessments. Our code is available at: https://github.com/shenytzzz/Follow-Your-Preference.

AI.tldr: 本研究重新审视图像修复中的偏好对齐问题，采用直接偏好优化(DPO)框架，通过9个奖励模型构建偏好训练数据，在两个基准和两个baseline模型上进行实证研究。
AI.motivation: 解决图像修复中的偏好对齐问题，当前缺乏对该领域核心挑战的系统性重新评估。
AI.method: 采用直接偏好优化(DPO)框架，使用公开奖励模型构建偏好训练数据，设计简单集成和校准集成方法来缓解奖励黑客问题。
AI.result: 简单集成可缓解奖励模型的偏差（亮度、构图、色彩方案），提升泛化性能；偏好对齐可迁移到目标移除任务；在标准指标、LVLM评估和人类评估上均超越现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 大多数奖励模型可提供有效的偏好信号，但存在明显偏差；简单集成和校准集成方法能有效提升稳健性和泛化能力，无需修改模型架构或引入额外数据集即可显著提升性能。

relevance_reason: Both papers are in Computer Graphics, but the application domains are different. The research profile focuses on video-to-3D-motion conversion (cross-modal generation), while the paper focuses on image inpainting (2D image editing). Although both use diffusion models and preference alignment (DPO), the task is fundamentally different - image inpainting is about filling missing regions in 2D images, not generating 3D motion from video. The methods don't transfer across these different application domains.

title: Do Real-World Datasets Contain Natural Experiments? An Empirical Study Using Causal Feature Selection
summary: In nature, events that affect some individuals or groups but not others constitute an implicit intervention and are known as natural experiments. For example, the COVID-19 pandemic was an intervention by the coronavirus on the sub-population infected with COVID. We ask, do natural experiments occur in existing real-world datasets? If yes, how should we treat them? To detect natural experiments in data, we use causal discovery to recover the underlying causal graph and perform feature selection based on causal links. If downstream performance improves by treating the data as interventional rather than observational, we argue that this suggests the dataset contains natural experiments. We first validate this hypothesis by simulating datasets with and without natural experiments using synthetic graphs. We then perform a systematic empirical evaluation on a large suite of real-world datasets. Our results indicate that real-world datasets do contain natural experiments and we can take advantage of those natural experiments to improve model performance using causal inference. Our work represents the initial foray into this area, offering a preliminary exploration within a limited scope.

AI.tldr: 研究如何检测和利用真实世界数据集中隐含的自然实验，提出基于因果发现的检测方法，并通过实证验证了真实数据集确实存在自然实验这一假设。
AI.motivation: 自然实验在现实中广泛存在（如COVID-19疫情），但尚不清楚现有真实世界数据集中是否也包含自然实验，以及如何识别和利用这些自然实验来提升模型性能。
AI.method: 首先使用因果发现算法恢复底层因果图并基于因果链接进行特征选择；然后通过比较将数据视为干预性 versus 观察性数据时的下游模型性能来判定是否存在自然实验；在合成数据集上验证假设，最后在大量真实数据集上进行系统实证评估。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上的实验结果表明：(1)真实世界数据集确实包含自然实验；(2)通过因果推断方法处理这些自然实验可以显著改善模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究填补了自然实验检测领域的空白，证实了真实数据集中存在可被利用的自然实验，为后续更广泛的探索奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about causal discovery and detecting natural experiments in datasets using causal inference methods. The application domain is completely unrelated to the research profile. The target research is in Computer Graphics focusing on video-to-3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment, and quality assessment. This paper addresses none of those specific problems and uses entirely different methods focused on causal analysis rather than video/motion generation

title: MemoGen: Can Past Experience Improve Future Text-to-Image Generation?
summary: Modern text-to-image models have achieved strong visual synthesis, yet remain unreliable when prompts require implicit visual constraints, relational reasoning, or external knowledge. Existing retrieval-augmented and agentic generation methods mitigate this issue by acquiring external knowledge, references, or refined prompts for the current request, yet they typically treat each generation as an isolated episode and do not systematically preserve past successes or failures for future use. In this work, we ask whether a text-to-image system can continually improve from its own generation experience without updating the underlying generator. We propose MemoGen, a training-free framework that augments existing image generators with an agentic evolution layer. For each task, MemoGen explicitly infers visual requirements, retrieves external evidence and references when necessary, translates them into executable generation constraints, evaluates the generated result, and stores task understanding, reference choices, visual feedback, successful strategies, and failure lessons as reusable experience memory. Across evolution rounds, the agent retrieves relevant experience to improve similar future generations, selectively repairing previously failed cases while preserving successful ones, thereby enabling test-time self-evolution without parameter updates. Extensive experiments on knowledge-intensive and reasoning-oriented benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of this paradigm: after only two evolution rounds, MemoGen built upon the open-source Qwen-Image backbone surpasses strong proprietary systems such as Nano Banana Pro and GPT-Image-1 on WISE and Mind-Bench, showing that explicit experience memory can serve as a powerful continual learning signal for reliable text-to-image generation.

AI.tldr: 提出MemoGen——一种无需训练的框架，通过为图像生成器添加智能演进层实现测试时自进化，利用显式经验记忆（包含任务理解、参考选择、视觉反馈、成功策略和失败教训）在不更新参数情况下持续改进生成质量，两轮迭代后超越GPT-Image-1等专有系统。
AI.motivation: 现代文本到图像模型在显式视觉约束方面已取得较强成果，但在隐式视觉约束、关系推理或外部知识方面仍不可靠。现有检索增强和智能体生成方法通常将每次生成视为孤立事件，未能系统性地保存过去成功或失败的经验供未来使用。因此需要探索文本到图像系统是否能够从自身生成经验中持续改进而无需更新底层生成器。
AI.method: MemoGen是一个无需训练的框架，为现有图像生成器添加了智能演进层。其核心机制包括：1)显式推断视觉需求；2)在必要时检索外部证据和参考；3)将信息转化为可执行的生成约束；4)评估生成结果；5)将任务理解、参考选择、视觉反馈、成功策略和失败教训存储为可重用经验记忆。在演进过程中，智能体检索相关经验来改进未来相似生成 selectively修复先前失败的案例同时保留成功的。
AI.result: 在知识密集型和推理导向的基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该范式是有效的。仅经过两轮演进，基于开源Qwen-Image骨干构建的MemoGen就在WISE和Mind-Bench上超越了Nano Banana Pro和GPT-Image-1等强大的专有系统。
AI.conclusion: MemoGen通过显式经验记忆实现了文本到图像系统在不更新参数的情况下进行测试时自我进化，仅经过两轮迭代就超越了GPT-Image-1等强大专有系统，证明了经验记忆可以作为可靠文本到图像生成的持续学习信号。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The research profile focuses on video-to-3D motion conversion with temporal consistency and cross-modal alignment, while the paper is about text-to-image generation. Although both involve generative models, image generation and motion generation are fundamentally different application domains in computer graphics. The paper addresses text-to-image planning and refinement, not video-to-motion synthesis or 3D motion generation.

title: Distilling Answer-Set Programming Rules from LLMs for Neurosymbolic Visual Question Answering
comment: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is the task of answering questions about images, requiring the integration of multimodal input and reasoning. Modular approaches that incorporate logic-based representations into the reasoning component offer clear advantages over end-to-end trained systems, particularly in terms of interpretability. However, adapting or extending these representations when task requirements change can place a significant burden on developers. To address this challenge, we present an approach for distilling rules from Large Language Models (LLMs). Our method prompts an LLM to extend an initial VQA reasoning theory, expressed as an answer-set program, to meet new requirements of the task. Examples from VQA datasets guide the LLM, validate the results, and help correct erroneous rules by leveraging feedback from the ASP solver. We demonstrate that our approach is effective across diverse VQA datasets. Notably, only a few examples are needed to elicit correct rules from LLMs. Our experiments suggest that rule distillation from LLMs is a promising alternative to traditional data-driven rule learning approaches. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).

AI.tldr: 提出一种从大型语言模型中提取规则的方法，用于扩展VQA推理理论，仅需少量示例即可实现有效的规则学习。
AI.motivation: 模块化方法在VQA任务中具有可解释性优势，但当任务需求变化时，扩展或调整逻辑表示会给开发者带来负担。
AI.method: 通过提示LLM扩展初始的答案集程序(ASP)表达VQA推理理论，利用VQA数据集中的示例引导LLM，并通过ASP求解器的反馈验证和纠正错误规则。
AI.result: 在多个VQA数据集上证明了有效性，仅需少量示例即可从LLM中提取正确规则。
AI.conclusion: 从LLM中提取规则是传统数据驱动规则学习的有前景替代方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for video-to-3D motion generation and cross-modal alignment, while this paper addresses Neurosymbolic Visual Question Answering (VQA). VQA is a vision-language task about answering questions about images, not related to video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or temporal motion modeling. Despite both involving visual understanding, the goals, methods, and applications are entirely different.

title: MariData: One-Step Unpaired Image Translation for Maritime Environments
summary: The development on robust perception systems for Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships (MASS) is heavily constrained by the scarcity of diverse training data, particularly for adverse weather and low-light conditions. Because collecting paired images in dynamic maritime environments is physically impossible, synthetic data generation via unpaired image-to-image translation offers a critical solution. However, existing generative models suffer from failing to preserve the fine structural details of small navigational objects due to latent compression bottlenecks. In this paper, we introduce a framework for generating synthetic maritime data using CycleGAN-turbo, a one-step unpaired translation architecture. By incorporating zero-convolution skip connections to bypass the Variational Autoencoder (VAE) bottleneck, our approach explicitly preserves small object details (e.g., distant vessels and sea marks) during translation. We compiled a dataset of 7,000 maritime images to train and evaluate models for Day-to-Foggy, Day-to-Sunset, and Day-to-Night domain translations. Qualitative evaluations and variable-strength inference studies demonstrate that our method effectively synthesizes realistic atmospheric conditions while maintaining the underlying semantic structure of the scene. The Day-to-Foggy and Day-to-Sunset models exhibit great structural retention, whereas the Day-to-Night model highlights the challenge of semantic hallucination, such as generating artificial coastal lights, induced by unbalanced training distributions. Ultimately, this work establishes an efficient, structure-aware data synthesis pipeline that directly addresses the data scarcity bottleneck in autonomous maritime navigation.

AI.tldr: 针对海上自主船舶(MASS)训练数据稀缺的难题，提出使用CycleGAN-turbo单步无配对翻译架构，通过零卷积跳跃连接绕过VAE瓶颈，有效保留小尺度航行物体（如远距离船只和航标）的结构细节。
AI.motivation: 海上自主船舶的感知系统受限于恶劣天气和低光照条件下的训练数据稀缺，而动态海况中收集成对图像物理上不可能，因此合成数据生成成为关键突破口。
AI.method: 采用CycleGAN-turbo一-step无配对图像翻译架构，引入零卷积跳跃连接（Zero-Convolution Skip Connections）绕过Variational Autoencoder潜在压缩瓶颈 PRESERVING小目标结构完整性。
AI.result: 构建7,000张海上图像数据集，完成Day-to-Foggy、Day-to-Sunset、Day-to-Night三种域翻译任务。定性评估表明：Day-to-Foggy和Day-to-Day模型表现良好结构保留；Day-to-Night模型存在语义幻觉（如生成人工海岸灯光）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了高效的结构感知数据合成管道，直接解决了自主 Maritime导航中的数据稀缺瓶颈。CycleGAN-turbo与零卷积跳跃连接的组合可有效保持小尺度导航物体的语义完整性，为 MASS 感知系统训练提供可行的数据增强方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about unpaired image translation for maritime environments (Day-to-Foggy/Night/Sunset) for autonomous ship perception - a computer vision task. The research profile asks for video-to-3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, and semantic alignment with text prompts to generate 3D human motion. While both involve image/video processing, the goals are entirely different: maritime image domain adaptation vs. video-to-motion synthesis in computer graphics.

title: A Negative Result on Cross-Model Activation Transfer in a Pythia Multi-Hop Setting
summary: Recent work shows that language models can transmit behavioural traits through hidden signals in generated data during training. We ask whether a more direct and stricter channel is also viable: can one language model communicate useful intermediate reasoning state to another at inference time by translating and injecting hidden activations, rather than by passing natural-language text? We test this question in a controlled Pythia-160M to Pythia-410M multi-hop reasoning setting. A linear translation layer learns a strong normalized-space map between sender and receiver hidden states, with normalized cosine similarity near 0.97 across seeds. However, when the translated activations are injected into the receiver at inference time, they do not improve downstream answering. Low-strength additive injection remains near the no-injection baseline, with confidence intervals that cross zero. Replacement-style injection is consistently destructive, and rescaling translated vectors to the receiver hidden-state norm does not rescue performance. The result is therefore a scoped negative result: in this setting, offline representational alignment is not sufficient for useful causal communication inside the receiver.

AI.tldr: 研究语言模型能否通过直接传递隐藏激活而非自然语言文本来进行推理状态的通信。发现在Pythia-160M到410M的多跳推理设置中，尽管可以实现高精度的表示对齐（cosine相似度达0.97），但这些转换后的激活无法改善接收模型的下游推理表现。
AI.motivation: 之前的工作表明语言模型可以通过生成数据中的隐藏信号传递行为特性，作者想知道是否存在更直接严格的通道：不通过自然语言，而是直接传递隐藏激活来实现模型间的推理状态传递。
AI.method: 在受控的Pythia-160M到Pythia-410M多跳推理设置中，使用线性翻译层学习发送方和接收方隐藏状态之间的归一化空间映射，并尝试多种注入方式：低强度加法注入、替换式注入、以及对翻译向量进行范数缩放。
AI.result: 线性翻译层能学习到强归一化空间映射，跨种子的归一化余弦相似度接近0.97。但将翻译的激活注入接收者后，下游问答表现未获改善——低强度加法注入仍接近无注入基线，置信区间跨越零点；替换式注入始终具有破坏性；将翻译向量缩放到接收者隐藏状态范数也未能挽救性能。
AI.conclusion: 这是一个有限范围的负结果：在该设置下，离线表示对齐不足以在接收者内部实现有用的因果通信。即使隐藏表示能够高度对齐，这种对齐也不能转化为有效的推理能力传递。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cross-model activation transfer in language models (Pythia LLM) for multi-hop reasoning tasks - it belongs to NLP/LLM research, not Computer Graphics. While both involve cross-modal/cross-model feature alignment conceptually, the application domains are completely different: the research profile focuses on video-to-3D-motion generation, whereas this paper focuses on transferring hidden states between LLMs for reasoning. The methods are also different (linear translation layers for LLM hidden states vs video generation models/VLMs). This is essentially a different field entirely.

title: FreeStreamGS: Online Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting from Unposed Streaming Inputs
summary: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) allows efficient and high-fidelity novel view synthesis (NVS) from an offline recorded image sequence. However, achieving online NVS from streaming and unposed image inputs remains challenging. Although online feed-forward geometric estimation methods have been proposed for streaming depth and point cloud recovery, they cannot be adapted to NVS due to severe rendering artifacts. This is because NVS demands stricter multi-view consistency in Gaussian scales and pose-geometry alignment; even minor deviations would accumulate over time and visibly degrade rendering quality. To this end, we propose FreeStreamGS, a robust online feed-forward framework for efficient and high-quality NVS. We introduce two key mechanisms: a Decoupled Intrinsic Recovery Head that removes cumulative camera intrinsic bias and prevents scene scale jitter during long-term streaming, and a Dynamic Point Refinement Offset strategy that relaxes rigid unprojection to correct coupled pose-depth drift. Extensive experiments show that FreeStreamGS achieves rendering quality competitive with state-of-the-art offline feed-forward 3DGS methods, despite operating without access to future frames.

AI.tldr: FreeStreamGS提出了一种用于在线新视角合成的鲁棒前馈框架，针对流式输入中相机内在偏差累积和姿态-深度漂移问题，通过解耦内在恢复头和动态点精修偏移策略实现长期稳定的高质量渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有在线前馈方法虽可处理流式深度和点云重建，但无法应用于新视角合成，因为新视角合成对高斯尺度多视图一致性和姿态-几何对齐要求更严格，即使是轻微偏差也会在时序上累积导致明显伪影。
AI.method: 提出两个关键机制：1)解耦内在恢复头(Decoupled Intrinsic Recovery Head)去除累积的相机内在偏差并防止长期流式过程中的场景尺度抖动；2)动态点精修偏移策略(Dynamic Point Refinement Offset)放松刚性反投影以校正耦合的姿态-深度漂移。
AI.result: 实验表明FreeStreamGS在不具备未来帧访问能力的条件下达到了与离线前馈3DGS方法相当的渲染质量。
AI.conclusion: FreeStreamGS成功实现了从无姿态流式图像序列进行高效、高质量在线新视角合成，为实时场景渲染应用提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: While both papers are in Computer Graphics field, they address completely different applications. The research profile focuses on VIDEO-TO-MOTION conversion (converting 2D video into 3D human motion using video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance). The paper FreeStreamGS focuses on NOVEL VIEW SYNTHESIS via 3D Gaussian Splatting - a different application that involves generating new perspectives from already-captured views, not motion generation from video. The pain points are完全不匹配 (completely mismatched): no cross-modal alignment between video-motion, no temporal consistency for video-to-motion conversion, no quality assessment of video generation, no text-to-motion semantic alignment.

title: LEAP: Supercharging LLMs for Formal Mathematics with Agentic Frameworks
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong informal mathematical reasoning but struggle to generate mechanically verifiable proofs in formal languages like Lean. We present LEAP, an agentic framework that enables general-purpose foundation models to achieve state-of-the-art performance on automated formal theorem proving. LEAP leverages foundation model capabilities, such as informal reasoning, instruction following, and iterative self-refinement. By decomposing complex problems into smaller units, the system bridges formal proof construction with informal blueprints through continuous interaction with the Lean compiler. To provide a rigorous evaluation beyond increasingly saturated benchmarks, we introduce Lean-IMO-Bench, a benchmark of IMO-style problems formalized in Lean, with short statements yet highly non-routine and multi-step proofs across a wide range of difficulty levels. Empirically, on the latest 2025 Putnam Competition, an annual mathematics competition for undergraduate students in North America, LEAP solves all 12 problems, matching recent breakthroughs by frontier formal mathematical models. On Lean-IMO-Bench, LEAP boosts the one-shot formal solve rate of general-purpose LLMs from below 10% to 70%, notably surpassing the 48% benchmark set by a specialized, gold-medal-caliber IMO system. Furthermore, we demonstrate LEAP's research-level utility by autonomously formalizing complex proofs for open combinatorial challenges, including a verified proof for a key subproblem in Knuth's Hamiltonian decomposition of even-order Cayley graphs.

AI.tldr: LEAP是一个使大型语言模型能够在Lean形式化定理证明中达到最先进水平的智能体框架，通过将复杂问题分解为更小单元，结合非正式推理与形式化验证，在2025年Putnam竞赛上解决全部12道题，并在新基准Lean-IMO-Bench上将一次性形式求解率从不足10%提升至70%。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在非正式数学推理方面表现强劲，但在生成可机械验证的形式化证明（如Lean语言）方面存在困难。现有基准日益饱和，需要更加严格的评估标准来衡量模型的正式定理证明能力。
AI.method: LEAP框架利用基础模型的能力（非正式推理、指令遵循、迭代自我 refinement），通过将复杂问题分解为更小单元，系统性地架设非正式推理蓝图与形式化证明构建之间的桥梁，并通过与Lean编译器的持续交互实现验证与修正。
AI.result: 在2025年Putnam竞赛上解决全部12道题；在Lean-IMO-Bench上，将通用LLM的一次性形式求解率从低于10%提升至70%，显著超越了专业IMO系统设定的48%基准线；并成功自主形式化了Knuth偶阶Cayley图Hamiltonian分解的关键子问题。
AI.conclusion: LEAP证明了智能体框架在形式化数学证明方面的有效性，实现了研究级别的实用价值，能够自主形式化复杂证明，为自动形式化定理证明领域树立了新的里程碑。

relevance_reason: This paper is about formal mathematics theorem proving using LLMs in Lean, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Video-to-3D Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: mathematical theorem proving vs. video-to-motion conversion. There is no cross-modal alignment between video and motion, no temporal consistency concerns for video-to-motion, no visual quality assessment for generated videos, and no semantic alignment between text prompts and 3D motion output. This is a pure AI/ML paper for formal reasoning, not computer graphics.

title: PaddleOCR-VL-1.6: Expanding the Frontier of Document Parsing with Under-Optimized Region Refinement and Progressive Post-Training
summary: We introduce PaddleOCR-VL-1.6, an upgraded compact document parsing model built upon PaddleOCR-VL-1.5. Although PaddleOCR-VL-1.5 establishes a strong 0.9B baseline, its remaining errors concentrate in under-optimized regions where model behavior is unstable, data coverage is sparse, or supervision is unreliable. Rather than expanding the training corpus indiscriminately, PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 introduces a region-aware data optimization framework that identifies weak regions from the previous model, applies targeted enhancement to these regions, and improves the reliability of supervision signals. It further adopts a progressive post-training recipe based on curated data selection and reinforcement learning, pushing model performance to a higher level through staged optimization. PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 achieves a new state-of-the-art score of 96.33% on OmniDocBench v1.6, demonstrates strong competitiveness against top-tier VLMs, and provides a practical post-training recipe for the PaddleOCR-VL series.

AI.tldr: PaddleOCR-VL-1.6是一个升级的紧凑文档解析模型，在前代0.9B参数基线基础上，通过区域感知数据优化框架和改进的训练后配方实现性能提升。
AI.motivation: 前代PaddleOCR-VL-1.5仍存在错误，主要集中在模型行为不稳定、数据覆盖稀疏或监督不可靠的区域，需要有针对性的优化而非盲目扩大训练数据。
AI.method: 引入区域感知数据优化框架识别弱区域并进行针对性增强，同时采用基于精选数据选择和强化学习的渐进式训练后配方进行分阶段优化。
AI.result: 在OmniDocBench v1.6上达到96.33%的新的最先进水平，展示了与顶级视觉语言模型的强大竞争力。
AI.conclusion: PaddleOCR-VL-1.6为PaddleOCR-VL系列提供了一套实用的训练后配方，证明了针对特定弱区域的精准优化比大规模数据扩展更有效。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically video-to-3D motion generation (converting 2D video to 3D human motion). The paper is about document OCR/parsing (PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 for document understanding). While both use Visual Language Models, the application domain is entirely different (document analysis vs. motion generation). The paper does not address any of the pain points: cross-modal video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, quality control for video Guidance, or text-to-motion alignment.

title: The Reliability Gap in Benchmark Auditing: Distribution Shift and Scale as Failure Modes of Contamination Detection
summary: Benchmark contamination, where evaluation examples appear in a model's training data, threatens the validity of LLM assessment. Statistical tools for detecting training-data membership exist, but have been validated almost exclusively in controlled academic regimes: large, homogeneous pre-training corpora and transparent, single-stage training pipelines. Whether these methods remain reliable in realistic auditing scenarios remains unclear. We identify two under-studied failure modes: distribution shift, which arises when suspect and validation sets violate the IID assumption, and scale constraints, which arise because benchmarks are orders of magnitude smaller than pre-training corpora. We systematically evaluate three leading paradigms: LLM Dataset Inference, Post-Hoc Dataset Inference, and CoDeC across 27 models from multiple families (including Pythia, OLMo~2, and specialised cultural and medical LLMs) and scales (up to 27B). We then further extend our analysis to frontier industry models. Across 335 evaluations, only 199 yield correct outcomes. LLM Dataset Inference results in false positives under distribution shift, Post-Hoc Dataset Inference is underpowered at benchmark scale, and CoDeC provides only coarse provenance signals that are insufficient to verify individual benchmark splits. Our results reveal a systematic reliability gap between controlled validation and practical benchmark auditing, and show that statistical detection cannot yet replace transparent data provenance. We open-source our benchmark for further research.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了大型语言模型训练数据污染检测方法的实用性，发现现有统计方法在真实审计场景中存在系统性可靠性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 基准污染是LLM评估中的严重问题——评估例子可能混入训练数据，导致性能虚高。现有的成员资格检测方法（如LLM Dataset Inference、Post-Hoc Dataset Inference、CoDeC）仅在受控的学术环境中验证过（如大规模同质预训练语料库、透明单阶段训练流程），在现实审计场景中是否仍可靠尚不清楚。
AI.method: 系统评估三种领先检测范式（LLM Dataset Inference、Post-Hoc Dataset Inference、CoDeC）在27个不同模型家族（包括Pythia、OLMo 2及专业文化/医学LLM）上的表现，模型规模达27B，并扩展到前沿工业模型，总计335次评估。
AI.result: 三种方法均存在显著问题：LLM Dataset Inference在分布偏移下产生误报，Post-Hoc Dataset Inference统计功效不足，CoDeC仅能提供粗粒度来源信号。在335次评估中只有59%（199次）产生正确结果。
AI.conclusion: 统计检测方法与透明数据溯源之间存在系统性可靠性差距，当前统计检测尚无法取代透明的数据来源披露。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM training data contamination detection and benchmark reliability in NLP/Machine Learning - entirely outside the Computer Graphics domain. It has no connection to video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, or any of the specified pain points. The methods (statistical detection for LLM datasets) are completely unrelated to Video Generation Models, VLMs for visual quality assessment, or 3D Motion Generation Models.

title: VistaHop: Benchmarking Multi-hop Visual Reasoning for Visual DeepSearch
summary: Visual DeepSearch requires multimodal large reasoning model (MLRM) agents to answer complex visual queries by repeatedly inspecting image regions, grounding intermediate reasoning in visual evidence, and connecting fine-grained clues across long reasoning chains. However, existing benchmarks mainly focus on single-step visual understanding or static image-question answering, offering limited evaluation of iterative image inspection, visual-anchor grounding, and multi-hop evidence integration. In this work, we introduce VistaHop, a benchmark for evaluating vision-centric search and multi-hop visual reasoning in Visual DeepSearch. VistaHop contains 300 high-resolution images, 25 visual search scenarios, and 350 multi-hop QA tasks that require models to follow evidence chains from visual anchors or fuse information across multiple image-grounded reasoning paths. We further develop VistaArena, a unified evaluation environment that supports tool-augmented reasoning with text search, image search, image cropping, and evidence-based answer validation. Experiments on seven representative MLRMs show that current models remain far from solving VistaHop: the best model, SenseNova-MARS-32B, achieves only 24.31% Pass@1. These results reveal persistent limitations in visual grounding, evidence revisiting, long-chain reasoning, and multi-anchor information fusion, highlighting the need for stronger benchmarks and training methods for Visual DeepSearch.

AI.tldr: VistaHop是一个用于评估视觉深度搜索中多模态大推理模型的新基准，包含300张高分辨率图像、25个视觉搜索场景和350个多跳问答任务，并开发了VistaArena统一评估环境。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要关注单步视觉理解或静态图像问答，缺乏对迭代图像检查、视觉锚点 grounding 和多跳证据集成的评估能力，因此需要新的基准来推动 Visual DeepSearch 领域的发展。
AI.method: 构建了VistaHop基准，包括300张高分辨率图像、25个视觉搜索场景和350个多跳QA任务；开发了VistaArena统一评估环境，支持文本搜索、图像搜索、图像裁剪和基于证据的答案验证；对7个代表性MLRM进行了实验。
AI.result: VistaHop基准显示当前最先进的MLRM在该任务上表现受限，揭示了视觉grounding、证据 revisit、长链推理和多锚点信息融合等方面的持久性局限性。
AI.conclusion: VistaHop作为一个具有挑战性的新基准，能够有效评估视觉深度搜索中的多跳视觉推理能力，为 Visual DeepSearch 领域提供了更强的基准和训练方法的研发方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Visual DeepSearch and multi-hop visual reasoning for image-based QA tasks, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics domain focused on video-to-3D-motion conversion. While it involves VLMs and visual reasoning, the application domain is entirely different - it's about visual question answering and reasoning, not video generation, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal video-to-motion pipelines. The pain points (temporal consistency, semantic text-motion alignment) and methods (Seedance video generation, motion models) have no overlap with this benchmark paper on visual reasoning evaluation.

title: The Violation Situation Pattern: A Knowledge-Graph Pattern for Compliance Violations
summary: Compliance pipelines detect violations as transient query results and do not keep the violation itself as a persistent graph object with review state, affected entities, or audit history. The Violation Situation Pattern (VSP) closes this gap. Building on the Situation pattern of Gangemi and Mika, VSP reifies each detected violation as a graph node with a rule identifier, a temporal validity interval, a lifecycle state, and evidence links to the entities involved. Lifecycle transitions are stored as immutable, PROV-O-aligned events, so audit history is a graph traversal. We instantiate VSP in a legal entity and contract lifecycle property graph and operationalize four deontic rules (V1 unauthorized signature, V2 expired mandate, V3 missing confidentiality clause, V4 missing breach-notification clause) through an FCL->Cypher->MERGE pipeline. We check V1 and V2 against BODACC corporate-officer publications, evaluate V4 on 73 GDPRhub enforcement decisions, and run a SHACL cross-formalism check on V3 and V4. The central finding is rule-body independence: extending V4 from clause-presence to deadline checking raises F1 from 0.312 to 0.602, while the pattern's identity, lifecycle, and evidence semantics stay the same. This separates a pattern contribution from a detector contribution, so detection logic can evolve without invalidating accumulated audit history.

AI.tldr: 论文提出违规情况模式(VSP)，将检测到的违规重新实现为具有规则标识符、时间有效性、生命周期状态和证据链接的持久图对象，解决现有合规管道无法保留违规审计历史的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有合规管道将违规检测为瞬态查询结果，不保留违规本身作为具有审查状态、受影响实体和审计历史的持久图对象，导致无法进行完整的审计追踪。
AI.method: 基于Gangem和Mika的情况模式构建VSP，将违规重新实现为图节点，包含规则ID、时间有效性间隔、生命周期状态和证据链接；生命周期转换为不可变的PROV-O对齐事件；在法律实体和合同生命周期属性图中实例化，通过FCL->Cypher->MERGE管道操作化四个义务规则，并在BODACC、GDPRhub数据上测试，使用SHACL进行跨形式主义检查。
AI.result: 将V4从条款存在扩展到截止日期检查使F1分数从0.312提高到0.602，同时模式的身份、生命周期和证据语义保持不变，证明规则体独立性可以分离模式贡献和检测器贡献。
AI.conclusion: VSP成功实现了违规的持久化表示和审计历史图遍历；规则体独立性允许检测逻辑演进而不影响已积累的审计历史，为合规检测提供了模式与检测器分离的架构。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about knowledge graphs for compliance violations (legal/regulatory domain), dealing with GDPR compliance, audit trails, and business data. This has no connection to Computer Graphics, video-to-motion generation, cross-modal alignment, or any visual/spatial computing topics. It is an entirely different field (knowledge engineering vs computer graphics) and application domain (legal compliance vs animated motion synthesis).

title: BA-T: An Iterative Transformer for Two-View Bundle Adjustment
summary: Feed-forward models for 3D reconstruction have achieved strong performance using deep cross-view attention to exchange information across images. However, these approaches often depend on heavy decoder stacks and lack a structured mechanism for geometry refinement, resulting in poor multi-view consistency. We address this by drawing inspiration from classical bundle adjustment (BA), which can be viewed as an iterative information propagation process between poses and local geometry. Inspired by BA, we propose BA-T, an iterative Transformer that implements BA-style structured updates as a repeatable layer in implicit token space. Instead of relying on deep attention stacks, BA-T refines predictions based on latent residual by a single lightweight layer. Experiments demonstrate that BA-T progressively improves pose and reconstruction accuracy across iterations, achieves stronger cross-view consistency than conventional decoders, and matches or surpasses substantially larger models while using only 16% of their decoder parameters. BA-T provides a compact, efficient, and structural alternative to depth-heavy attention, enabling accurate 3D reconstruction within a lightweight architecture. The code will be made publicly at https://github.com/zhangganlin/BA-T.

AI.tldr: 提出BA-T，一种受经典束束调整(BA)启发的迭代Transformer，通过在隐式token空间中实现BA风格的结构化更新来实现轻量级3D重建，用仅16%的解码器参数达到与大型模型相当或更优的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3D重建模型依赖重型解码器堆栈，缺乏几何精化的结构化机制，导致多视图一致性较差。受经典束束调整(BA)可视为姿态与局部几何之间迭代信息传播过程的启发来解决此问题。
AI.method: BA-T将BA风格的结构化更新实现为隐式token空间中的可重复层，通过单一轻量层基于潜在残差精化预测，而非依赖深度注意力堆栈，实现迭代改进。
AI.result: 实验表明BA-T在迭代中逐步提升姿态和重建精度，比传统解码器获得更强的跨视图一致性，且仅使用16%的解码器参数即可匹配或超越大型模型。
AI.conclusion: BA-T提供了一种紧凑、高效且结构化的深度注意力替代方案，能够在轻量级架构中实现准确的3D重建，并实现姿态与几何的联合优化。

relevance_reason: While both papers deal with 3D content in Computer Graphics, the application domains are fundamentally different. This paper focuses on 3D reconstruction from multi-view images using bundle adjustment, not video-to-motion generation. It addresses geometric refinement for structure-from-motion, not cross-modal alignment between video and motion, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, or text-to-motion semantic alignment. Using similar Transformer architecture in different applications (3D reconstruction vs video-to-motion generation) does not constitute relevance.

title: InfoMem: Training Long-Context Memory Agents with Answer-Conditioned Information Gain
summary: Long-context tasks require LLMs to identify and preserve answer-relevant information from large contexts. Chunk-wise memory agents address this issue by sequentially reading document chunks, updating a compact memory, and generating the final answer from the accumulated memory. However, existing RL-based chunk-wise agents either rely on sparse final-answer rewards or use lexical intermediate rewards for memory and retrieval actions. These signals supervise task success or local overlap, but do not directly evaluate whether the final memory supports the ground-truth answer. We propose InfoMem, a reward mechanism for training chunk-wise memory agents that evaluates final-memory utility using answer-conditioned information. InfoMem measures how much the final memory increases the model's per-token log-likelihood of the ground-truth answer. To stabilize RL optimization, InfoMem applies this signal only to successful trajectories and normalizes it before reward composition. Under the same GRPO framework and training budget, InfoMem improves long-context memory-agent performance over comparable memory-agent RL baselines. Analyses show that effective final-memory rewards should operate on successful trajectories, be normalized before reward composition, and be conditioned on the answer rather than the query. Our code is available at https://github.com/GenSouKa1/InfoMem.

AI.tldr: InfoMem是一种针对长上下文任务中分块记忆智能体的奖励机制，通过评估最终记忆对真实答案的token级别对数似然增加量来提供奖励信号，帮助模型更有效地积累和利用上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的分块记忆智能体仅依赖稀疏的最终答案奖励或词汇级中间奖励，无法直接评估最终记忆是否真正支撑了正确答案。需要在最终记忆层面提供更直接的监督信号。
AI.method: InfoMem提出答案条件的信息奖励机制，衡量最终记忆对模型预测真实答案的per-token log-likelihood的提升程度。该信号仅应用于成功轨迹，并在奖励组合前进行归一化处理，以稳定强化学习优化。
AI.result: 在相同GRPO框架和训练预算下，InfoMem相比其他记忆智能体强化学习基线方法提升了长上下文记忆智能体的性能。分析表明有效的最终记忆奖励应仅在成功轨迹上操作。
AI.conclusion: 答案条件且经过归一化处理的最终记忆奖励机制能够显著改善分块记忆智能体在长上下文任务上的表现，为训练更高效的记忆智能体提供了新的奖励设计思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about training long-context memory agents for language models using reinforcement learning (Answer-Conditioned Information Gain rewards). This is in the NLP/AI agents domain, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focusing on video-to-motion conversion, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, and visual quality assessment using VLMs. There is no application domain match, no method overlap, and it does not address any of the stated pain points.

title: TASE: Truncation-Aware Semantic Embeddings for 3D Scene Understanding and Editing
summary: High-fidelity semantic 3D scene representations are crucial for numerous applications, including robotics, autonomous driving, and simulation. Beyond this, the ability to edit such representations enables developers to adapt these applications more easily to specific target scenarios. Current approaches provide limited support for controllable editing. We introduce TASE, a method that projects pretrained 2D semantic features into a truncation-aware embedding space to enable flexible 3D scene editing. Our method explicitly optimizes a feature space in which progressively reducing feature channels yields increasingly abstract semantic representations, while retaining more channels preserves fine-grained detail. Additionally, we improve multi-view consistency of the features using a scale- and translation-equivariance loss. The resulting truncation-aware embedding space enables text-driven edits to 3D scenes, providing explicit control over how strongly edits adhere to the original scene content and allowing more substantial modifications than prior methods. Moreover, we propose a finetuning stage for the editing diffusion model to mitigate artifacts caused by geometric changes. Experimental results demonstrate competitive performance in 3D scene editing, substantially outperforming prior methods on edits involving large geometric modifications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TASE方法,通过将预训练的2D语义特征投影到截断感知嵌入空间,实现高保真3D场景的灵活编辑,并支持文本驱动的编辑控制。
AI.motivation: 当前3D场景表示方法对可控编辑的支持有限,需要一种能够灵活编辑、可控制编辑强度的方法,以便更容易适应特定目标应用场景。
AI.method: 提出截断感知嵌入空间:将2D语义特征投影到该空间,逐步减少特征通道得更抽象表示,保留更多通道则保留细节;使用尺度和平移等变损失提高多视图一致性;引入编辑扩散模型的微调阶段以减轻几何变化产生的伪影。
AI.result: 在3D场景编辑任务中达到有竞争力的性能,在涉及大几何修改的编辑上显著优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: TASE方法成功实现了高保真3D场景的可控编辑,为机器人、自动驾驶和模拟等应用提供了更灵活的解决方案。

relevance_reason: While this paper is in Computer Graphics, its application domain is completely different from the research profile. The research profile focuses on VIDEO-TO-MOTION conversion (converting 2D video to 3D human motion sequences), while this paper addresses 3D SCENE EDITING (static geometry manipulation for architectural/scene content). These are fundamentally different: generating temporal human motion vs. editing static 3D scene geometry. The paper does use some similar concepts (2D feature projection), but it doesn't address any of the four pain points (video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency, visual quality guidance, text-to-motion semantics). No overlap in target application.

title: CP-Agent: Context-Aware Multimodal Reasoning for Cellular Morphological Profiling under Chemical Perturbations
summary: Cell Painting combines multiplexed fluorescent staining, high-content imaging, and quantitative analysis to generate high-dimensional phenotypic readouts to support diverse downstream tasks such as mechanism-of-action (MoA) inference, toxicity prediction, and construction of drug-disease atlases. However, existing workflows are slow, costly and difficult to interpret. Approaches for drug screening modeling predominantly focus on molecular representation learning, while neglecting actual experimental context (e.g., cell line, dosing schedule, etc.), limiting generalization and MoA resolution. We introduce CP-Agent, an agentic multimodal large language model (MLLM) capable of generating mechanism-relevant, human-interpretable rationales for cell morphological changes under drug perturbations. At its core, CP-Agent leverages a context-aware alignment module, CP-CLIP, that jointly embeds high-content images and experimental metadata to enable robust treatment and MoA discrimination (achieving a maximum F1-score of 0.896). By integrating CP-CLIP outputs with agentic tool usage and reasoning, CP-Agent compiles rationales into a structured report to guide experimental design and hypothesis refinement. These capabilities highlight CP-Agent's potential to accelerate drug discovery by enabling more interpretable, scalable, and context-aware phenotypic screening -- streamlining iterative cycles of hypothesis generation in drug discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CP-Agent，一种用于细胞成像（Cell Painting）的多模态大语言模型，能够生成药物诱导下细胞形态变化的可解释性理由。核心模块CP-CLIP联合嵌入高内涵图像和实验元数据，实现治疗和作用机制（MoA）区分。
AI.motivation: 现有Cell Painting工作流程缓慢、昂贵且难以解释；当前药物筛选建模方法主要关注分子表示学习，忽略了实际实验背景（如细胞系、给药方案等），限制了模型的泛化能力和作用机制分辨率。
AI.method: CP-Agent通过上下文感知对齐模块CP-CLIP，联合嵌入高内涵图像和实验元数据，实现稳健的治疗和MoA鉴别；结合智能体工具使用和推理能力，将理由编译成结构化报告以指导实验设计和假设优化。
AI.result: CP-CLIP在治疗和MoA区分上达到了最高0.896的F1分数
AI.conclusion: CP-Agent有望加速药物发现，使表型筛选更加可解释、可扩展和具上下文意识——简化药物发现中的迭代假设生成循环

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about cellular morphological profiling for drug discovery (biomedical imaging), not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. While CP-Agent uses multimodal reasoning and CLIP-like embeddings, these methods are applied to analyze cell painting images for treatment/MoA classification, which has no connection to video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency in motion synthesis, or any computer graphics applications. The entire context is biomedical/biological research rather than graphics/motion generation.

title: Cross-Modality Feature Fusion Based on Structured State Space Duality for Multimodal Image Registration Network
summary: In multi-modal image registration, the primary challenge lies in shared structural information extraction. Compared to Transformers, Structured State Space Duality (SSD) offers greater global structural feature extraction with higher efficiency during training and inference. Inspired by these advantages, we propose a novel algorithm for multi-modal image registration, named RegNetMamba-2. Our algorithm incorporates SSD into coarse-to-fine matching process to extract local and global structural features effectively. Firstly, SSD is applied in three different scales for multi-modal feature extraction in our network. To strengthen local representation, we pay more attention on foreground edge and structural information by feature scaling function of SSD. Secondly, for shared feature extraction of input images and multi-modal feature fusion in all scales, we propose cross-modality feature fusion model based on SSD, consisting of Cross-Modality feature Interaction (CMI) module and Multi-Scale feature Fusion (MSF) module. CMI module is designed for cross-modality feature extraction of each scale by SSD in cross form. MSF module is designed to employ a progressive upward fusion in feature-level to obtain fine features, consisting of multi-modal features in all scales. Following coarse-to-fine, the features in 1/8 scale from CMI and 1/2 scale from MSF are collected to calculate matching probability scores. Then we respectively establish matching process by correspondences of pixel-wise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that comparing with state-of-the-art deep-learning based algorithms, RegNetMamba-2 has achieved good effects in both performance and efficiency for multi-modal image registration on the following datasets: VIS-SAR (OSDataset), VIS-IR (LGHD/RoadSence) and VIS-NIR (RGB-NIR sense).

AI.tldr: RegNetMamba-2是一种新型的多模态图像配准算法，将结构化状态空间对偶性（SSD）引入粗到细匹配过程中，在三个不同尺度上进行多模态特征提取，并通过跨模态特征交互模块和多尺度特征融合模块实现共享特征提取和特征融合，在VIS-SAR、VIS-IR和VIS-NIR数据集上实现了良好的性能和效率。
AI.motivation: 多模态图像配准的主要挑战在于提取共享结构信息。相比Transformer，SSD在训练和推理中能够以更高效率提取全局结构特征。
AI.method: 首先在三个不同尺度应用SSD进行多模态特征提取，通过SSD的特征缩放函数增强前景边缘和结构信息的局部表示；其次提出基于SSD的跨模态特征融合模型，包含跨模态特征交互（CMI）模块和多尺度特征融合（MSF）模块，分别用于跨模态特征提取和渐进式向上融合；最后按照粗到细策略，使用CMI的1/8尺度和MSF的1/2尺度特征计算匹配概率分数，进行像素级对应匹配。
AI.result: RegNetMamba-2在VIS-SAR（OSDataset）、VIS-IR（LGHD/RoadSence）和VIS-NIR（RGB-NIR sense）数据集上进行广泛实验，表明其在性能和效率方面均优于最先进的深度学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的RegNetMamba-2算法通过引入SSD到多模态图像配准任务中，有效提取了局部和全局结构特征，在多个公开数据集上取得了优异的配准效果。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses multimodal IMAGE REGISTRATION (matching visible to SAR/infrared images) which is a computer vision/remote sensing task, NOT Computer Graphics. While it uses cross-modal feature extraction, the application domain is completely different from video-to-3D motion generation. The goal here is pixel-level spatial correspondence between static images, not temporal motion synthesis or video-to-motion conversion. Despite both mentioning "cross-modal" and using SSD for feature extraction, they solve fundamentally different problems in unrelated fields.

title: What Makes Interaction Trajectories Effective for Training Terminal Agents?
summary: Stronger code agents are commonly assumed to be superior teachers for post-training, yet this assumption remains poorly disentangled from task difficulty, harness design, and student capacity. We investigate this pedagogical link using Terminal-Lego, a scalable pipeline that transforms multi-domain real-world issues into environment-verified agentic tasks. Surprisingly, standalone performance does not dictate teaching efficacy: while Claude Opus 4.6 achieves higher scores on Terminal-Bench 2.0, students fine-tuned on trajectories from DeepSeek-V3.2, a lower-scoring agent, exhibit significantly stronger generalization. We attribute this "pedagogical paradox" to Environment-Grounded Supervision (EGS): trajectories that explicitly expose inspect-act-verify behaviors through harness-visible interactions allow students to internalize robust problem-solving routines rather than fragile action sequences. Scaling analysis reveals exceptional data efficiency: with only 15.3k Terminal-Lego trajectories, for example, Qwen3-32B achieves a 24.3% score on Terminal-Bench 2.0, rivaling previous SOTA performance established with over 30x the data volume. Our results suggest that the frontier of agent post-training lies beyond mere outcome-matching, shifting the focus toward "Harness Engineering", where the systematic design of environment-grounded interaction structures serves as the primary catalyst for reproducible and generalizable agentic intelligence.

AI.tldr: 研究代码智能体在post-training中的教学效果，发现standalone性能不决定教学质量的"教育学悖论"，提出Environment-Grounded Supervision (EGS)方法，仅用15.3k数据即达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 当前假设更强的代码智能体是更好的教师，但这一假设未考虑任务难度、智能体容量等因素，需要验证教学效果与standalone性能的真正关系。
AI.method: 使用Terminal-Lego管道将真实世界问题转化为环境验证的智能体任务，比较不同智能体(Claude Opus 4.6 vs DeepSeek-V3.2)的教学轨迹效果，进行scaling分析。
AI.result: DeepSeek-V3.2(较低分数)训练的学生比Claude Opus 4.6(更高分数)训练的学生泛化更强；Qwen3-32B仅用15.3k数据就在Terminal-Bench 2.0上达到24.3%分数，媲美之前需30x数据的SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 教学效果取决于显式暴露inspect-act-verify行为的轨迹，而非分数本身；未来关键是"Harness Engineering" - 系统设计环境grounded交互结构而非outcome-matching。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. It focuses on training code-writing/intelligent agents using Terminal-Lego pipeline, comparing Claude vs DeepSeek models for teaching effectiveness. Despite mentioning "trajectories," these are interaction trajectories for agent training, not 3D motion trajectories. There is no connection to video-to-motion conversion, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, or any of the specified pain points in computer graphics/motion generation.

title: Beyond Semantics: Modeling Factual and Affective Perceptual Experiences from Vision-Language Data
summary: We present P-Topics (Perception Topics) modeling, a novel problem for understanding how images are perceived affectively and across cultures. The goal is to (1) discover and model the different perception experiences in a dataset of images and captions, where each experience is defined by an objective factual and a subjective affective aspect, and (2) associate images to their relevant perception experiences. We introduce **PercepT** (**Percep**tion topic **T**ransformer), a two-stage architecture that tackles P-Topics modeling. In the formation stage, percepT discovers *P-Topics* as visual-textual clusters using an unsupervised training objective, and dynamically selects the number of clusters to match the perceptual richness of the dataset. In the mapping stage, it learns *P-Topic mapping functions* via attention pooling to associate images to their respective clusters. On ArtELingo, PercepT achieves a silhouette score of **0.97** compared to **0.37** from the closest baseline reflecting better perceptual clusters. PercepT also achieves an AUC score of **0.94** compared to **0.77** showing better mapping to perceptual clusters. Human evaluation confirms that PercepT captures semantically meaningful perception experiences and significantly outperforms existing methods. Our implementation will be made public.

AI.tldr: 提出P-Topics（感知主题）建模新问题，旨在理解图像在不同文化中的情感感知方式。PercepT是一个两阶段架构，用于发现图像感知体验并将其映射到相关主题。
AI.motivation: 解决如何在数据集中发现和建模不同的感知体验，以及如何将图像与其相关的感知体验关联起来的问题。这些感知体验包含客观事实和主观情感两个方面。
AI.method: 提出PercepT（感知主题转换器），采用两阶段架构：1）形成阶段通过无监督训练目标发现P-Topics作为视觉-文本聚类，动态选择聚类数量；2）映射阶段通过注意力池学习P-Topic映射函数，将图像与对应聚类关联。
AI.result: 在ArtELingo数据集上，PercepT实现轮廓系数0.97（对比基线0.37），AUC得分0.94（对比基线0.77）。人类评估确认其能捕捉语义上有意义的感知体验并显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: P-Topics建模为理解跨文化图像情感感知提供了新框架，PercepT能有效发现感知主题聚类并实现准确的图像-主题映射，性能显著优于现有基线方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cross-modal vision-language modeling for understanding cultural/emotional perceptual experiences from images (NLP/CV domain), while the research profile is on Computer Graphics specifically for video-to-3D-motion generation. Although both deal with vision-language alignment, the application domains are completely different: this paper studies how people emotionally perceive images in different cultures, not how to convert 2D video to 3D motion. It does not address any of the research profile's pain points (temporal consistency, quality control, cross-modal feature alignment for motion generation), nor does it use relevant methods like video generation models or 3D motion generation models.

title: DMF: A Deterministic Memory Framework for Conversational AI Agents
summary: Conversational AI agents require memory systems that are both scalable and semantically coherent across long interaction horizons. Existing approaches rely predominantly on large language model (LLM)-based summarisation at write time, which introduces non-determinism, escalating token costs, and opacity in pruning decisions. We present the Deterministic Memory Framework (DMF), a CPU-first approach that replaces generative memory compression with a fully deterministic pipeline grounded in classical NLP analysis, vector geometry, and mathematical scoring. DMF assigns each conversational interaction a Survival Score $Ω$ computed from deterministic content signals, conversational cues, and structured provenance, combined through a logistic projection. An interaction-count decay law, denoted as $Ω_{\mathrm{eff}}(Δn)$, governs how relevance evolves as new turns arrive, where $Δn$ is the number of newer interactions rather than wall-clock time, preserving full determinism. We present the mathematical formulation of DMF, its structured recall pipeline, the pruning decision procedure, and the evaluation protocol. Experiments are conducted on a purpose-built benchmark using the LoCoMo and LongMemEval datasets. We compare DMF against Mem0, a popular memory layer for AI agents. DMF achieves comparable accuracy while using zero tokens to prepare the memory context and 5x to 242x fewer tokens over the entire conversation. These results show that it is possible to eliminate LLM calls from the memory-management loop, reducing token costs to nearly zero and enabling deterministic memory systems for conversational AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMF框架，用确定性数学评分替代LLM生成式压缩，实现零tokens准备上下文，5x-242x降低整体token消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有对话AI记忆系统依赖LLM进行写时摘要，导致非确定性、token成本激增和修剪决策不透明的问题。
AI.method: DMF采用经典NLP分析、向量几何和数学评分替代生成式压缩。每个对话交互计算生存分数Ω（逻辑投影），通过交互数量衰减律Ω_eff(Δn)而非wall-clock时间驱动相关性演化，形成结构化召回管道和修剪决策流程。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和LongMemEval数据集上与Mem0对比，DMF达到相当准确率，记忆上下文准备零tokens，全程消耗降低5倍至242倍。
AI.conclusion: 可从记忆管理循环中完全消除LLM调用，将token成本降至近零，实现完全确定性的对话AI记忆系统。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Conversational AI memory systems (deterministic memory framework for LLM agents), completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. It addresses token cost reduction in dialogue systems, not video-to-motion conversion, cross-modal alignment, or 3D motion generation. No overlap with video generation models, VLM quality assessment, or any graphics/motion synthesis methods.

title: SynCred-Bench: Benchmarking Synthetic Credibility in AI-Generated Visual Misinformation
summary: Recent generative models can now produce visual artifacts with realistic embedded text and layouts, creating a new misinformation threat: synthetic credibility. We introduce SYNCRED-Bench, a benchmark of 600 AI-generated misinformation images balanced across six credible-form categories and seven fine-grained circulation styles, together with FP450, a real-image negative set for measuring false positives. Extensive evaluation shows that existing systems remain unreliable: under a 5% false-positive-rate constraint, 15 MLLMs achieve only 10.5% true positive rate (TPR), open-source AIGC detectors achieve less than 5%, and commercial APIs reach 57.6%. Human annotators also struggled to identify synthetic credibility, reaching only 63% TPR. These findings establish synthetic credibility as a severe and underexplored visual misinformation challenge, and provide a benchmark for developing detectors that reason beyond superficial credibility cues.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了合成可信度（synthetic credibility）这一新型视觉虚假信息威胁，即生成模型可以创建带有逼真嵌入文本和布局的视觉内容。研究者构建了SYNCRED-Bench基准（含600张AI生成的虚假信息图像）和FP450真实图像负集，用于评估现有检测系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 生成模型如今可以生成带有逼真嵌入文本和布局的视觉产物，形成了新的虚假信息威胁：合成可信度。这是一个严重但尚未被充分探索的视觉虚假信息挑战。
AI.method: 构建了SYNCRED-Bench基准数据集，包含600张AI生成的虚假信息图像，平衡分布在六个可信形式类别和七个细粒度传播风格中；同时构建了FP450真实图像负集用于测量误报率。对15个多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）、开源AIGC检测器和商业API进行了广泛评估，并在5%误报率约束下测试了真阳性率（TPR）。
AI.result: 在5%误报率约束下，现有系统仍然不可靠：15个MLLMs仅达到10.5%的真阳性率，开源AIGC检测器低于5%，商业API达到57.6%。人类标注者也难以识别合成可信度，仅达到63%的真阳性率。
AI.conclusion: 合成可信度是一个严重且尚未被充分探索的视觉虚假信息挑战。该研究为开发能够超越表面可信度线索进行推理的检测器提供了基准数据集和评估框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on video-to-motion conversion (generating 3D motion from 2D video) and cross-modal alignment for motion generation. The paper is about image forensics/misinformation detection - identifying AI-generated fake images. Although both involve visual AI, they are in completely different application domains: motion generation vs. fake image detection. The methods are also unrelated - this paper doesn't address any of the four pain points (cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency, quality control for motion generation, or text-to-motion semantic alignment).

title: StepFinder: A Temporal Semantic Framework for Failure Attribution in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems exhibit remarkable collaborative capabilities in complex multi-step tasks. However, these systems are highly sensitive to single-step execution errors that can propagate through agent interactions and lead to cascading failures. To understand the causes of failure and improve system reliability, failure attribution has been introduced as a task that aims to automatically identify the root cause step responsible for a failure. Existing failure attribution methods mainly rely on LLMs to reason over original execution trajectories, which not only incur high inference costs and latency, but also suffer from interference caused by redundant and noisy execution logs, causing LLMs to struggle in accurately identifying the true root cause step. To address this, we propose StepFinder, a lightweight failure attribution framework. We use LLMs solely during the feature construction phase to encode execution logs into temporal semantic sequences. Subsequently, a parameter-efficient combination of temporal modeling and attention modules is applied to capture the sequential evolution and cross-step dependencies of the trajectories. Finally, the step-level error score is refined through multi-scale differences and position bias, enabling precise root cause identification. Experimental results on the Who&When benchmark demonstrate that StepFinder outperforms LLM-based methods in step-level failure attribution while achieving substantially higher inference efficiency, reducing inference time by 79% compared with the fastest LLM-based method, with no text generation overhead. Our code is available at https://github.com/taiyu-zhu/StepFinder.

AI.tldr: 提出了StepFinder，一个轻量级失败归因框架，用于在LLM多智能体系统中自动识别导致级联故障的根因步骤。该方法先用LLM编码执行日志为时序语义序列，再用参数高效的时序建模和注意力模块捕捉轨迹的跨步骤依赖性，最后通过多尺度差异和位置偏差精炼步骤级错误分数。
AI.motivation: 现有失败归因方法完全依赖LLM推理原始执行轨迹，存在高推理成本和高延迟问题，且冗余噪声的执行日志干扰LLM准确识别真正根因步骤，导致效率和准确性不足。
