AI.method: StepFinder分为三阶段：1) 仅在特征构建阶段使用LLM将执行日志编码为时序语义序列；2) 采用参数高效的时序建模和注意力模块组合，捕捉轨迹的时序演化和跨步依赖；3) 通过多尺度差异和位置偏差精炼步骤级错误分数，实现精确根因识别。
AI.result: 在Who&When基准上的实验表明，StepFinder在步骤级失败归因上优于基于LLM的方法，推理效率显著提升，比最快的LLM方法减少79%推理时间，且无文本生成开销。
AI.conclusion: StepFinder是一种高效的失败归因框架，通过分离LLM使用和轻量级时序建模，实现了高精度根因识别和高效率推理的平衡，为提升LLM多智能体系统可靠性提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses failure attribution in LLM multi-agent systems - a completely different field from Computer Graphics. While both mention "temporal modeling" and "attention," the application domain has NO overlap with video-to-motion generation, 3D motion synthesis, or cross-modal alignment between video and 3D representations. The research profile focuses on visual motion generation, while this paper deals with debugging LLM agent execution traces.

title: P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO: Grounding Hallucination in Perceptual Processing via Calibration Direct Preference Optimization
summary: Hallucination has recently garnered significant research attention in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aims to learn directly from the corrected preferences provided by humans, thereby addressing the hallucination issue. Despite its success, this paradigm has yet to specifically target the perceptual bottleneck in attended regions or address insufficient Visual Robustness against image degradation. Furthermore, existing preference pairs are often vision-agnostic and their inherently off-policy nature limits their effectiveness in guiding model learning. To address these challenges, we propose Perceptual Processing Direct Preference Optimization (P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO), a novel training paradigm in which the model generates and learns from its own preference pairs, thereby directly addressing the identified visual bottlenecks while inherently avoiding the issues of vision-agnostic and off-policy data. It introduces: (1) an on-policy preference pairs construction method targeting Focus-and-Enhance perception and Visual Robustness, and (2) a well-designed Calibration Loss to precisely align visual signals with the causal generation of text. Experimental results demonstrate that with a comparable amount of training data and cost, P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO outperforms strong baselines that rely on costly human feedback on benchmarks. Furthermore, evaluations on Attention Region Fidelity (ARF) and image degradation scenarios validate the effectiveness of P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO in addressing perceptual bottleneck in attended regions and improving Visual Robustness against degraded inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出P²‑DPO，通过自生成(on‑policy)偏好对聚焦增强感知与视觉鲁棒性，显著降低大视觉语言模型中的幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有直接偏好优化(DPO)未专门解决注意区域的感知瓶颈，且使用的偏好数据往往是视觉无关(vision‑agnostic)且离策略(off‑policy)，导致对图像退化的鲁棒性不足，因而需要新的训练范式。
AI.method: ①构建针对“聚焦‑增强感知”(Focus‑and‑Enhance)和“视觉鲁棒性”的on‑policy偏好对；②设计校正损失(Calibration Loss)将视觉信号与文本生成的因果关系精确对齐。
AI.result: 在同等规模训练数据和计算成本下，P²‑DPO在多个基准上超越依赖昂贵人类反馈的强基线；在注意力区域保真度(ARF)和图像退化场景中显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: P²‑DPO能够针对性解决感知瓶颈并增强对退化输入的视觉鲁棒性，为大型视觉语言模型的 hallucinations 问题提供了一种高效、可扩展的训练方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses hallucination reduction in Large Visual Language Models (LVLMs) for multimodal understanding tasks, which is fundamentally different from Computer Graphics' video-to-3D motion generation. While the research profile focuses on cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, and quality control for visual guidance in motion generation, this paper targets perceptual processing and visual-text alignment in LLM contexts. The VLM usage differs: the paper treats VLMs as end tasks fortext generation from images, whereas the profile uses VLMs for quality assessment in graphics pipelines. These are completely different application domains with no direct overlap.

title: Towards Characterizing Scientific Image Utility and Upgradability
summary: Scientific images function as critical evidence in research communication, yet their integrity faces unprecedented threats from AI-generated content that introduces subtle but consequential errors. Existing evaluation paradigms prove inadequate: perceptual quality metrics poorly correlate with scientific validity, while language models lack domain-specific verification capabilities. To address this gap, we propose the \textbf{S}cientific \textbf{I}mage \textbf{U}tility and \textbf{U}pgradability \textbf{A}ssessment (\textbf{SIU$^2$A}) framework, which introduces two complementary dimensions for scientific image evaluation. \textbf{Utility} encompasses \textit{error detection} (identifying scientific inaccuracies) and \textit{correction feasibility} (assessing whether errors can be reliably repaired). \textbf{Upgradability} measures the quality of correction. We categorize scientific image corruption into four fundamental types: Detail Distortion, Incompleteness, False Content, and Entity Confusion. Based on this taxonomy, we construct SIU$^2$A-Benchmark, a dataset with expert annotations for error identification and repair. The framework implements a two-stage evaluation protocol: the \textit{Utility} stage evaluates error detection capability and repair instruction generation, while the \textit{Upgradability} stage assesses whether corrections faithfully restore scientific validity without compromising existing accurate information. Experiments reveal that current multimodal systems exhibit significant limitations in both scientific error assessment and faithful correction, exposing a fundamental gap between visual perception and scientific usability.

AI.tldr: 提出了SIU²A框架，用于评估科学图像的实用性和可升级性，涵盖错误检测、修正可行性和修正质量评估，构建了SIU²A-Benchmark数据集，表明当前多模态系统在科学错误评估方面存在显著局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有评估范式不足：感知质量指标与科学有效性相关性差，语言模型缺乏领域特定的验证能力。AI生成内容对科学图像完整性构成新威胁。
AI.method: 提出SIU²A框架，包含两个维度：实用性（错误检测和修正可行性）和可升级性（修正质量）；将图像 corruption分为四类：细节扭曲、不完整性、虚假内容和实体混淆；构建专家注释的SIU²A-Benchmark数据集；实施两阶段评估协议。
AI.result: 当前多模态系统在科学错误评估和忠实修正方面存在显著局限性，暴露了视觉感知与科学可用性之间的根本差距。
AI.conclusion: 需要开发更好的领域特定验证能力，以弥合视觉感知与科学可用性之间的差距。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically for video-to-3D motion generation (cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion). The paper is about scientific image utility evaluation (medical/scientific diagram imagery). Even though both touch on "quality assessment," the context is entirely different - one evaluates video generation for motion synthesis, the other evaluates scientific image accuracy/fidelity. Also, no mention of video generation models (Seedance), 3D motion generation, or any cross-modal video-to-motion pipelines.

title: ThoughtFold: Folding Reasoning Chains via Introspective Preference Learning
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have achieved remarkable progress thanks to Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) on Chain-of-Thoughts (CoTs). However, since long CoTs naturally contain trial and errors and mainstream RLVR approaches choose outcome-correct CoT trajectories for memorization, the redundant explorations in long CoTs are inevitably reinforced, which results in the over-thinking issues of LRMs. Previous attempts to resolve this issue mainly give more advantage to shorter trajectories, yet their learning signals are still outcome-based and cannot reduce the memorization of redundant explorations in long CoTs. Therefore, we propose ThoughtFold, a framework that leverages fine-grained preference learning to mitigate redundant explorations for efficient reasoning. ThoughtFold employs an introspective strategy to identify redundancy within each correct trajectory, which yields a spectrum of candidate sub-trajectories. Leveraging this spectrum, we introduce a masked preference optimization objective that explicitly penalizes redundant explorations and encourages the model to directly bridge essential reasoning segments, effectively folding its reasoning chains into a more concise path. Extensive experiments show that ThoughtFold significantly enhances efficiency. It reduces the token usage of DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B by approximately 56% while maintaining state-of-the-art accuracy.

AI.tldr: ThoughtFold框架通过细粒度偏好学习解决大型推理模型的过度思考问题，将冗长的思维链折叠成高效简洁的推理路径。
AI.motivation: 长思维链(CoT)自然包含试错过程，主流RLVR方法选择结果正确的轨迹进行记忆化，导致冗余探索被强化产生过度思考问题。之前方法给短轨迹优势但仍基于结果学习，无法减少冗余探索的记忆化。
AI.method: ThoughtFold采用内省策略识别每个正确轨迹中的冗余性，生成候选子轨迹谱；引入掩码偏好优化目标明确惩罚冗余探索，鼓励模型直接连接基本推理段，将推理链折叠成更简洁路径。
AI.result: 显著提升效率，DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B令牌使用减少约56%同时保持最先进准确性。
AI.conclusion: ThoughtFold通过细粒度偏好学习有效缓解冗余探索，实现高效推理，为LRM效率优化提供新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about optimizing reasoning chains in Large Language Models (reducing token usage in LLM inference). It has no connection to Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal alignment between video and motion. The application domain is fundamentally different - LLM optimization vs. video-to-motion conversion in computer graphics.

title: Mamba-Enhanced Implicit Motion Learning for Audio-Driven Portrait Animation
summary: Audio-driven human motion video generation aims to synthesize realistic and temporally coherent human animations from a single static image, with applications in talking-head synthesis, co-speech gesture generation, and dynamic presentations. Moving beyond conventional keypoint-based methods that often struggle to capture subtle motion dynamics, We propose a novel implicit-motion framework for generating realistic and temporally coherent human motion videos from a single static image and audio. Our approach uses a two-stage pipeline that decouples motion prediction from rendering. The first stage integrates appearance priors and hierarchical depth cues into a region-aware attention mechanism to model latent motion features. The second stage employs a Mamba-enhanced diffusion model to directly predict these features from audio and the source image, enabling unsupervised learning of fine-grained motion patterns. This decoupled architecture enhances flexibility and efficiency. Trained on a new 380-hour high-quality dataset, our method outperforms prior work across multiple public benchmarks and our collected data in accuracy, naturalness, and temporal coherence, setting a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式运动的两阶段音频驱动人体动作视频生成框架，从单张静态图像和音频合成逼真、时间一致的人体动画。
AI.motivation: 现有基于关键点的方法难以捕捉细微运动动态，需要更灵活的架构来实现高质量的说话头部合成、共手势生成和动态演示。
AI.method: 两阶段管道：阶段一整合外观先验和层级深度线索到区域感知注意力机制建模潜在运动特征；阶段二使用Mamba增强的扩散模型直接从音频和源图像预测这些特征，实现细粒度运动模式的无监督学习。
AI.result: 在380小时高质量数据集上训练后，该方法在多个公开基准和我们收集的数据上优于先前工作，在准确性、自然性和时间一致性方面达到最优。
AI.conclusion: 解耦运动预测与渲染的架构提高了灵活性和效率，建立了音频驱动人体动作视频生成的新技术标杆。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses audio-driven portrait animation (talking head synthesis), which is a DIFFERENT application domain from the research profile's focus on 2D video-to-3D motion conversion. While both involve temporal consistency as a pain point, the paper generates 2D video output from audio+image, not converting 2D video to 3D motion data. The core task (audio-to-video generation vs video-to-motion conversion) is fundamentally different. Some overlap in using diffusion models exists, but the application domain mismatch makes this only marginally relevant - it's similar methods but wrong application.

title: Overlaying Governance: A Compositional Authorization Framework for Delegation and Scope in Agentic AI
summary: As AI systems evolve from passive models into autonomous active agents capable of initiating actions, collaborating, and delegating tasks, the traditional boundaries of software systems blur. Traditional authorization and delegation frameworks, built around fixed principals, explicit requests, and static scopes, are insufficient to govern agentic systems. Agentic AI demands richer authorization semantics: agents must inherit and delegate permissions, act under time-limited authority, and coordinate through shared protocols. Existing Identity and Access Management (IAM) systems fail to fully capture this notion of agency, lacking mechanisms for recursive delegation, contextual boundaries, and dynamic scoping as executable governance primitives. Unlike access delegation standards such as OAuth 2.0, we treat delegation as a contractual term rather than merely a static token-based consent credential. This paper proposes a compositional governance framework that introduces primitives indispensable for agentic AI. We define types of delegation and their permissions and accountability implications, and we introduce a notion of resource scope attenuation to bound agentic access envelopes. These concepts are expressed as general relational definitions that can be composed into existing authorization domains (e.g., financial systems). To operationalize this composition, we define a compositional operator that overlays new agentic semantics, such as recursive delegation chains, onto existing relational policies without rewriting them. We substantiate this framework through formal proofs and empirical evaluation, showing that it provides a formal yet practical foundation for accountable authorization in agentic AI systems.

AI.tldr: 针对传统IAM系统无法支持具备自主行动、协作和任务委托能力的智能体AI的问题，提出了一种组合治理框架，引入了资源范围衰减、可递归委托链等原语，为智能体AI提供可追责的授权语义。
AI.motivation: 传统授权框架基于固定主体、显式请求和静态权限范围，无法治理具备自主性和协作能力的智能体AI系统。现有身份与访问管理系统缺乏递归委托、上下文边界和动态作用域等机制。
AI.method: 将委托视为契约条款而非静态令牌同意凭证，定义委托类型及其权限和追责含义，引入资源范围衰减来约束智能体访问范围。通过组合算子将新的智能体语义叠加到现有关系策略上。
AI.result: 提供了一种形式化且实用的智能体AI可追责授权基础，可应用于金融系统等领域。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过形式化证明和实证评估验证了其有效性，为智能体AI系统的可追责授权提供了正式而实用的基础。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The research profile is in Computer Graphics focused on video-to-3D motion generation with cross-modal alignment, while this paper is about authorization frameworks and Identity Access Management (IAM) for Agentic AI systems. This is a security/governance paper, not a computer graphics or motion generation paper. None of the methods or application areas align - it deals with delegation chains, resource scope attenuation, and accountability in AI systems, completely unrelated to video generation, motion synthesis, or visual quality assessment.

title: SAMatcher: Co-Visibility Modeling with Segment Anything for Robust Feature Matching
summary: Reliable correspondence estimation is a fundamental problem in image processing, underpinning applications such as Structure from Motion, visual localization, and image registration. Existing learning-based methods have significantly improved local feature representations, yet most still operate at the pixel or patch level and lack explicit modeling of regions that are jointly visible across views. We propose SAMatcher, a feature matching framework that formulates correspondence estimation through co-visibility modeling. Instead of directly matching local features, SAMatcher first predicts co-visible region masks and bounding boxes as structured priors for correspondence estimation. Built upon the Segment Anything Model (SAM), it introduces a symmetric cross-view interaction mechanism that enables bidirectional feature exchange and cross-view semantic alignment. We further develop a unified supervision scheme that jointly optimizes mask prediction and box localization through mask learning, box regression, and mask-box consistency constraints. Extensive experiments on challenging benchmarks demonstrate substantial improvements over existing matching pipelines, particularly under large viewpoint and scale variations. Our results show that foundation models originally designed for monocular segmentation can be effectively extended to multi-view correspondence reasoning through explicit co-visibility modeling, offering a new perspective on structured representation learning for image matching. Code and project page: https://xupan.top/Projects/samatcher

AI.tldr: SAMatcher是一种基于共可见性建模的特征匹配框架，通过在Segment Anything Model (SAM)基础上预测共可见区域 masks 和边界框作为结构化先验，实现跨视角特征交换与语义对齐，在大规模视角和尺度变化场景下显著优于现有匹配方法。
AI.motivation: 可靠的对应关系估计是图像处理的基础问题，支撑着运动恢复结构、视觉定位和图像配准等应用。现有学习方法虽然改进了局部特征表示，但大多在像素或patch级别操作，缺乏对跨视图联合可见区域的显式建模，需要区域级别的对应推理能力。
AI.method: 提出共可见性建模的对应估计框架：1) 基于SAM预测共可见区域mask和边界框作为结构化先验；2) 引入对称跨视角交互机制实现双向特征交换和跨视角语义对齐；3) 开发统一监督方案，联合优化mask预测、box回归和mask-box一致性约束。
AI.result: 在挑战性基准数据集上实验表明，相较于现有匹配管道获得实质性提升，尤其在大视角和尺度变化条件下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 证明原本为单目分割设计的基础模型可以通过显式共可见性建模有效扩展到多视角对应推理，为图像匹配的_structured表示学习提供了新视角。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses 2D image-to-image feature matching (multi-view correspondence) for Structure from Motion, which is a computer vision task rather than computer graphics motion generation. While it uses cross-modal feature alignment concepts and VLMs (SAM), the application domain is fundamentally different: the research profile focuses on video-to-3D motion conversion, while this paper focuses on 2D multi-view image matching for SfM/localization. The paper lacks any connection to video generation, motion synthesis, or temporal consistency - core pain points in the research profile.

title: SAGE: A Quantitative Evaluation of Socialized Evolution in Agent Ecosystems
summary: Self-improving language agents are typically evaluated in isolation: an agent attempts a task, receives feedback, and iteratively refines its own behavior. Yet agents increasingly operate alongside peers whose strategies and outcomes are publicly visible. This raises an under-studied question: when does shared experience produce improvements that self-improvement alone cannot achieve? We introduce SAGE (Social Agent Group Evolution),an evaluation framework that compares two compute-matched conditions: SocialEvo, where agents from five distinct model families co-evolve with access to all peers' histories; and SelfEvo, where each agent receives the same number of task attempts but sees only its own past, which is conventional in self-improving agent studies. We instantiate SAGE in three arenas: open-ended ML research, long-horizon economic planning, and strategic multiplayer play, evaluated across multiple evolutionary rounds. We find that group history is not a universal amplifier: the strongest agent does not exceed its self-evolution ceiling. However, agents that plateau under self-improvement can achieve significant breakthroughs when peer experience is available. In competitive settings, counterfactual controls reveal that agents improve generally rather than developing opponent-specific strategies. Across different forms of shared history, filtered peer traces and reflective summaries often outperform raw logs, indicating that social gains depend on abstraction rather than exposure volume. These findings reveal that peer-history gains are agent-specific, arena-dependent, and contingent on the capacity to abstract transferable knowledge from public traces.

AI.tldr: 研究自改进语言智能体在社会环境中是否能获得超越单独自我改进的优势。引入SAGE框架，比较社交协作(SelfEvo)和独立自改进(SelfEvo)在三个领域的表现。
AI.motivation: 探索共享经验是否能让智能体实现自我改进无法达到的突破。这是一个未被充分研究的问题：同伴经验能否帮助那些在孤立环境中陷入瓶颈的智能体取得进步。
AI.method: 构建SAGE评估框架，在三个任务领域（开放性机器学习研究、长期经济规划、策略性多人游戏中）比较两种计算匹配的条件下五个不同模型家族的表现。
AI.result: 发现群体历史并非通用放大器，最强智能体不会超过其自我进化上限。但对于在自我改进中陷入瓶颈的智能体，同伴经验的引入能带来显著突破。在竞争环境中，智能体普遍改进而非发展对手特定策略。经过抽象处理的同伴轨迹和反思性摘要往往优于原始日志。
AI.conclusion: 同伴历史增益具有智能体特异性、领域依赖性，取决于从公共轨迹中提取可迁移知识的能力。社交增益依赖于信息抽象而非暴露量。

relevance_reason: This paper is about self-improving AI agents and collaborative learning in multi-agent systems - entirely different field from Computer Graphics. It has nothing to do with video generation, 3D motion generation, cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The only superficial connection is that both involve "learning/improvement" but in completely different domains.

title: Enginuity: A Dataset and Benchmark for Vision-Language Understanding of Engineering Diagrams
summary: Engineering diagrams pose a distinct challenge for vision-language models: unlike natural images or general documents, they encode information through dense spatial layouts, domain-specific symbols, and cross-references between visual callouts and structured parts tables. Despite their centrality to service, repair, and design workflows, there is no public benchmark for measuring VLM capabilities in this domain; existing datasets primarily focus on flowcharts, scientific figures, or business documents. To address this gap, we introduce Enginuity, the first open dataset and benchmark for evaluating VLMs on complex engineering diagrams. We define two tasks over a corpus of U.S. military service and repair manuals: structured parts-table extraction (Task 1) and free-form visual diagram question answering (VQA)(Task 2) for benchmarking. We evaluate four frontier VLMs (GPT-5.2 Chat, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemma 4, Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct) under zero-shot and chain-of-thought prompting. On Task 1, models reach Recall@all of 0.61-0.87 but Token F1pen of only 0.03-0.18, exposing a systematic gap between part identification and description fidelity. Task 2 reveals a consistent factual-reasoning gap across all models. A supporting analysis shows that token-overlap metrics under-report model capability on technical descriptions by 2-6x relative to semantic similarity, motivating LLM-as-judge calibration for domain-specific evaluation. We release the dataset, annotations, evaluation harness, and per-sample model outputs to support a reproducible study of VLM capability on engineering content.

AI.tldr: Enginuity是首个用于评估VLMs在复杂工程图上能力的开放数据集和基准，包含两个任务：结构化零件表提取和自由形式可视化问答。实验表明当前模型在描述保真度方面存在系统性差距。
AI.motivation: 工程图在服务、维修和设计工作流中处于核心地位，但目前没有公开基准来衡量VLM在该领域的能力；现有数据集主要关注流程图、科学图形或商业文档。
AI.method: 定义了基于美国军事服务和维护手册的两个任务：结构化零件表提取（Task 1）和自由形式视觉问答（Task 2）。使用四种前沿VLM（GPT-5.2 Chat、Claude Opus 4.7、Gemma 4、Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct）在零样本和思维链提示下进行评估。
AI.result: Task 1模型达到Recall@all为0.61-0.87，但Token F1仅为0.03-0.18，暴露出零件识别与描述保真度之间的系统性差距。Task 2显示所有模型都存在一致的事实推理差距。分析表明，基于token重叠的指标比语义相似度，低估了模型在技术描述上的能力2-6倍。
AI.conclusion: 发布数据集、注释、评估工具和每样本模型输出，以支持对工程内容VLM能力的可重复研究，并建议使用LLM作为裁判进行特定领域评估校准。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for video-to-motion conversion and 3D motion generation using specific methods like Wanxiang/Seedance. The paper is about Vision-Language Models (VLMs) understanding engineering diagrams - a technical document analysis task. While both involve VLMs, the application domains are entirely unrelated: one deals with human motion generation from video, the other with engineering drawing recognition. This is akin to comparing medical imaging with human motion generation - both may use similar neural network architectures but serve completely different purposes.

title: From Prompt to Service: An SLM-Based Agent Orchestration Gateway for AI-Driven Virtual Worlds
summary: As generative AI capabilities expand, AI-driven virtual worlds face a growing architectural challenge. Users interact through in-world interfaces in multimodal ways, yet their requests demand fundamentally different AI backend models and computational resources. Embedding these capabilities directly into virtual world systems reduces extensibility, complicates maintenance, and limits the ability to coordinate services distributed across edge and cloud infrastructure. This paper presents an SLM-based Agent Orchestration Gateway, a lightweight runtime coordination mechanism that decouples a virtual world client from heterogeneous AI backends through intent-driven service routing. An edge-deployed SLM classifies the semantic intent of each user prompt, a configurable service registry validates and resolves the routing decision, and the selected backend is invoked transparently, enabling new AI capabilities to be introduced in the virtual world without modifying the client application. The gateway is implemented and evaluated within the InterwovenXR virtual museum testbed. The evaluation shows that compact SLMs can serve as reliable intent routers on edge hardware, and that task-specific fine-tuning can transform sub-billion-parameter models into practical, low-latency routers. A layered configuration pairing a fine-tuned sub billion-parameter model as router with a larger SLM for conversational response generation is shown to be deployable on mid-range edge hardware and more efficient than delegating both responsibilities to a single model. The findings show that SLMs can support practical AI service orchestration in virtual worlds and the work contributes an evaluated architecture for scalable, extensible, and edge-supported AI interaction, enabling virtual agents become access points to distributed generative AI services.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SLM的智能体编排网关(SLM-based Agent Orchestration Gateway)，通过在边缘部署的小型语言模型对用户提示进行语义意图分类，结合可配置服务注册中心实现动态路由，使虚拟世界客户端能够透明调用分布式AI后端服务，无需修改客户端应用即可扩展AI能力。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI能力扩展，虚拟世界面临日益复杂的架构挑战。用户以多模态方式交互，但请求需要不同的AI后端模型和计算资源。直接将AI能力嵌入虚拟世界系统会降低可扩展性、增加维护难度，并限制跨边缘和云基础设施的服务协调能力。
AI.method: 提出基于SLM的智能体编排网关方案：1)边缘部署的SLM对用户提示进行语义意图分类；2)可配置服务注册中心验证并解析路由决策；3)透明调用选定的AI后端。在InterwovenXR虚拟博物馆测试床中实现并评估了该网关。
AI.result: 紧凑型SLM可作为边缘硬件上的可靠意图路由器；任务特定微调可将子十亿参数模型转变为实用低延迟路由器；分层配置(微调子十亿参数模型作为路由器+较大SLM用于对话生成)可在中端边缘硬件上部署，比单一模型承担双重职责更高效。
AI.conclusion: SLM可以支持虚拟世界中实用的AI服务编排，研究贡献了一种可扩展、可扩展且支持边缘AI交互的架构，使虚拟智能体成为分布式生成式AI服务的访问点。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on SLM-based agent orchestration and service routing infrastructure for virtual worlds, not on Computer Graphics. While it mentions "virtual worlds," the application domain is fundamentally different - it's about system architecture, edge computing, and intent classification, not about cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, video generation models, motion generation, or temporal consistency. The methods also don't match: it uses small language models for routing, not video generation models, VLMs for quality assessment, or 3D motion generation models.

title: A unified multi-task framework enables interpretable chest radiograph analysis
summary: While multimodal deep learning has advanced medical imaging analysis, existing black-box systems \textcolor{black}{may remain confined to isolated tasks, often overlooking} the trust-sensitive nature of clinical diagnosis as a multi-task process. We propose IMT-CXR (Interpretable Multi-task Transformer for Chest X-ray Analysis), a framework that emulates radiologists' diagnostic workflow through three evidence-driven stages: 1) Disease recognition; 2) Attribute characterization (e.g., size, location, severity quantification); 3) Evidence-integrated report generation with traceable decision pathways. The framework employs a unified transformer architecture optimized via medical-domain instruction tuning, sequentially executing four clinical tasks: multi-label disease classification, lesion localization, anatomical segmentation, and radiology report generation. Experimental validation demonstrates competitive performance on ten CXR benchmarks under direct inference and fine-tuning settings. In a blinded evaluation of 160 historical reports from four medical centers, three radiologists rated 66\% of AI-generated reports as comparable to or surpassing original clinical reports in diagnostic clarity, highlighting the framework's translational potential. By establishing traceable diagnostic pathways from anatomical findings to conclusions, this work bridges the gap between AI technical metrics and clinical utility, advancing trustworthy AI systems in medical imaging.

AI.tldr: IMT-CXR是一种可解释的多任务Transformer框架，模拟放射科医生的诊断流程，通过疾病识别、属性表征和证据整合报告生成三个阶段进行胸部X光分析。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态深度学习系统多为黑盒模型，仅执行孤立任务，忽略了临床诊断作为多任务过程的信任敏感性。放射科医生的工作是多阶段的，包括识别疾病、表征病变特征并生成报告，但现有AI系统缺乏这种可解释的诊断路径。
AI.method: 提出统一Transformer架构，通过医学领域指令优化，依次执行四个临床任务：多标签疾病分类、病变定位、解剖分割和放射学报告生成。该框架包含三个证据驱动阶段：1)疾病识别；2)属性表征(大小、位置、严重程度)；3)带可追溯决策路径的证据整合报告生成。
AI.result: 在10个CXR基准数据集上验证，性能具有竞争力。对来自4个医疗中心的160份历史报告进行盲评，3名放射科医生认为66%的AI生成报告在诊断清晰度方面与或优于原始临床报告。
AI.conclusion: 通过建立从解剖发现到结论的可追溯诊断路径，该工作弥合了AI技术指标与临床实用性之间的差距，推动了可信AI系统在医学影像领域的发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging analysis (chest X-ray diagnosis), completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. Although it uses Transformers and multi-modal approaches, the application domain is healthcare/medical AI, not video-to-motion conversion or 3D motion generation. It does not address any of the specified pain points: cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, quality control for generated videos, or text-to-motion semantic alignment. The methods and goals are fundamentally different from the research profile's needs.

title: Cross-Lingual Token Arbitrage: Optimizing Code Agent Context Windows via Local LLM Preprocessing
summary:
AI-assisted coding agents are bottlenecked by input-token cost. Two pathologies of raw human input drive much of this overhead: tokenization inefficiency for non-English text and structural entropy in conversational prompts. Existing approaches act reactively by compressing already-bloated contexts or intervening after failures occur.
  We introduce a pre-flight, edge-side prompt-rewriting middleware that operates between the developer and the cloud agent. A local Llama 3.2 (3B) model performs cross-lingual translation into English, structural rewriting into a compact task-oriented format, and regex-validated rewrite-with-fallback safeguards to ensure the optimized prompt is never larger than the original.
  We evaluate on OMH-Polyglot, a multilingual coding benchmark spanning Turkish, Arabic, Chinese, and code-switched specifications. Across three commercial LLM backends, the middleware reduces prompt tokens by 34-47 percent and total tokens by up to 18.8 percent while preserving or improving task accuracy. Ablation studies show that gains arise primarily from the rewriting stage rather than simple function-name extraction. Compared with LLMLingua-2 at matched compression rates, our method consistently achieves superior OckScore performance across all evaluated backends. These results demonstrate that proactive prompt optimization can substantially reduce inference costs without sacrificing coding quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种边缘侧的预运行提示词重写中间件，通过本地小模型将非英语文本翻译成英语并将对话式提示结构化为紧凑任务格式，从而减少提示词 tokens 开销。
AI.motivation: AI 辅助编码代理受输入 token 成本限制，非英语文本的 tokenization 低效和对话提示的结构熵是造成开销的主要原因，现有方法只能被动应对。
AI.method: 使用本地 Llama 3.2 (3B) 模型执行跨语言翻译、结构重写为紧凑任务导向格式，并通过正则验证的回退机制确保优化后提示词不大于原始长度。在 OMH-Polyglot 多语言编码基准上评估。
AI.result: 在三种商业 LLM 后端上，提示词 tokens 减少 34-47%，总 tokens 减少高达 18.8%，同时保持或提升任务准确率。消融实验表明收益主要来自重写阶段而非简单函数名提取。相比 LLMLingua-2 在相同压缩率下实现更优的 OckScore 性能。
AI.conclusion: 主动式提示词优化可显著降低推理成本而不牺牲编码质量，该方法为边缘端主动优化提供了有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about optimizing LLM context windows for AI-assisted coding agents (cross-lingual token reduction for programming tasks). It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics field. The research profile focuses on video-to-motion conversion in computer graphics, 3D motion generation, and cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. The paper addresses an entirely different domain (NLP/coding assistance) and does not involve any computer graphics, video processing, motion generation, or visual quality assessment. This is a classic example of using similar foundational AI methods (LLMs) but in completely unrelated application domains.

title: IDO: Incongruity-aware Distribution Optimization for Multimodal Fake News Detection
summary: Multimodal fake news detection aims to identify the authenticity of news. Existing multimodal fake news detection methods mainly focus on cross-modal consistency, but often fail to explicitly model the semantic incongruity that characterizes deceptive multimodal content. However, misinformation often contains semantic information incongruity with the facts. To address these challenges, we propose Incongruity-aware Distribution Optimization (IDO) to improve the performance of fake news detection from the perspectives of factual incongruity and modality incongruity. For factual incongruity, we introduce a channel-wise reweighting strategy to obtain semantically discriminative embeddings and utilize gaussian distribution to model the uncertain correlation caused by factual incongruity. For modality incongruity, we utilize incongruity contrastive learning to learn cross-modal semantic information. Experiments demonstrate that IDO achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Incongruity-aware Distribution Optimization (IDO)方法,通过事实不一致性和模态不一致性两个角度改进假新闻检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态假新闻检测方法主要关注跨模态一致性,往往难以明确建模欺骗性多模体内容中语义不一致的特征,而错误信息通常包含与事实不符的语义信息。
AI.method: 针对事实不一致性,引入通道重加权策略获取语义可区分的嵌入,并利用高斯分布建模由事实不一致性引起的不确定相关性;针对模态不一致性,利用不一致对比学习来学习跨模态语义信息。
AI.result: 实验表明IDO实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: IDO通过同时处理事实不一致性和模态不一致性问题,有效提升了多模态假新闻检测的准确率。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal fake news detection in social media content - an NLP/Multimedia security task. It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics domain focused on video-to-3D motion generation. The application domain is completely different (fake news detection vs. video-to-motion generation), the pain points are different (detecting misinformation vs. cross-modal alignment and temporal consistency), and the methods serve entirely different purposes despite both dealing with "multimodal" inputs.

title: Bridging Auxiliary Constraints to Resolve Instruction Following in Large Reasoning Models
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in many tasks, yet they struggle with reliably following multiple instructions, either by failing to satisfy individual constraints or by struggling to balance competing constraints simultaneously. We formalize this challenge as the Constraint Adherence Problem (CAP). This paper introduces a novel framework that addresses CAP by representing instructions as a structured knowledge graph of constraints. Our approach, Constraint Relationship Graph Completion (CRGC), explicitly models relationships between constraints, identifies adherence challenges, and discovers ``bridge constraints'' that help the model better focus on and reconcile requirements. Bridge constraints act as auxiliary instructions that make primary constraints more salient and compatible. Unlike existing approaches that enhance instruction following through general training methods, CRGC specifically improves constraint satisfaction by leveraging the model's own knowledge to create better pathways for generation. Experiments across three popular instruction following datasets demonstrate that our approach reduces constraint violations by 39% compared to standard prompting while maintaining reasoning abilities of large reasoning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出约束关系图补全(CRGC)框架,通过构建约束知识显式建模指令间的关係,并识别"桥接约束"来帮助大语言模型更好地满足多个冲突指令,从而解决大型推理模型的约束遵守问题。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在同时遵循多条指令时表现不佳,常出现约束违反或难以平衡相互竞争的约束,该问题被称为约束遵守问题(CAP),现有方法仅通过通用训练增强指令跟随能力,缺乏对约束间关係的显式建模。
AI.method: 将指令表示为结构化知识图,通过约束关系图补全(CRGC)框架显式建模约束间的关係,识别遵守挑战并发现能提高主要约束显着性和兼容性的"桥接约束",利用模型自身知识创建更好的生成路径。
AI.result: 在三个流行指令跟随数据集上实验表明,与标准提示相比,本方法可将约束违反降低39%,同时保持大型推理模型的推理能力。
AI.conclusion: CRGC框架通过约束知识图和桥接约束机制有效解决了多约束场景下的指令跟随难题,为提升大型推理模型的约束遵守能力提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Large Language Models and instruction following in NLP, which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. Even though it mentions "constraints," this has nothing to do with cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, or visual quality assessment. The application domain is entirely different - it's text-based NLP instruction following, not video-to-motion generation.

title: PHAF-Personalized Hand Avatars in a Flash
summary: We present PHAF-Personalized Hand Avatars in a Flash, a personalized photo-realistic hand avatar which provides high quality multi-view renders from just two images (dorsal and palmar views).Unlike slow optimization-based techniques, PHAF generates fast personalized textures for real-time deployment on edge devices. Our approach combines semantic guided mesh alignment and densified texture extraction to transfer high-frequency details efficiently. A view-based inpainting network refines textures ensuring smooth, continuous appearance. PHAF generalizes to novel viewpoints and leverages a parametric hand model for accurate articulations, making it compatible with standard graphics engines. Experiments show it is comparable to existing methods in visual fidelity while drastically reducing texture generation time by 30 times, enabling practical AR/VR applications.

AI.tldr: PHAF是一种个性化的照片级真实感手部头像系统，能够从两张图像（背面和掌面视图）生成高质量的多视图渲染。该方法专为边缘设备的实时部署而设计，结合了语义引导的网格对齐和密集纹理提取技术，实现了高效的细节传输。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于耗时的优化技术，难以满足AR/VR应用对实时性和边缘设备部署的需求。需要一种能够快速生成个性化纹理的方法，同时保持视觉质量。
AI.method: 1) 结合语义引导的网格对齐与密集纹理提取，实现高频细节的高效转移；2) 采用基于视图的修复网络进行纹理细化，确保平滑连续的外观；3) 利用参数化手部模型实现准确的手势表达和视角泛化。
AI.result: 该方法在视觉质量上与现有方法相当，但纹理生成速度提升了30倍，可支持实时边缘设备部署。
AI.conclusion: PHAF为实际AR/VR应用提供了实用解决方案，兼顾了视觉质量与计算效率。其泛化到新视角的能力使其兼容标准图形引擎，具有广泛的应用潜力。

relevance_reason: While both papers are in the Computer Graphics domain, they address fundamentally different application areas. The research profile focuses on VIDEO-TO-MOTION CONVERSION - converting 2D video/images to 3D human MOTION (temporal animation). In contrast, PHAF deals with STATIC HAND AVATAR RENDERING - creating textured mesh geometry from images for visual display. The goal here is high-quality multi-view rendering/texture generation, not motion generation or temporal animation. Using hand geometry as a similar element does not make up for the completely different core objective: static asset creation vs. dynamic motion synthesis. The methods and pain points are unrelated.

title: TSQAgent: Rating Time Series Data Quality via Dedicated Agentic Reasoning
summary: Assessing the quality of time series (TS) data is fundamental yet inherently challenging due to the multifaceted nature of quality dimensions. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for TS quality assessment via pairwise comparison and per-dimension evaluation. However, existing approaches rely on manually predefined quality dimensions and purely text-based reasoning, leaving it unknown whether LLMs can identify truly relevant quality dimensions or perform grounded and quantitative quality comparisons. To investigate this, we construct TSQBench, a dedicated benchmark for evaluating LLMs on two progressive capabilities: (i) understanding and identifying relevant quality dimensions, and (ii) performing quality comparison under specific dimensions. Our analysis reveals that current LLMs consistently struggle with both dimension identification and evidence-grounded quality comparison. To address these limitations, we propose TSQAgent, a novel agentic reasoning framework for TS quality rating consisting of three collaborative roles: Perceiver for focused dimension selection, Inspector for dimension-wise quantitative analysis, and Adjudicator that aggregates and refines the final judgment. In particular, we introduce an agentic reasoning strategy that instills the ability to identify and prioritize the most relevant quality dimensions, and further propose an agent workflow equipped with external analytical tools to enable precise quantitative comparisons over selected dimensions. Experiments on both the proposed benchmark and eleven real-world datasets demonstrate that our framework not only substantially improves LLMs' capabilities in quality understanding and quantitative comparison but also effectively translates these improvements into better quality-aware data selection, leading to enhanced downstream performance and data efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TSQBench基准和一个名为TSQAgent的新型agent框架，用于评估和改进大语言模型在时间序列数据质量评估方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在时间序列质量评估方面存在两个关键问题：1)无法自主识别真正相关的质量维度；2)缺乏基于证据的定量质量比较能力。现有方法依赖于预定义的质量维度和纯文本推理，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: 1)构建TSQBench基准测试集，评估LLM的两项渐进能力：理解识别相关质量维度和特定维度下的质量比较；2)提出TSQAgent框架，包含三个协作角色——Perceiver(感知器)负责聚焦选择相关维度，Inspector(检查器)负责维度级定量分析，Adjudicator(仲裁器)负责聚合 refine最终判断；3)引入agentic推理策略使LLM具备识别和优先排序最相关质量维度的能力，并配备外部分析工具进行精确的定量比较。
AI.result: 实验在TSQBench基准和11个真实世界数据集上验证显示：TSQAgent不仅显著提升了LLM的质量理解能力和定量比较能力，还有效转化为更好的质量感知数据选择，从而提升了下游任务性能和数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入协作式agent架构和外部工具支持，TSQAgent成功解决了现有LLM在时间序列质量评估中的维度识别和定量比较难题，为质量感知的数据选择提供了有效方案，具有重要的实践应用价值。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The research profile is in Computer Graphics focused on video-to-motion conversion and 3D motion generation. The paper is about time series data quality evaluation using LLM agents. While both mention "quality assessment," the application domains are completely different - time series data (financial, sensor data) has no relation to computer graphics, video processing, or 3D motion generation. The methods (LLM-based agentic reasoning for time series) are also unrelated to the methods specified (video generation models, VLMs, cross-modal pipelines).

title: PRISM: Synergizing Vision Foundation Models via Self-organized Expert Specialization
summary: Unifying the complementary strengths of diverse Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) into a single efficient model is highly desirable but challenged by the negative transfer inherent in monolithic distillation. To address these feature conflicts, we introduce \textbf{PRISM}, a novel dual-stream Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework that synergizes VFMs via modular specialization. We propose a two-stage paradigm: (1) expertise deconstruction, where a teacher-conditional router guides experts to specialize in distinct representational subspaces to mitigate interference, followed by (2) dynamic recomposition, where the router learns to assemble these experts into tailored computational pathways for downstream tasks. Experiments on PASCAL-Context and NYUD-v2 show that \textbf{PRISM} establishes a new state of the art, validating that sparse, emergent specialization is a scalable approach for integrating diverse visual knowledge.

AI.tldr: PRISM提出一种双流MoE框架，通过模块化专业化和动态重组整合多种视觉基础模型，解决特征冲突问题，在分割任务上取得SOTA。
AI.motivation: 由于单体蒸馏存在负转移问题，将不同视觉基础模型的优势统一到一个高效模型中具有挑战性，需要解决特征冲突问题。
AI.method: 提出两阶段范式：(1)专业去构阶段：教师条件路由引导专家专门化到不同的表征子空间以减少干扰；(2)动态重组阶段：路由学习将专家组装成针对下游任务的定制计算路径。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-Context和NYUD-v2数据集上建立新的最先进水平，验证了稀疏-emergent专业化是集成不同视觉知识的可扩展方法。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏、emergent专业化是整合多样化视觉知识的有效且可扩展的方法，PRISM成功通过模块专业化解决了VFMs间的特征冲突问题。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about computer vision (integrating vision foundation models like CLIP/SAM for segmentation tasks), while the research profile is about Computer Graphicsspecifically video-to-motion conversion and 3D motion generation. Although both deal with "vision," the application domain is entirely different - segmentation vs generating 3D motion from video. The pain points don't match (feature conflict in segmentation vs video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency), and the methods are incompatible despite involving vision models.

title: Gender-Dependent Diagnostic Substitution in LLM Medical Triage: Same Symptoms, Unequal Urgency
comment: 7 pages, 3 tables. Multi-model replication across Gemini, Claude, and GPT. Code and data: https://github.com/wongqihan/ai-behavioral-experiments
summary: We investigate whether large language models produce different medical triage recommendations for identical neurological symptoms when only the patient's stated gender and age vary. Using three model families--Gemini 3.5 Flash, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and GPT-5.4-mini--we present a standardized symptom profile (persistent headache, blurred vision, morning nausea, visual disturbances) across seven demographic conditions: three age groups (25, 38, 65) x two genders (male, female), plus a gender-unspecified baseline (n = 30 per condition per model, 630 total trials). We find a stark, systemic gender-dependent triage disparity: young women receive significantly lower emergency room (ER) referral rates than age-matched men (Gemini: 0% vs. 23.3%; Claude: 6.7% vs. 96.7%; GPT: 6.7% vs. 66.7%, all p < 0.001). The disparity disappears at age 65 for all models. The primary mechanism is diagnostic substitution: the models anchor on a gender-associated diagnosis, preferentially classifying young women with Idiopathic Intracranial Hypertension (IIH)--a condition epidemiologically linked to women of childbearing age--while diagnosing men with generic increased intracranial pressure with space-occupying lesions in the differential. This diagnostic closure routes female patients to lower-urgency care (outpatient doctor appointments) despite comparable severity ratings (7-9/10). Our findings demonstrate that clinical LLMs replicate documented human clinical biases by using epidemiological priors to suppress triage urgency, suggesting that AI triage engines must decouple urgency assessment from probabilistic diagnostic priors. We release all code, prompts, and raw results.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型在医疗分诊中是否存在性别和年龄相关的偏见。三个模型（Gemini、Claude、GPT）对相同神经系统症状的年轻女性给出更低急诊转诊率，因为模型倾向于用与性别关联的流行病学诊断（如特发性颅内高压）来"解释"女性患者症状，导致分诊降级。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型已逐步应用于临床决策支持，但它们可能复制人类临床中已知的偏见。现实中，年轻女性患者的疼痛常被低估或误诊。该研究旨在检验AI模型是否同样存在这种系统性偏见。
AI.method: 使用标准化症状描述（持续头痛、视力模糊、晨吐、视觉障碍），在三种模型家族中进行630次实验，覆盖三种年龄（25、38、65岁）和两种性别（男、女）及性别未指定的基线条件，测量急诊转诊率和诊断分类。
AI.result: 发现显著的性别依赖性分诊差异：年轻女性获得远低于男性的急诊转诊率（Gemini: 0% vs 23.3%；Claude: 6.7% vs 96.7%；GPT: 6.7% vs 66.7%，p<0.001），但在65岁时差异消失。核心机制是诊断替换——模型优先将年轻女性归因于特发性颅内高压（IIH），而将男性归因于更具紧迫性的占位性病变，尽管严重程度评分相当（7-9/10）。
AI.conclusion: 临床LLM复制了已知的人类临床偏见，通过流行病学先验压制分诊紧迫性。AI分诊引擎必须将紧迫性评估与概率性诊断先验解耦，否则可能导致对女性患者的系统性护理不足。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - This paper is about medical AI/clinical decision support (healthcare), not Computer Graphics. It examines gender bias in LLM triage systems using text-based symptom descriptions. The research profile requires Computer Graphics (video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment), while this paper is in a completely different application domain (medical informatics). Although both involve LLMs, the methods and application areas are fundamentally different.

title: From 3D Perception to Safety Reasoning: A Graph-Based Framework for Real-Time Underground Mine Monitoring
summary: Underground coal mining requires personnel and heavy equipment to operate within shared, confined, and poorly illuminated spaces where hazards such as equipment proximity violations, structural instabilities, and occluded blind spots are difficult to anticipate. Conventional monitoring systems, including fixed cameras and rule-based proximity alerts, can detect predefined events but lack the 3D scene understanding and contextual memory needed to identify complex or evolving hazards. This paper presents a continuous monitoring framework that converts colourised 3D point clouds into structured and traceable safety reasoning outputs. The framework combines 3D semantic perception, uncertainty-based anomaly detection, rule-based hazard checks, on-device LLM reasoning, and GraphRAG -based memory analysis to identify immediate hazards and interpret longer-term safety patterns. Scene and temporal graphs serve as the explicit knowledge structure, linking perception outputs across reasoning stages. To overcome the scarcity of labeled underground data, real roadway scans, controlled object placement, and high-fidelity longwall simulation were combined to generate diverse hazard scenarios, while self-supervised pretraining improved segmentation from limited annotations. The perception model achieved 92.7% accuracy at 30 FPS with low memory usage. Across 115 hazard scenarios, rule-based checks achieved 57% coverage, increasing to 76% with contextual LLM reasoning and 93% with memory-based reasoning using historical records. Qualitative results show uncertainty-derived anomaly signals support the interpretation of out-of-distribution hazards beyond predefined classes. Overall, graph-based knowledge representation combined with 3D perception and layered safety reasoning provides a practical foundation for intelligent decision support in underground mine monitoring.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个结合3D语义感知、基于不确定性的异常检测、规则检查、设备端LLM推理和GraphRAG记忆分析的连续监测框架，用于地下煤矿安全监控。该系统将3D点云转换为结构化、可追踪的安全推理输出。
AI.motivation: 地下煤矿作业空间狭窄、照明不良，设备和人员接近违规、结构不稳定、盲点等危险难以预测。传统监控系统缺乏3D场景理解和上下文记忆能力，无法识别复杂或演变的危险。
AI.method: 融合真实巷道扫描、受控物体放置和高保真长壁模拟生成多样化危险场景；使用自监督预训练改进分割效果。框架整合3D语义感知、不确定性异常检测、规则危险检查、设备端LLM推理及GraphRAG记忆分析，利用场景图和时间图作为显式知识结构链接各阶段推理输出。
AI.result: 感知模型达到92.7%准确率、30FPS处理速度、低内存占用。115个危险场景测试中：规则检查覆盖57%，结合上下文LLM推理提升至76%，结合历史记忆的推理达93%。定性结果表明不确定性衍生的异常信号有助于解释超出预定义类别的分布外危险。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的知识表示结合3D感知与分层安全推理为地下矿井监控智能决策支持提供了实用基础。

relevance_reason: Entirely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics—specifically 2D video to 3D motion generation (human motion synthesis). The paper is about underground mine safety monitoring using 3D point clouds, anomaly detection for industrial surveillance, and rule-based LLM reasoning. There is no overlap: the target application (video-to-motion generation vs. mining safety), the 3D representations (human motion vs. mine geometry), the methods (video generation models/VLMs vs. point cloud processing/GraphRAG), and the pain points are completely unrelated. This is purely an industrial monitoring system, not related to computer graphics or motion generation.

title: Towards Non-Monotonic Entailment in Propositional Defeasible Standpoint Logic
summary: Recent work in defeasible reasoning has seen notions of preferential semantics and entailment in the style of Kraus et al. applied to modal logics. However, work in this field has focussed primarily on satisfiability checking, and monotonic notions of entailment, which may be inferentially weak. One particular modal logic where this has been introduced is propositional standpoint logics, where modalities can express the views of different viewpoints. This has resulted in the formalisation of propositional defeasible standpoint logic (PDSL). In this paper, we propose a means of lifting the class of (non-monotonic) rational entailment relations from traditional KLM-style reasoning to a fragment of PDSL. In order to do so, we extend the expressivity of PDSL via situated standpoint conditionals, allowing us to talk about a defeasible conditional holding in the context of a given standpoint. This allows us to re-characterise the syntax of PDSL in terms of situated conditionals, and shows that a large fragment of PDSL is expressible as a set of situated conditionals. We then focus on characterising non-monotonic entailment in this fragment, defining a method to transport any ranking-based entailment relation from the propositional case into the PDSL case. This is first described in the general case and then considered in the specific cases of rational and lexicographic closures, providing a faithful translation of each inference into PDSL. We also show that entailment-checking in this fragment of PDSL can be done largely using algorithms from the propositional case, while preserving complexity bounds.

AI.tldr: 本文将KLM风格的可废止蕴含关系从命题逻辑提升到PDSL分支，通过引入情境立场条件句，实现了非单调蕴含的形式化，并保持了算法复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有可废止推理研究主要关注可满足性检查和单调蕴含，推理能力较弱。需要将非单调的理性蕴含关系扩展到命题立场逻辑(PDSL)中，以增强表达能力。
AI.method: 通过引入情境立场条件句(situated standpoint conditionals)来扩展PDSL的表达能力，允许在给定立场上下文中讨论可废止条件句。将基于排序的蕴含关系(理性闭包和词汇闭包)从命题情况转移到PDSL情况。
AI.result: 大部分PDSL可表达为情境条件句集合；非单调蕴含检查可主要使用命题情况的算法，同时保持复杂度界限；实现了理性闭包和词汇闭包的忠实翻译。
AI.conclusion: 成功将非单调蕴含机制嵌入到模态立场逻辑中，为PDSL提供了更强的推理能力，同时保持了计算可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about formal logic and non-monotonic reasoning (Propositional Defeasible Standpoint Logic), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with logical entailment and defeasible inference, not video generation, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal alignment between video and motion. There is no connection to any of the pain points or methods mentioned in the research profile.

title: Mixed-Modality Dual Face-Hair Retrieval
summary: We introduce Dual Face-Hair Retrieval (DFHR), a new mixed-modality dual-reference task in image retrieval where a query consists of a face image specifying identity and a hairstyle reference expressed as either an image or text. Unlike prior retrieval settings, DFHR requires cross-component reasoning between two semantically independent attributes -- identity and hairstyle -- originating from heterogeneous modalities. This formulation demands localized feature disentanglement, cross-modal semantic alignment, and mixed-modality composition within a unified embedding space. We construct DFHR-Bench, the first benchmark for mixed-modality face-hair retrieval, comprising over 180K annotated triplets across dual-image and image-text settings, built via a multi-stage annotation protocol ensuring semantic and identity integrity. We further propose MFHC (Multimodal Face-Hair Combiner), a unified framework that fuses disentangled identity and hairstyle embeddings through token injection and multi-view supervision. DFHR and DFHR-Bench together establish a new paradigm for identity-aware, attribute-controllable visual retrieval across modalities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Dual Face-Hair Retrieval（DFHR）任务，一个新的混合模态双参考图像检索任务，需要根据面部图像（身份）+发型参考（图像或文本）的查询组合进行跨组件推理。同时构建了首个基准数据集DFHR-Bench并提出统一框架MFHC。
AI.motivation: 现有检索设置无法处理来自异构模态的两个语义独立属性（身份和发型）的跨组件推理，缺乏统一的嵌入空间来融合身份特征和发型特征。
AI.method: 构建包含超过18万标注三元组的DFHR-Bench基准数据集；提出MFHC框架，通过token注入和多视图监督融合解耦的身份和发型embedding，在统一嵌入空间中进行混合模态组合。
AI.result: 建立了首个混合模态人脸-发型检索基准数据集，提出统一框架实现身份感知的属性可控视觉检索。
AI.conclusion: DFHR和DFHR-Bench为跨模态身份感知、可控属性的视觉检索建立了新范式，推动了混合模态检索领域的研究。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for video-to-motion conversion and 3D motion generation, while this paper is about face-hair retrieval in the computer vision domain (identity and hairstyle attribute combination). Although both deal with cross-modal elements, the paper addresses face/image retrieval rather than motion generation or video-to-3D conversion. The pain points, methods (no motion generation or video processing), and application goals are entirely unrelated.

title: Diagnosing Knowledge Gaps in LLM Tool Use: An Agentic Benchmark for Novel API Acquisition
summary: Large language models for code generation often need to use APIs that are absent from their pretraining data. This requires more than recalling a function name: models must coordinate signatures, module paths, input-output contracts, semantics, and executable usage patterns. Existing novel-API benchmarks are typically static, rely on coarse pass/fail metrics, or use synthetic APIs that may not reflect real library evolution. We introduce NovelAPIBench, a fully automated dynamic benchmark that, for any base model and target library, discovers novel APIs, extracts decomposed knowledge bundles, generates executable coding tasks, and assigns failed samples to six diagnostic categories. Across about 1.9K tasks, four base models, and five domains, we compare knowledge injected through retrieval with knowledge internalized through parametric adaptation. We find that knowledge components are not interchangeable: usage examples are the strongest standalone signal, while the best two-component setting pairs signatures with either mechanisms or examples depending on the domain and backbone. Adding more context, especially source code, can hurt by increasing import-path errors. Parametric adaptation also does not replace retrieval once external knowledge is removed; rather, fine-tuning mainly teaches models how to use provided bundles, and this ability transfers to held-out libraries. These results suggest that retrieval and tuning play complementary roles: retrieval supplies volatile API content, while tuning improves procedural integration.

AI.tldr: NovelAPIBench是一个全自动动态基准测试，用于评估大语言模型使用新API的能力。实验发现：使用示例是最强信号；签名+机制/示例的两组件组合效果最佳；添加源码会因导入路径错误反而降低性能；参数化微调不替代检索而是互补关系。
AI.motivation: 现有新型API基准测试通常为静态、使用粗糙的通过/失败指标、或使用合成API，无法真实反映实际库演变。同时大语言模型生成代码需要协调多种API知识组件（签名、模块路径、输入输出契约、语义等），而现有研究缺乏对不同知识组件可互换性的系统分析。
AI.method: 构建了完全自动化的动态基准测试NovelAPIBench，能够针对任何基础模型和目标库发现新API、提取分解的知识包、生成可执行的编码任务，并将失败样本分配到六个诊断类别。在约1900个任务、4个基础模型和5个域中进行对比实验，比较检索增强与参数化微调两种知识注入方式。
AI.result: 知识组件不可互换：使用示例是最强的独立信号；最佳两组件设置取决于领域和骨干网，为签名+机制或签名+示例；增加上下文尤其是源码可能因导入路径错误而损害性能；参数化微调在外部知识移除后不能替代检索，微调主要教授模型如何使用提供的知识包，且该能力可迁移到未知库。
AI.conclusion: 检索和微调扮演互补角色：检索提供易失的API内容，而微调改善程序整合。未来设计AI编程助手时需同时考虑两者的协同作用，而非单纯依赖某一种方法。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about evaluating LLM capability to use new APIs - a completely different field (LLM evaluation/benchmarking) than Computer Graphics. It has nothing to do with video generation, 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between video and motion, or visual quality assessment. The application domain is entirely different - LLMs and API usage vs video-to-motion conversion.

title: PersistGS: Differentiable Physics for Object Permanence in 4D Gaussian Splatting
comment: Accepted in IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026 Workshop on Generative 3D Reconstruction
summary:
Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods reconstruct time-varying scenes from synchronized multi-camera video using photometric supervision. When a moving object becomes fully occluded from all training cameras, this supervision vanishes: the Gaussians representing it receive no gradient signal and degrade. Existing approaches to incomplete observations in neural reconstruction rely on learned generative priors that prioritize visual plausibility over physical correctness.
  We propose $\textbf{PersistGS}$, a method that restores object permanence during occlusion by coupling differentiable rigid body simulation with 3D Gaussian Splatting. Our approach decomposes the scene into per-object Gaussians and collision meshes, estimates friction and velocity from the observed pre-occlusion trajectory via differentiable simulation, and uses the resulting SE(3) trajectory to position object Gaussians throughout the occlusion period. Because the predicted trajectory satisfies the governing equations of rigid body dynamics, it faithfully captures contact events (bounces, friction-based deceleration, direction changes) that kinematic extrapolation cannot model. We introduce a centroid silhouette loss that isolates positional gradients from appearance noise, yielding 40% lower trajectory error than photometric supervision. We evaluate using cameras withheld from training that observe the object during its occlusion. Experiments on synthetic scenes show that PersistGS outperforms constant velocity extrapolation by +2.46dB PSNR and comes within 0.19dB of a ground-truth trajectory upper bound.

AI.tldr: PersistGS通过将可微分刚体模拟与3D高斯溅射相结合，在目标被完全遮挡时恢复对象永久性。该方法将场景分解为每目标高斯和碰撞网格，从遮挡前观察到的轨迹估计摩擦和速度，并使用SE(3)轨迹在遮挡期间定位目标高斯。
AI.motivation: 当前3DGS方法在目标被完全遮挡时会退化，因为高斯无法接收梯度信号。现有方法依赖学习生成先验，重视视觉可信度而非物理正确性。
AI.method: 1.将场景分解为每目标高斯和碰撞mesh；2.从遮挡前观察到的轨迹估计摩擦和速度；3.使用可微模拟预测SE(3)轨迹；4.引入质心轮廓损失隔离位置梯度
AI.result: 比光度监督低40%轨迹误差；比常速外推提高+2.46dB PSNR；与真实轨迹上界仅差0.19dB
AI.conclusion: PersistGS能够准确捕捉接触事件（弹跳、摩擦减速、方向变化），在合成场景中优于现有方法，实现高质量时变场景重建。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting and physics-based object permanence for scene reconstruction/ Novel View Synthesis, which is a different application domain than video-to-3D motion conversion. Even though both are in Computer Graphics, PersistGS addresses occluded object tracking in dynamic scenes using differentiable physics - NOT video-to-motion generation tasks. The methods and goals are unrelated: no temporal motion extraction from video, no cross-modal alignment between video and motion, no quality assessment of generated content. It's about maintaining scene coherence during occlusion rather than converting 2D video to 3D human motion.

title: From Answers to States: Verifiable Process-Level Evaluation of Chemical Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models are increasingly used as chemistry assistants, yet most chemistry benchmarks still score only final answers. This masks a critical failure mode: a model may output the correct molecule, product, or option while its reasoning violates chemical logic. Existing process-level evaluators are hard to scale because LLM judges and human step-level process annotation are costly, inconsistent, and vulnerable to hallucination. We introduce ChemCoTBench-V2, a rule-verifiable diagnostic benchmark for low-cost, auditable evaluation of structured, verifier-addressable chemical reasoning traces. It spans molecular understanding, molecule editing, molecular optimization, and reaction prediction, with 5,620 evaluation samples across 18 reporting tasks. Models must expose key intermediate steps in expert-designed templates, and those steps are checked with deterministic chemistry rules and, for closed-answer tasks, reference traces rather than another LLM judge. Open-ended molecular optimization is evaluated with oracle-verifiable state constraints rather than strict trace matching. The benchmark reports three separate signals: final-answer correctness, template adherence, and step-wise verifier correctness over expert-refined intermediate commitments. Experiments on frontier models reveal a persistent gap between final-answer success and structured-reasoning-state consistency: models often follow the requested format while failing chemical-step checks, or answer correctly with weak supporting reasoning. ChemCoTBench-V2 enables fine-grained model comparison and identifies the concrete step at which the trace first violates the verifier.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ChemCoTBench-V2，一个用于评估大型语言模型化学推理过程的可验证诊断基准。
AI.motivation: 现有化学基准只评估最终答案，掩盖了推理过程错误；现有过程级评估成本高、不一致且易产生幻觉，需要低成本、可审计的方法。
AI.method: 构建包含5,620样本、18任务的基准，涵盖分子理解/编辑/优化/预测；要求模型展示中间步骤并用化学规则或参考轨迹验证；开放任务用oracle验证。
AI.result: 前沿模型存在最终答案与推理一致性差距：模型常遵循格式但未通过化学检查，或用弱推理正确回答。
AI.conclusion: 该基准支持细粒度模型比较，可识别推理首次违反验证器的具体步骤。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. The paper is about evaluating chemical reasoning in Large Language Models for chemistry/science applications, while the research profile focuses on Computer Graphics (video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation). There is no overlap in application domain, methods, or objectives. The paper addresses chemical reasoning evaluation in LLMs - not visual/video processing, not motion generation, not cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion.

title: TrAction: Action Recognition with Sparse Trajectories
summary: Modern action recognition models operate on memory- and compute-intensive dense RGB video volumes and frequently exploit appearance and background shortcuts, for example, predicting actions from objects or scenes instead of characteristic motion. We investigate an efficient alternative input modality that is largely free of such biases by construction: sparse point trajectories. To this end, we develop a simple transformer architecture for 2.5D trajectory-based recognition together with a masked-trajectory pretraining, which we show to substantially improve downstream action recognition accuracy. Despite using only a fraction of the dense RGB input, our method reaches 45% top-1 on Something-Something V2 and 54% on EPIC-Kitchens-100, and surpasses V-JEPA on time-reversal sensitivity. More importantly, we find trajectory features to be complementary to state-of-the-art appearance-based features. Fusing our pretrained model with DINOv2 and V-JEPA 2 improves top-1 accuracy on Something-Something V2 by 8.7 and 1.6 points, respectively. Code: https://github.com/ecker-lab/TrAction

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于稀疏点轨迹的高效动作识别方法，使用2.5D轨迹Transformer架构和掩码轨迹预训练，在仅使用部分输入的情况下达到与Dense RGB方法相当的性能，且轨迹特征与外观特征互补。
AI.motivation: 解决现有动作识别模型过于依赖密集RGB视频计算资源消耗大且容易利用场景/物体捷径的问题，探索更高效且避免偏差的输入模态。
AI.method: 开发2.5D轨迹Transformer架构处理稀疏点轨迹作为输入，设计掩码轨迹预训练任务提升下游任务准确率。
AI.result: 在SSV2达到45% top-1，EPIC-Kitchens-100达54%；与DINOv2融合提升8.7点，与V-JEPA 2融合提升1.6点。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏轨迹是一种高效且无捷径偏差的替代输入模态，轨迹特征与外观特征具有互补性，融合后可显著提升性能。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses action recognition (classifying what action is happening in a video) while the research profile is about video-to-3D motion generation (generating 3D motion from video). These are opposite tasks in different application domains - one is recognition/understanding, the other is generation/synthesis. Although both deal with video data, the core application domain is completely different: action recognition vs motion generation. The paper processes video to extractaction labels, not to generate 3D motion sequences. This is analogous to the difference between image classification and image generation - completely different problems despite both being Computer Vision.

title: EvoDrive: Pareto Evolution for Safety-Critical Autonomous Driving via Self-Improving LLM Agents
summary: Generating safety-critical scenarios is essential for validating and improving autonomous driving systems, yet it inherently requires maximizing adversariality to expose failures while preserving realism. Existing methods usually manage this trade-off with handcrafted heuristics, confining generation to known priors and overlooking underexplored patterns. While recent open-ended agentic evolution can push this limit, unconstrained general agents lack strict simulator grounding and tend to collapse the multi-objective tension into single-scalar maximization. Here we present EvoDrive, the first automated, LLM-based agentic evolution framework for multi-objective scenario generation. EvoDrive employs a simulator-grounded actor-critic architecture where a memory-driven actor iteratively proposes improvements to the generators and critics filter out implausible candidates, and a self-evolving world evaluator routes promising proposals to optimize simulation budgets. EvoDrive further maintains a Pareto archive of evaluated candidates to preserve diverse attack-realism trade-offs and guide future evolution via simulation feedback. Benchmark results on MetaDrive and CARLA show that EvoDrive not only significantly expands the Pareto frontier across various generators, but also produces valuable scenarios for policy training.

AI.tldr: EvoDrive是首个基于LLM的智能体进化框架，用于自动驾驶场景生成中的多目标对抗性场景生成，通过模拟器驱动的Actor-Critic架构和Pareto存档机制平衡攻击有效性与现实真实性。
AI.motivation: 安全关键场景生成对自动驾驶系统验证至关重要，但现有方法倾向于将多目标张力简化为单标量最大化，且缺乏严格的模拟器 grounding，导致生成的场景要么过于简单（依赖手工启发式），要么不切实际。
AI.method: EvoDrive采用记忆驱动的Actor迭代改进生成器，Critic过滤不可行候选，自进化世界评估器路由有前景的提案并优化模拟预算，同时维护Pareto存档以保留多样化的攻击-现实权衡并通过模拟反馈指导进化。
AI.result: 在MetaDrive和CARLA基准测试中，EvoDrive显著扩展了各种生成器的Pareto前沿，并产生了对策略训练有价值的场景。

title: Low-Frequency Shortcuts in Texture-Driven Visual Learning
summary: Neural networks suffer from shortcut learning, where learned features generalize well to the training set but not to in-distribution (ID) or out-of-distribution (OOD) test sets. Existing studies are all based on a few standard benchmarks, which are shape-driven. Numerous application domains, however, are texture-driven. In this work, we present shortcut learning analysis for texture-driven domains, and compare it with that of a standard benchmark. We show that texture-driven domains suffer from low-frequency shortcuts. They make the majority of their decisions based on a few low-frequency components (LFCs) with a skewed spectral behavior, despite that their classification information is in higher-frequency, fine-grained details. Pruning LFCs from training and test sets eliminates the shortcut and provides a more balanced spectral behavior, improving the ID accuracy by up to 8%. We show that low-frequency shortcuts make the models highly vulnerable to OOD corruptions, leading up to 70% accuracy drop compared to the ID accuracy. Pruning LFCs significantly improves robustness to low-frequency corruptions, by up to 40%, and introduces a trade-off for high-frequency corruptions; the balanced spectral behavior provides a better generalization performance, whereas the increased dependence on high-frequency features reduces it. OOD accuracy depends on the interaction between these two factors.

title: The DeepSpeak-Agentic Dataset
summary: We present DeepSpeak-Agentic, a dataset of videos comprising over 37 hours of semi-structured conversations between a human and an embodied AI agent. We use this dataset to evaluate the automatic forensic identification (audio, video, or text) of AI agents, study the nature of human-agent interactions, and provide a benchmark for future advances in the large-language models and AI-generated voices and faces that power embodied AI agents. We also contribute a scalable data-capture system that creates agents, automatically pairs them with human crowd workers, records audiovisual conversations across specified scenarios, and identifies and separates the human and agent in the combined stream.

title: Characterizing Detectability in 3DGS Poisoning: A Stage-wise Benchmark
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has rapidly emerged as a leading representation for real-time novel view synthesis, but recent work shows it is vulnerable to diverse poisoning attacks, including illusory object injection, computation cost amplification, and post hoc model watermarking. Despite this expanding threat surface, existing studies focus mainly on attack success, while defense and detection remain underexplored. From a detection perspective, a key challenge and opportunity arise from the multi-stage nature of the 3DGS reconstruction pipeline, which produces heterogeneous intermediate representations. Forensic signals for detecting poisoning are inherently stage dependent: an attack introduced at one stage may produce signals that emerge only at later stages. This motivates a stage-wise view of detectability that goes beyond single-stage evaluation. We introduce Poison-3DGS, a benchmark for stage-wise characterization of poisoning detection in 3DGS. It exposes stage-specific artifacts, including multi-view images, geometry, training dynamics, and Gaussian parameters, across a diverse set of scenes and attacks. Using it, we conduct a systematic study of detectability across pipeline stages. Our analysis reveals several insights. First, detectability varies significantly across stages, and no single stage consistently dominates across attack types. Second, different attacks exhibit distinct stage-specific forensic signals, so detection effectiveness depends critically on where signals are observed. Third, later-stage signals such as training dynamics and Gaussian parameter statistics provide strong cues not observable at earlier stages. Overall, our work provides a principled benchmark and the first systematic characterization of stage-dependent detectability in 3DGS, offering a foundation for future research on robust and reliable 3DGS systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Poison-3DGS基准，用于研究3D高斯基 splatting中投毒攻击的阶段依赖性检测问题。通过系统分析发现：检测能力在不同阶段显著变化，无单一阶段能持续主导；不同攻击呈现独特的阶段特异性取证信号；后期阶段信号（如训练动态、高斯参数统计）提供前期不可观测的有效线索。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在实时新视角合成中表现出色，但易受多种投毒攻击。当前研究主要关注攻击成功率，而防御和检测机制缺乏探索。3DGS重建管道的多阶段特性产生异质中间表示，为检测带来挑战和机遇——某阶段引入的攻击可能仅在后续阶段显现可检测信号，这促使从阶段视角研究可检测性。
AI.method: 构建Poison-3DGS基准，在多样场景和攻击类型下暴露阶段特异性伪影，包括多视图图像、几何、训练动态和高斯参数。对管道德各个阶段进行系统性可检测性研究。
AI.result: 三点关键发现：(1)检测能力随阶段显著变化，跨攻击类型无单一阶段持续主导；(2)不同攻击展现独特阶段特异性取证信号，检测效果高度依赖信号观察位置；(3)后期阶段信号如训练动态和高斯参数统计提供前期不可见的强线索。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供原则性基准和首个3DGS阶段依赖性检测的系统性表征，为未来鲁棒可靠的3DGS系统研究奠定基础。

title: SkillPyramid: A Hierarchical Skill Consolidation Framework for Self-Evolving Agents
summary: Recent AI agents can flexibly invoke skills to solve complex tasks, but their long-term improvement is fundamentally constrained by a lack of systematic skill construction, accumulation, and transfer. In particular, without a unified framework for skill consolidation, agents tend to redundantly construct similar capabilities across different tasks, are unable to effectively transform experience into reusable assets, and struggle to generalize task-specific skills to novel scenarios. To address this limitation, we propose SkillPyramid, a skill consolidation framework that reuses existing skill experience for broader task generalization. Operating on a hierarchical skill topology, SkillPyramid further introduces a self-evolution mechanism that enables agents to compose, validate, and incorporate new skills during task execution. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and ScienceWorld across four backbone models show that SkillPyramid substantially increases the average reward by 38.0% and reduces execution steps by 27.7%. Overall, our method transforms a skill collection from a static resource pool into a dynamic evolution system.

AI.tldr: 提出SkillPyramid框架，通过层次化技能拓扑和自演化机制实现技能的动态构建、积累与迁移，解决AI代理长期能力提升受限的问题。
AI.motivation: 解决AI代理缺乏系统性技能构建、积累和转移机制的问题，避免重复构建相似能力，无法将经验转化为可复用资产。
AI.method: 构建层次化技能拓扑，引入自演化机制（技能组合、验证、整合），在任务执行过程中动态更新技能库。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和ScienceWorld上测试，平均奖励提升38.0%，执行步骤减少27.7%。
AI.conclusion: SkillPyramid 将技能集合从静态资源池转变为动态进化系统，显著提升AI代理的任务完成效率和泛化能力。

title: AvatarMix: Identity-Preserving Cross-Avatar Composition for Outfit Personalization
comment: CVPR 2026 Findings. 16 pages, including supplementary material
summary: Existing 3D avatar outfit transfer methods face distinct challenges: approaches that lift 2D edits to 3D often suffer from outfit or identity quality degradation, while those that separately model body and clothing layers are prone to intersection artifacts. We introduce AvatarMix, a compositional paradigm that bypasses these issues by directly composing the head and body from two high-fidelity Gaussian avatars. While this paradigm inherently preserves outfit quality and avoids intersections, it introduces challenges in creating a seamless join and maintaining appearance fidelity after body reshaping. To this end, we propose a two-tier refinement strategy: SeamFix, a localized diffusion module that refines hair and neck to ensure an artifact-free join, and an optional full-body refinement, FullbodyFix, that restores garment appearance when retargeting degrades the clothed body. Both operate on renders from an already 3D-consistent Gaussian avatar, which limits multi-view artifacts compared to 2D-to-3D lifting. To preserve the user's body identity, our mesh-based Gaussian representation enables the adaptation of a robust mesh retargeting technique, precisely reshaping the clothed body to the user's physique and robustly handling diverse body shapes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results in outfit fidelity and identity preservation, providing a new perspective for realistic 3D outfit personalization. Project page: https://larsph.github.io/avatarmix/

AI.tldr: 本文提出AvatarMix方法，通过组合两个高保真Gaussian头像来实现3D头像服装迁移，解决了现有方法的服装质量下降和交叉伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D头像服装迁移方法存在两大挑战：2D编辑提升到3D会导致服装或身份质量下降；分别建模身体和服装层容易产生交叉伪影。
AI.method: 采用组合范式，直接从头部和身体两个高保真Gaussian头像组成；提出两步精炼策略：SeamFix局部扩散模块修饰头发和颈部，FullbodyFix可选的全身精炼恢复服装外观；使用基于网格的Gaussian表示实现身体重塑。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在服装保真度和身份保持方面达到最先进水平，为现实的3D服装个性化提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: AvatarMix通过组合范式和精炼策略有效解决了3D服装迁移中的质量和伪影问题，保留了用户的身体身份特征。

Although AvatarMix uses diffusion refinement modules (similar term), its goal is clothing migration between 3D avatars, not cross-modal video-to-motion conversion. The pain points are unrelated - the profile needs video-motion alignment and temporal consistency, while AvatarMix addresses clothing fidelity and identity preservation in 3D avatar composition.

title: Dynamic Objective Selection with Safeguards and LLM Oversight for Financial Decision-Making
comment: Accpeted to The 2nd Workskop on Advances in Financial AI Workshop: Towards Agentic and Responsible Systems at ICLR 2026
summary: Financial decision-making tasks such as stock recommendation and portfolio allocation typically estimate future return and risk and then select trades or allocations for an investor, and the chosen optimization objective often determines realized performance. However, because market conditions evolve over time, a fixed objective can be suboptimal across regimes, while regime-switching pipelines that rely on latent regime estimates can be noisy or delayed and frequent switching can increase turnover and operational instability. In this paper, we propose DOSS (Dynamic Objective Selection with Safeguards), a learning-based selector that directly chooses the decision-relevant objective function at each time point from interpretable statistical summaries of recent returns, selecting among a small set of candidates (e.g., return-seeking, loss-averse, and risk-adjusted) without introducing intermediate regime variables. DOSS formulates objective selection as a classification problem over objectives and performs sequential updates with a rolling window to make forward-looking selections without temporal leakage, while also outputting a confidence score for each proposal. To mitigate misselection and excessive switching in deployment, DOSS applies confidence-aware gating with a fail-safe that overrides low-confidence proposals to a conservative default and enforces explicit controls tied to switching frequency. We further integrate governance by positioning a Large Language Model (LLM) as an oversight component rather than a generator of new objectives: the LLM is restricted to accept a proposed objective or override it to a predefined safe default, with deterministic rule-based constraints triggering overrides when needed.

AI.tldr: DOSS（动态目标选择与保障）是一种学习型选择器，直接从近期收益的统计摘要中选取相关决策目标函数（如追求回报、损失厌恶、风险调整后收益），无需引入中间 regime 变量，并通过置信度感知门控和切换频率控制来防止错误选择和过度切换。
AI.motivation: 金融决策任务如股票推荐和投资组合配置需要估计未来收益和风险，但固定目标在不同的市场环境下可能次优；依赖潜在 regime 估计的切换管道可能存在噪声或延迟，且频繁切换会增加换手率和运营不稳定风险。
AI.method: 将目标选择表述为分类问题，使用滚动窗口进行顺序更新以实现前瞻性选择而不产生时间泄露；输出置信度分数；应用置信度感知门控配合失效保护，将低置信度提议覆盖至保守默认值；强制执行切换频率的显式控制；集成LLM作为监督组件，仅接受提议目标或覆盖至预定义安全默认值，触发确定性规则约束。
AI.result: 提出了DOSS框架，整合了分类器、置信度机制、保障约束和LLM治理监督，用于动态选择金融决策目标函数。
AI.conclusion: DOSS通过直接学习目标选择而非间接估计regime，结合多重保障机制和LLM监督，为金融决策中的目标适配提供了可解释且稳健的解决方案。
