It has nothing to do with video-to-motion generation, 3D motion synthesis, cross-modal alignment between video and motion, or text-to-motion generation that the research profile focuses on.

title: Entropy Is Not Enough: Unlocking Effective Reinforcement Learning for Visual Reasoning via Vision-Anchored Token Selection
summary: While token-level entropy is commonly recognized as effective for credit assignment in text-only reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), it remains unclear whether this mechanism still holds in visual reasoning. Our controlled study shows that this mechanism collapses in visual reasoning due to the omission of vision-sensitive tokens with naturally low entropy. Although existing multimodal RL methods increasingly acknowledge the importance of visual perception, they struggle to satisfy the inherent demand for interleaving precise perceptual grounding with semantic reasoning, either lacking systematic visual measurements or overlooking that token entropy primarily drives semantic exploration. To address this, we introduce VEPO (Vision-Entropy token-selection for Policy Optimization), an effective RL framework explicitly integrating visual sensitivity with token entropy via a principled multiplicative coupling, where VEPO redirects gradient credit toward tokens which are simultaneously visually grounded and highly informative. Extensive experiments demonstrate VEPO's leading performance, significantly outperforming the entropy-only baseline by 2.28 points at 7B-scale and 3.15 points at 3B-scale. Ablations further substantiate the soundness of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉推理任务中token级熵的信用分配机制失效问题，提出VEPO框架通过视觉敏感性与token熵的乘法耦合来重新定向梯度信用，在7B和3B规模上分别超越基线2.28和3.15个百分点。
AI.motivation: 文本强化学习中token级熵被证实能有效进行信用分配，但在视觉推理中该机制失效，因为低熵的视觉敏感token被忽略。现有多模态RL方法虽认识到视觉感知重要性，但缺乏系统的视觉测量或忽视token熵驱动语义探索的本质。
AI.method: 提出VEPO框架，通过乘法耦合将视觉敏感性与token熵显式整合，使梯度信用重定向至同时具备视觉grounding和高信息量的token。设计视觉敏感性测量并与语义信息度结合进行token选择。
AI.result: 实验表明VEPO在7B规模上超越entropy-only基线2.28分，在3B规模上超越3.15分，消融实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 视觉推理中需显式整合视觉敏感情境信息与语义探索机制，VEPO通过乘法耦合的token选择策略成功解决了传统entropy机制的失效问题，为多模态RL的视觉推理提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Visual Reasoning for Large Language Models (improving multimodal LLM performance on visual question answering benchmarks), which is entirely different from the research profile focused on Computer Graphics for video-to-motion generation. While both deal with visual inputs, the application domains are completely separate: the paper targets text generation from images/videos through RL-based token selection, whereas the research profile requires converting 2D video to 3D motion sequences with temporal consistency and cross-modal alignment. The methods and target outputs have no meaningful overlap.

title: Graph Regularized Non-negative Reduced Biquaternion Matrix Factorization for Color Image Recognition
summary: Non-negative reduced biquaternion matrix factorization (NRBMF) uses the product of reduced biquaternion (RB) matrices to incorporate the non-negativity constraints of color image pixels into the factorization process. However, NRBMF mainly focuses on reconstruction accuracy and does not exploit the local geometric structure of image data, which may limit the discriminative ability of the learned low-dimensional features. To address this issue, we propose a graph regularized non-negative reduced biquaternion matrix factorization (GNRBMF) model for color image recognition. The proposed model incorporates a graph Laplacian regularizer into the reduced biquaternion coefficient matrix, encouraging nearby samples in the original space to have similar representations in the learned feature space. Meanwhile, GNRBMF retains the non-negativity-preserving property of NRBMF in the reduced biquaternion domain. To solve the optimization problem, a component-wise alternating projected gradient algorithm is derived, and its convergence properties are analyzed. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed GNRBMF model achieves competitive or superior recognition performance in some tested settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出图正则化非负简化双四元数矩阵分解(GNRBMF)模型用于颜色图像识别。该模型在NRBMF基础上引入图拉普拉斯正则化，使原始空间中相近的样本在特征空间中也具有相似的表示，同时保留了简化双四元数域中的非负性保持特性。
AI.motivation: NRBMF主要关注重建准确性，未能利用图像数据的局部几何结构，可能限制学习到的低维特征的区分能力。需要一种能在保持非负性约束的同时，利用数据局部几何结构的 factorization 方法。
AI.method: 将图拉普拉斯正则化项整合到简化双四元数系数矩阵中，推导了逐分量交替投影梯度算法来求解优化问题，并分析了其收敛性质。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，提出的GNRBMF模型在颜色图像识别任务中达到或超过了现有方法的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入图正则化机制，GNRBMF成功将数据的局部几何结构信息融入分解过程，提高了特征表示的判别能力，在颜色图像识别方面具有有效性和优势。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses color IMAGE RECOGNITION using matrix factorization (GNRBMF), which is a computer vision task. This is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for 2D video-to-3D motion generation. While both fields involve images, the application domains are completely different: the paper deals with image classification using dimensionality reduction, whereas the profile needs video generation models, cross-modal pipelines for video-to-motion conversion, and 3D motion synthesis. None of the methods (matrix factorization, graph regularization) align with the specified methods (Video Generation Models like Wanxiang/Seedance, VLMs, 3D Motion Generation Models). This represents a case of "completely irrelevant" - different research field entirely.

title: Imaginative Perception Tokens Enhance Spatial Reasoning in Multimodal Language Models
summary:
Vision language models (VLMs) excel at many tasks but still struggle with spatial reasoning when critical information is not directly observable. Many such problems require imaginative perception: inferring what would be seen from an unseen viewpoint, tracing paths through occluded spaces, or integrating partial observations into a coherent spatial representation. We introduce Imaginative Perception Tokens (IPT), intermediate perceptual representations that externalize what a VLM would perceive under alternative spatial configurations while remaining consistent with the observed input.
  To study this capability, we formulate three tasks, Perspective Taking (PET), Path Tracing (PT), and Multiview Counting (MVC), and construct datasets of approximately 20K examples with ground truth imaginations, answers, and evaluation benchmarks. Using the unified VLM BAGEL as the backbone, IPT supervision consistently improves spatial reasoning and often outperforms textual chain of thought training, even without generating images at inference time. On MVC, IPT improves accuracy by 3.4% and achieves competitive performance with strong closed-source models on PT. We further find that combining IPT and label-only supervision yields additional gains, whereas textual chain of thought can substantially degrade performance, suggesting a modality mismatch when spatial computation is forced through language. Overall, IPT provides a principled supervision signal for reasoning about unobserved spatial structure, improving generalization while producing interpretable intermediate representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Imaginative Perception Tokens (IPT)中间表征，帮助视觉语言模型在空间推理任务中模拟未观察视角下的视觉信息，在透视taking路径追踪和多视图计数任务上取得提升。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs在关键信息不可直接观察的空间推理方面存在困难，无法进行想象性感知如推断未观察视角应看到什么穿过遮挡空间的路径或整合部分观察为连贯空间表征。
AI.method: 构建三个空间推理任务PET PT MVC各约20K样本的评估基准数据集使用统一VLM BAGEL作为骨干通过IPT监督信号训练并与文本链式思考方法对比
AI.result: IPT监督持续提升空间推理能力且常优于文本链式思考训练，MVC任务准确率提升3.4%，PT任务达到与强闭源模型相当的性能，结合IPT和标签监督可获得额外增益，而文本链式思考可能显著降低性能
AI.conclusion: IPT为推理未观测空间结构提供了原则性监督信号，提升泛化能力同时产生可解释的中间表征，解决空间计算forced through language时的模态不匹配问题

relevance_reason: This paper is about improving spatial reasoning in VLMs for scene understanding tasks (path tracing, multi-view counting), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics - specifically video-to-3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment, and quality assessment for video generation models. While both mention "Visual Language Models," the VLM in this paper is used for spatial reasoning about scenes, not for quality assessment in a video-to-motion pipeline. The application domain (VLM spatial reasoning) is fundamentally different from Computer Graphics/motion generation. The paper does not address any of the four pain points listed (cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency, quality control for motion generation, text-to-motion semantic alignment).

title: Beyond Single Solution: Multi-Hypothesis Collaborative Deep Unfolding Network for Image Compressive Sensing
summary: Recent deep unfolding networks (DUNs) have advanced Compressive Sensing (CS) by effectively integrating iterative optimization with deep learning architectures. However, most CS approaches predominantly confine their inference to a single solution space, neglecting the inherent ill-posedness of CS problems that intrinsically permits multiple plausible candidate hypotheses. In this paper, a novel Multi-Hypothesis Collaborative Deep Unfolding CS Network (MHC-DUN) is proposed, which explicitly models and leverages multiple hypotheses by jointly optimizing across diverse solution spaces. Specifically, following the Proximal Gradient Descent algorithm, MHC-DUN jointly performs gradient descent and proximal mapping within this multi-hypothesis paradigm. i) For gradient descent, a well-designed AlphaNet is introduced to dynamically predict spatially varying step sizes for all hypotheses, enabling collaborative gradient updates across multiple solutions. ii) For proximal operator, a sophisticated multi-hypothesis collaborative proximal mapping module is designed, which leverages both intra-hypothesis and inter-hypothesis correlation priors to jointly refine multiple solutions. To enable end-to-end training, a novel composite loss function is designed, which balances measurement fidelity, hypothesis diversity, and reconstruction accuracy, encouraging exploration of complementary solutions while maintaining reconstruction fidelity. Experimental results reveal that the proposed CS method outperforms existing CS networks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多假设协作深度展开压缩感知网络(MHC-DUN),通过联合优化多个解空间来解决传统CS方法的ill-posed问题,在测量保真度、假设多样性和重建精度之间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有CS深度展开网络局限于单一解空间,忽视了CS问题的本质ill-posed特性(即允许多个合理解)。为此提出多假设协作框架来显式建模和利用多个候选假设。
AI.method: 基于近端梯度下降算法设计MHC-DUN:1)AlphaNet预测空间变化的步大小,实现跨多解的协作梯度更新;2)多假设协作近端映射模块利用假设内和假设间相关性先验联合细化各解;3)设计复合损失函数平衡测量保真度、假设多样性和重建精度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于现有CS网络。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MHC-DUN能有效探索互补解同时保持重建精度,为CS问题提供新的多假设协作解决思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Image Compressive Sensing - a computational imaging/signal processing method for reconstructing images from sparse measurements. While it involves neural networks and image processing, it has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, video-to-motion generation, cross-modal learning between 2D video and 3D motion, or any of the other methods mentioned in the research profile (Video Generation Models, VLMs for quality assessment, 3D Motion Generation). The application domain is completely different - this is signal processing/imaging science rather than computer graphics motion generation.

title: A Fast Methane Detection Pipeline on Board Satellites Based on Mag1c-SAS and LinkNet
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2507.01472
summary: Methane is a potent greenhouse gas, and detecting leaks early via hyperspectral satellite imagery can help climate change mitigation efforts. Meanwhile, many existing hyperspectral missions only capture areas manually targeted by operators, thus missing potential events of interest. To overcome slow downlink rates cost-effectively, onboard detection is a viable solution. However, traditional methane detection methods are too computationally demanding for resource-limited onboard hardware. This work accelerates methane detection by focusing on efficient, low-power algorithms. In particular, we test fast target detection ACE and CEM methods that have not been previously used for methane detection and propose Mag1c-SAS -- a significantly faster variant of the current state-of-the-art Mag1c algorithm. To explore their detection potential, we integrate them with a machine learning model based on U-Net and LinkNet. We evaluate our methods on the STARCOP dataset and a novel EMIT-MSeg dataset, which we introduce and open-source alongside a high-quality annotation strategy. The proposed Mag1c-SAS approach proves highly effective by operating ~80x faster than the original Mag1c approach, providing a visually similar, but noisier result. When additionally paired with the lightweight LinkNet approach, it effectively reduces noise, achieving AUPRC score improvements of over 30 pp on EMIT-MSeg compared to the baseline Mag1c approach, and an F1 score on STARCOP ~4 pp higher. We evaluate two novel band selection strategies and confirm the system's onboard viability through hardware profiling, demonstrating marginal power consumption and efficient CPU/RAM utilization. We release the final system in a user-friendly and lightweight PyPI library at: https://pypi.org/project/onboard-methane-detection/, alongside all experimental code, models, and data at: https://github.com/zaitra/methane-filters-benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种针对 hyperspectral satellite imagery 的快速甲烷泄漏检测方法。通过开发 Mag1c-SAS 算法（比原版快约80倍）结合 U-Net/LinkNet 机器学习模型，并在新引入的 EMIT-MSeg 数据集和 STARCOP 数据集上进行验证，实现了明显的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统甲烷检测方法计算量大，难以在资源受限的卫星硬件上运行；同时现有 hy spektral 任务多为手动targeted，可能遗漏潜在泄漏事件。需要开发低功耗、高效的检测算法来实现 onboard 检测。
AI.method: 测试了快速目标检测 ACE 和 CEM 方法，提出 Mag1c-SAS 算法变体；集成 U-Net 和 LinkNet 机器学习模型；引入并开源 EMIT-MSeg 数据集及高质量标注策略；评估两种新颖的 band selection 策略；通过硬件 profiling 验证 onboard 可行性。
AI.result: Mag1c-SAS 比原版 Mag1c 快约80倍；在 EMIT-MSeg 上 AUPRC 提升超过30个百分点；在 STARCOP 上 F1 分数提升约4个百分点；系统功耗低，CPU/RAM 利用率高，满足 onboard 部署要求。
AI.conclusion: 成功开发了高效、低功耗的甲烷检测系统，通过 Mag1c-SAS + LinkNet 组合实现了速度与精度的平衡，具有显著的 onboard 应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses methane detection in hyperspectral satellite imagery using U-Net/LinkNet models - completely different application domain (remote sensing/satellite science vs computer graphics). No relation to video-to-motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, or any of the specified methods like Seedance/Wanxiang VLMs for quality assessment.

title: Investigating Adversarial Robustness of Multi-modal Large Language Models
summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance on vision-language tasks, but incorporating visual inputs through a vision encoder (e.g., CLIP) substantially expands the attack surface, making these models vulnerable to visual adversarial perturbations. Prior defenses typically preserve compatibility with pretrained MLLMs by enforcing strict alignment to CLIP's original embedding space during adversarial fine-tuning; while practical, this constraint fundamentally limits achievable robustness. We present a systematic investigation of adversarial robustness in MLLMs. We first introduce a diagnostic CLIP-alignment protocol that predicts, prior to full MLLM training, which robust vision encoders will transfer effectively to the multimodal setting, revealing that large-scale multimodal adversarial pretraining, rather than unimodal scale alone, is the critical factor for strong robustness transfer. Integrating such encoders into MLLMs via end-to-end multimodal training yields average gains of 28 CIDEr points on captioning and 11.7% VQA accuracy under strong adversarial attacks compared to constrained plug-and-play baselines. We further show that adversarial training applied directly to a standard non-robust MLLM degrades both clean and adversarial performance, establishing robust visual representations as a strict prerequisite, while end-to-end adversarial training from a robust backbone delivers additional gains of 1.9 CIDEr points and 4.3% VQA accuracy. Beyond training-time defenses, lightweight test-time visual stochastic transformations serve as an effective black-box defense for non-robust MLLMs, elevating adversarial performance from near-zero to levels comparable with robust models. Finally, we show that our robust models substantially reduce toxic generation under white-box visual jailbreak attacks. Code and pretrained weights will be released publicly.

AI.tldr: 多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)在视觉对抗攻击面前存在脆弱性，研究通过诊断协议和端到端训练来提升其对抗鲁棒性，发现大规模多模态对抗预训练是关键，可显著提升在Captioning和VQA任务上的对抗性能。
AI.motivation: 现有防御通过约束对齐CLIP嵌入空间来保持兼容性，但这限制了可实现的鲁棒性；需要系统研究MLLM的对抗鲁棒性问题并探索更有效的防御策略。
AI.method: 提出诊断CLIP对齐协议预测哪些鲁棒视觉编码器能有效迁移到多模态设置；采用端到端多模态对抗预训练；测试时视觉随机变换等方法。
AI.result: 集成鲁棒编码器后相比即插即用基线获得28 CIDEr分数(Captioning)和11.7% VQA准确率提升；从鲁棒骨干进行端到端对抗训练额外获得1.9 CIDEr和4.3% VQA提升；测试时变换可将非鲁棒模型的对抗性能从接近零提升到与鲁棒模型相当；且显著减少白盒视觉越狱攻击下的毒性生成。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒视觉表示是对抗训练成功的严格前提条件；大规模多模态对抗预训练比单模态规模更重要；端到端多模态训练结合多种防御策略是提升MLLM对抗鲁棒性的最有效途径。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于多模态大语言模型(MLLM)的对抗鲁棒性，属于AI/安全研究方向，与计算机图形学的视频到三维动作生成应用完全不相关。虽然都涉及多模态技术，但研究目标完全不同：一个关注模型安全性/防御，一个关注动作生成质量。方法上虽有端到端训练等相似术语，但解决的问题域不同，因此相关性极低。

title: Text-to-Image Models Need Less from Text Encoders Than You Think
summary: Text-to-image models rely on text prompts as their primary interface to human intent. Prompts are encoded by a text encoder into embeddings that condition the image generation process. Beyond individual token meanings, text embeddings encode contextual information across the full prompt, such as compositionality and attribute binding. However, whether image models actually exploit this richer information remains underexplored. Here, we address the question: Which aspects of text representation are essential for image generation? We show that text-to-image diffusion transformer-based models commonly rely only on two relatively straightforward aspects of text representations: (i) the merging of adjacent tokens into a word representation, for words spanning multiple tokens, and (ii) word order, which is imprinted by the positional embedding of the text-encoder. To show this, we construct a new text embedding that encodes only individual word meanings and order but lacks any contextual information about the full prompt. We find that this bag of position-tagged words representation is sufficient to successfully guide image generation, achieving visual quality and text fidelity that are on par with full text embedding-guided generation. This demonstrates that, contrary to common belief, text-to-image models often do not use the rich information encoded in the text embedding beyond individual word meanings and word order. Instead, the decoding of complex linguistic structures is performed by the image model itself. Project webpage: https://nsping13.github.io/contextless-TTI/

AI.tldr: 论文研究文本到图像模型如何使用文本嵌入信息，发现模型实际上只需要两个简单特征：多token合并为单词表示和词序，而不需要丰富的上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 探究文本到图像模型是否利用了文本嵌入中的丰富上下文信息，如组合性和属性绑定等。
AI.method: 构建了一种仅编码个别词义和词序但缺乏完整提示上下文信息的"位置标记词袋"表示新文本嵌入。
AI.result: 这种简化的表示足以成功引导图像生成，在视觉质量和文本保真度方面与完整文本嵌入引导的生成相当。
AI.conclusion: 文本到图像模型通常不使用文本嵌入中除词义和词序之外的丰富信息，复杂的语言结构解码由图像模型本身完成。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper focuses onText-to-Image generation (creating 2D images from text), while the research profile is about Video-to-Motion generation (converting 2D video to 3D human motion). Although both may use diffusion models, they are in entirely different application domains - image generation vs motion generation. The paper studies how text encoders work in image generation models, which has no relevance to cross-modal alignment between video and 3D motion, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, or semantic alignment between text prompts and 3D motion output.

title: Beyond False Stability: High-Noise Drift Gating for Test-Time Adversarial Defenses in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP show strong zero-shot generalization but remain highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Adversarial training improves robustness but is computationally expensive, motivating test-time defenses. Recent approaches exploit how CLIP's visual representations respond to stochastic perturbations: aggregating predictions across noisy views, constructing Gaussian noise-averaged anchors and interpolating features toward them, or applying counter-perturbations. These strategies improve robustness but often degrade clean accuracy, yielding an unfavorable clean-robust trade-off. We revisit stochastic test-time defenses and identify an underexplored noise-regime transition in CLIP's representation space. Prior work explored perturbations mainly in the weak-noise regime, where adversarial examples can appear unusually stable (false stability). Our analysis shows this reverses as perturbation strength grows: beyond the weak-noise regime, adversarial representations become markedly more unstable than clean ones, giving a clearer separation signal. The transition is consistent across uniform and Gaussian noise, photometric and geometric transforms, datasets, and diverse attacks. It largely disappears in adversarially trained models, suggesting it is tied to the fragile local-basin geometry of adversarial representations in non-robust CLIP. We propose a training-free, plug-in drift-gated mechanism that uses high-noise feature drift as a lightweight gating signal to trigger existing test-time defenses only when adversarial-like instability is detected. Across 13 datasets it consistently improves the clean-robust trade-off. On eight fine-grained datasets, mean clean+adversarial accuracy rises from 65.7% to 71.4% for counterattack defenses and 68.4% to 73.2% for noise-anchoring; on ImageNet and four shifted variants, from 56.1% to 66.2% and 62.1% to 67.6%.

AI.tldr: 本文发现CLIP在弱噪声下对对抗样本存在"虚假稳定性"现象，而在强噪声下对抗表征反而变得更不稳定。基于此提出一种无需训练的即插即用漂移门控机制，可触发现有测试时防御措施，从而改善CLIP的清洁-鲁棒准确率权衡。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型如CLIP虽具有零样本泛化能力，但易受对抗攻击。对抗训练计算昂贵，现有的随机测试时防御虽然改善鲁棒性但往往损害清洁准确率，形成不利的清洁-鲁棒权衡问题。
AI.method: 作者分析CLIP表征空间在不同噪声强度下的行为，提出利用高噪声特征漂移作为门控信号，检测到对抗式不稳定时才触发现有测试时防御的即插即用机制。
AI.result: 该方法在13个数据集上均改善了清洁-鲁棒权衡。8个细粒度数据集上，反击防御从65.7%提升至71.4%，噪声锚定从68.4%提升至73.2%；ImageNet及其4个变体上，分别从56.1%升至66.2%和62.1%升至67.6%。
AI.conclusion: 弱噪声下对抗表征表现出虚假稳定性，而强噪声下变得比清洁表征更不稳定，这种噪声区域转换不一致性是非鲁棒CLIP的独特几何特性，可被利用来设计无需训练的轻量级防御机制。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on adversarial defense mechanisms for Vision-Language Models (CLIP), which is in the domain of computer vision security/robustness. It is NOT related to Computer Graphics at all. While both mention "Vision-Language Models," the application domains are completely different: the paper addresses adversarial robustness testing (defending against adversarial attacks), whereas the research profile requires video-to-3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between video and motion, temporal consistency, and quality assessment for generated videos. This paper does not address any of these computer graphics concerns.

title: Qwen-Image-Flash: Beyond Objective Design
summary: Few-step distillation has become an effective strategy for accelerating advanced visual generative models, yet prior work has largely focused on distillation objectives. In this work, we revisit few-step distillation from a complementary perspective, focusing on the training recipe that critically shapes student performance. Using Qwen-Image-2.0 as a representative case, we systematically investigate three factors in unified text-to-image generation and instruction-guided image editing distillation: data composition, teacher guidance, and task mixture. Our empirical analysis reveals several non-obvious behaviors, which motivate the development of Qwen-Image-Flash. Overall, our results suggest that effective few-step distillation requires not only carefully designed objectives, but also principled organization of the broader training pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视少步蒸馏的训练配方而非蒸馏目标，使用Qwen-Image-2.0研究数据组成、教师指导和任务混合三个因素，提出Qwen-Image-Flash模型。
AI.motivation: 现有少步蒸馏工作主要关注蒸馏目标设计，而忽视了训练配方对学生模型性能的关键影响。需要从训练管道角度系统优化蒸馏效果。
AI.method: 在统一文生图和指令引导图像编辑任务上，系统研究数据组成、教师指导和任务混合三个因素对学生蒸馏性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现多个非直观行为，表明有效的少步蒸馏不仅需要精心设计的蒸馏目标，还需原则性的训练管道组织，最终开发出Qwen-Image-Flash。
AI.conclusion: 少步蒸馏的成功取决于整体训练流程的系统优化，而非单一目标的改进。这为视觉生成模型的加速蒸馏提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D text-to-image generation using diffusion models (Qwen-Image-Flash), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on video-to-3D motion conversion in Computer Graphics. While both use diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different - 2D image generation vs video-to-motion generation. The pain points in the profile (cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency, 3D motion quality control) are not addressed at all. This would require completely different methods targeting motion generation rather than static image synthesis.

title: Ultralytics YOLO26: Unified Real-Time End-to-End Vision Models
summary: Real-time vision demands models that are accurate, efficient, and simple to deploy across diverse hardware. The YOLO family has become widely deployed for this reason, yet most YOLO detectors still rely on non-maximum suppression at inference, carry heavy detection heads due to Distribution Focal Loss, require long training schedules, and can leave the smallest objects without positive label assignments. We present Ultralytics YOLO26, a unified real-time vision model family that addresses these limitations through coordinated architecture and training advances. YOLO26 uses a dual-head design for native NMS-free end-to-end inference and removes DFL entirely, yielding a lighter head with unconstrained regression range. Its training pipeline combines MuSGD, a hybrid Muon-SGD optimizer adapted from large language model training; Progressive Loss, which shifts supervision toward the inference-time head; and STAL, a label assignment strategy that guarantees positive coverage for small objects. Beyond detection, YOLO26 introduces task-specific head and loss designs for instance segmentation, pose estimation, and oriented detection, producing consistent gains across tasks and scales. The family spans five scales (n/s/m/l/x) and supports detection, instance segmentation, pose estimation, classification, and oriented detection in a single pipeline, with an open-vocabulary extension, YOLOE-26, for text-, visual-, and prompt-free inference. Across all scales, YOLO26 achieves 40.9-57.5 mAP on COCO at 1.7-11.8 ms T4 TensorRT latency, advancing the accuracy-latency Pareto front over prior real-time detectors, while YOLOE-26x reaches 40.6 AP on LVIS minival under text prompting. Code and models are available at https://github.com/ultralytics/ultralytics.

AI.tldr: YOLO26是Ultralytics推出的新一代实时视觉模型家族，通过双头设计实现端到端NMS自由推理，移除DFL以减轻检测头，并采用MuSGD优化器、Progressive Loss训练策略和STAL标签分配方法解决小物体漏检问题。模型覆盖5个规模(n/s/m/l/x)，支持检测、分割、姿态估计、定向检测和分类等多种任务，在COCO上达到40.9-57.5 mAP，延迟仅1.7-11.8ms。
AI.motivation: 现有YOLO检测器存在四大核心痛点：1)推理依赖非极大值抑制(NMS)；2)Distribution Focal Loss导致检测头繁重；3)需要长训练周期；4)小物体容易缺乏正样本标签。因此需要构建更高效、准确、易部署的统一实时视觉模型。
AI.method: 架构创新：(1)双头Design实现原生NMS-free端到端推理；(2)移除DFL，使用无约束回归范围，大幅减轻检测头。训练创新：(1)MuSGD混合优化器，源自大语言模型训练；(2)Progressive Loss将监督逐步转移至推理头；(3)STAL标签分配保证小物体正样本覆盖。任务扩展：针对实例分割、姿态估计、定向目标检测设计专用头和损失函数。支持开放词汇扩展YOLOE-26，支持文本/视觉/提示自由推理。
AI.result: 五个规模在COCO上达成40.9-57.5 mAP，T4 TensorRT延迟1.7-11.8ms，精度-延迟Pareto前沿超越前代实时检测器。YOLOE-26x在LVIS minival文本提示下达40.6 AP。一套pipeline支持检测/分割/姿态/分类/定向检测五种任务。
AI.conclusion: YOLO26通过协调的架构与训练创新，系统性解决了YOLO系列的历史痛点，在精度、效率、部署简洁性上全面突破，构建了统一的实时视觉基座模型，为开源社区提供了高性能、可扩展的视觉基础方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about computer vision object detection (YOLO26), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics: video-to-3D-motion generation. Even though both involve visual content, they are completely different application domains - object detection vs motion generation. YOLO26 doesn't address any cross-modal video-to-motion alignment, temporal consistency, or 3D motion generation - it solves problems specific to 2D image detection like NMS and small object detection in COCO dataset.

title: AmbientEye: A Dataset for Pupil Segmentation under Natural Ambient Infrared Illumination
summary: Eye tracking is essential for smart glasses, as it provides insight into user attention for ambient intelligence applications. However, most existing eye-tracking systems rely on active infrared (IR) illumination, creating practical barriers to all-day outdoor use due to power consumption. In this paper, we investigate whether passive IR cameras alone, without any active IR light source, can enable reliable pupil detection in unconstrained outdoor environments, where ambient sunlight serves as the sole illumination source. To support this investigation, we introduce AmbientEye, a large-scale dataset of 2,606,225 eye images collected from 35 participants from 19 countries. It is captured outdoors under natural sunlight with two off-axis camera configurations and two sun-orientation conditions. We provide high-quality pupil annotation through SAM2 automatic segmentation, followed by refinement by human annotators. We benchmark a state-of-the-art pupil segmentation algorithm on our dataset and compare its performance with that on existing datasets under controlled IR illumination. Results reveal a substantial drop in pupil segmentation performance from 0.928 on controlled IR datasets to 0.767 on AmbientEye. This performance gap highlights the challenge of the ambient-light setting. This positions AmbientEye as a first benchmark for an unexplored and highly practical eye-tracking scenario.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索了仅使用被动红外相机在自然阳光下进行眼睛跟踪的可行性，并构建了大规模数据集AmbientEye来评估这一场景的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有眼动追踪系统依赖主动红外照明，限制了智能眼镜在户外长时间使用的便携性。研究旨在验证无主动光源时，仅凭环境阳光是否能实现可靠的瞳孔检测。
AI.method: 构建包含260万+眼图的大规模数据集AmbientEye，采集自19个国家35名参与者，使用两种离轴相机配置和两种太阳 orientation条件。采用SAM2自动分割后经人工修正进行高精度标注，并在该数据集上基准测试先进瞳孔分割算法。
AI.result: 在受控红外照明数据集上性能达0.928，但在AmbientEye数据集上骤降至0.767，性能差距显著，凸显环境光设置的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: AmbientEye成为首个针对这一实际户外眼动追踪场景的基准数据集，为无需主动照明的被动式眼动追踪研究开辟了新方向。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about eye tracking/pupil segmentation under natural illumination (computer vision/perceptual computing domain), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on video-to-motion generation for 3D human motion synthesis. Both use computer vision techniques but have entirely different application domains, goals, and target outputs. The paper addresses gaze estimation, not cross-modal video-to-motion conversion or 3D motion generation.

title: SLU-2K: A Question-Based Benchmark for Semantic Evaluation of Sign Language Translation
summary: Sign Language Translation (SLT) is typically evaluated with surface-form metrics such as BLEU and ROUGE, which reward lexical overlap but do not directly measure whether a translation preserves the meaning of the source sign sequence. This is in contrast with the final objective of integrating SLT in assistive technology. In this work, we shift the focus from Sign Language Translation (SLT) to Sign Language Understanding (SLU), with particular emphasis on semantic understanding. Specifically, we evaluate systems based on their ability to correctly recover, from the input video, key semantic aspects of the original sentence, such as actions taking place and facts about people and objects. To enable this evaluation systematically, we propose SLU-2K, a dataset of 2,350 closed-ended video question-answer pairs based on the popular PHOENIX-2014T and CSL-Daily datasets. To obtain SLU-2K, we propose and extensively evaluate an automated data generation pipeline which produces questions across 7 categories, namely actions, locations, numbers, objects, people, time, and weather conditions. We show the potential of SLU-2K by evaluating popular Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and two representative state-of-the-art systems, MMSTL and SpaMo. Our results show that MLLMs reach near-random performance, highlighting the need for a more systematic integration of SLU in current AI systems. Furthermore, state-of-the-art translation systems carefully fine-tuned on in-domain data still exhibit a substantial semantic gap, with results ranging from 56.7% to 75.2%. These findings suggest that current SLT evaluation protocols overestimate true understanding and that future progress should be measured not only by fluency and n-gram overlap, but also by semantic correctness. Code, prompts, and benchmark files are available at https://github.com/ZenoTsT/SLU-2K

AI.tldr: 将手语翻译(SLT)评估从表面指标(BLEU/ROUGE)转向语义理解(SLU)，提出SLU-2K数据集(2350个问答对)评估系统对动作、人物、物体等语义元素的理解能力，发现当前多模态大语言模型表现接近随机，最先进翻译系统存在显著语义差距。
AI.motivation: 现有手语翻译评估仅关注词汇重叠的表面指标，无法衡量翻译是否真正保留源语句意义，这与辅助技术集成的最终目标不符，亟需转向语义理解评估。
AI.method: 基于PHOENIX-2014T和CSL-Daily数据集构建包含7类问题的SLU-2K数据集，自动生成2350个封闭域视频问答对，评估多模态大语言模型及MMSTL、SpaMo等先进翻译系统。
AI.result: 多模态大语言模型表现接近随机；最先进翻译系统在仔细微调后语义准确率仅为56.7%至75.2%，存在显著语义差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前SLT评估协议高估了真实理解能力，未来进展应同时衡量语义正确性而非仅关注流利度和n-gram重叠，手语理解研究需从翻译转向语义理解评估。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Sign Language Translation (NLP/assistive technology), not Computer Graphics. While it deals with video input containing human motion, the output is text translation, not 3D motion generation. The application domain is fundamentally different: video-to-text (SLT) vs video-to-3D-motion (computer graphics). Both use video understanding, but the end goal and output format differ completely. This would be useful primarily if you're working on sign language animation specifically, not general video-to-motion generation.

title: Training-Free Multi-Concept LoRA Composition with Prompt-Aware Weighting
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) successfully enables personalization in text-to-image generation by adapting pre-trained diffusion models to specific visual concepts and styles. However, extending such models to multi-concept customization remains challenging. Naively combining multiple LoRA weights or their outputs often leads to interference among concepts, resulting in degraded visual quality and reduced fidelity to the reference images of individual concepts. This paper proposes a simple yet effective approach for multi-concept customization by optimally combining the outputs of multiple LoRA modules. We leverage the relative importance of each concept during generation, as inferred from its corresponding prompt tokens and introduce two methods, W-Switch and W-Composite, that employ a prompt-aware importance weighting strategy in which each LoRA is weighted according to the semantic influence of its trigger words in the target prompt. In addition, we extend existing quantitative evaluation metrics by proposing a new image-based similarity evaluation framework that assesses image fidelity and identity preservation through comparisons between real-world reference images and automatically segmented concept regions from generated images. We evaluate our approach on the ComposLoRA testbed and demonstrate consistent improvements over existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual quality, identity preservation and compositionality. Qualitative evaluations, including a Large Language Model (LLM) based assessment and a user study, further validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods and align with the newly introduced quantitative image-based metrics. Our code is available at https://github.com/GeorgeTsoumplekas/Prompt-Aware-Multi-LoRA-Composition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单而有效的多概念定制方法，通过最优组合多个LoRA模块的输出来解决文本到图像生成中的多概念个性化问题。
AI.motivation: LoRA虽然能够实现单概念的文本到图像生成个性化，但扩展到多概念定制时存在挑战。简单合并多个LoRA权重或输出会导致概念间干扰，视觉质量下降，对参考图像的保真度降低。
AI.method: 提出两种基于提示感知重要性加权的方法：W-Switch和W-Composite。每个LoRA根据其触发词在目标提示中的语义影响进行加权。同时提出了一个新的基于图像相似度的评估框架，通过比较真实参考图像与生成图像中自动分割的概念区域来评估图像保真度和身份保留。
AI.result: 在ComposLoRA测试基准上的一致性改进，视觉质量、身份保留和组合性方面均优于现有最先进方法。定性和定量评估（包括LLM评估和用户研究）进一步验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过提示感知的LoRA加权组合策略，成功实现了高质量的多概念定制生成，为多概念个性化图像生成提供了一种简单有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on text-to-image generation personalization using LoRA composition, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's video-to-motion conversion. While both use generative AI methods, they address entirely different problems: generating/editing 2D images from text vs converting 2D video to 3D motion. The pain points, target outputs, and core methodologies (image generation vs motion generation) are fundamentally misaligned.

title: Beyond Compression: Quantifying Spectral Accessibility in Vision Representations
summary: Vision-language models map visual features into a shared embedding space through learned projection layers, yet it remains unclear how these transformations alter the structure of visual information. This study examines changes in representation through spatial-frequency accessibility, measured by the linear recoverability of band-limited Fourier energy from model representations. To isolate effects beyond dimensionality reduction, we introduce Residual Spectral Loss (RSL), which evaluates changes relative to a dimension-matched random projection baseline. To reduce confounding effects from optimization, the analysis uses pretrained models with all parameters frozen. The experimental results show consistent frequency-dependent changes in accessibility across CLIP and DINOv2 on ImageNet and MS-COCO datasets. Spectral accessibility follows a non-monotonic trajectory across depth, peaking at intermediate layers before decreasing toward the output representation. The final transformation differs across architectures: CLIP's learned projection is spectrally neutral, with changes explained by compression, whereas DINOv2's [CLS] pooling induces a structured loss across the spectrum. These findings identify intermediate layers and pooling mechanisms as primary drivers of spectral transformation in modern vision encoders.

AI.tldr: 研究通过空间频率可访问性分析视觉-语言模型中学到的投影层如何改变视觉信息结构，发现中间层达到频率可访问性峰值，最终变换因架构而异（CLIP为中性，DINOv2[CLS]池化导致结构化损失）。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型通过学习的投影层将视觉特征映射到共享嵌入空间，但这些转换如何改变视觉信息结构尚不清楚，需要理解模型对视觉信息的transform。
AI.method: 引入残差光谱损失(RSL)评估相对于维度匹配随机投影基线的变化；使用预训练模型（参数冻结）排除优化混淆；在ImageNet和MS-COCO数据集上分析CLIP和DINOv2的表征。
AI.result: 光谱可访问性随深度呈非单调轨迹，在中间层达到峰值后向输出表征递减；最终变换：CLIP的学习投影是光谱中性（变化由压缩解释），而DINOv2的[CLS]池化在光谱上引起结构化损失。
AI.conclusion: 中间层和池化机制是现代视觉编码器中光谱变换的主要驱动因素；研究揭示了架构差异对表征 transformative 的关键影响。

relevance_reason: The paper studies spectral accessibility in vision-language model representations (CLIP, DINOv2), which is primarily computer vision research, not computer graphics. While it mentions video-related datasets (MS-COCO), there's no connection to video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, or temporal consistency - the core pain points in the research profile. Even though VLMs are mentioned as method components in the profile, this paper focuses on analyzing foundational vision representations rather than their application in cross-modal video-to-motion pipelines or quality assessment for generated video features.

title: Template Collapse and Information-Theoretic Limits in Camera rPPG Pulse Morphology Restoration
summary:
Objective: Consumer face camera remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables passive cardiovascular monitoring, but whether single-cycle waveform morphology encoding arterial stiffness biomarkers is recoverable from this measurement has not been characterised.
  Methods: We evaluated 16 architectures spanning six families on 153 subjects across three datasets, introducing cross-subject Pearson r to distinguish subject-specific recovery from template collapse.
  Results: No architecture recovered subject-specific morphology (cross-subject r range 0.773--0.9999; ground-truth ceiling 0.601). Supervised Contrastive (SupCon) converged to log N = 4.844, constituting the strongest available empirical evidence that no discriminative morphological structure is extractable from single-cycle rPPG by the encoder families tested. The VAE decoder restores population-level harmonic content absent from the rPPG input (H2/H1: 0.310 output vs. 0.275 input), generalising zero-shot to UBFC (r = +0.708); a directional hallucination gap (p = 0.150) suggests partial signal reading. Anti-collapse objectives fail when input carries no discriminative structure.
  Significance: Consumer cameras cannot encode individual arterial morphology; cross-subject r is a necessary collapse diagnostic for waveform reconstruction benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 研究consumer camera远程光电容积脉搏波(rPPG)能否从单周期波形中提取个体动脉僵硬度的形态学特征。评估了16种架构在153个受试者上的表现，发现没有任何架构能恢复个体特异性的形态学结构。SupCon达到log N=4.844，是测试中最强的编码器，但VAE解码器只能恢复群体水平的谐波内容，存在"幻觉"现象。
AI.motivation: Consumer face camera remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enable passive cardiovascular monitoring, but whether single-cycle waveform morphology encoding arterial stiffness biomarkers is recoverable from this measurement has not been characterized. This study aims to determine if individual arterial morphology can be encoded in consumer camera readings.
AI.method: Evaluated 16 architectures spanning six families on 153 subjects across three datasets, introducing cross-subject Pearson r to distinguish subject-specific recovery from template collapse.
AI.result: No architecture recovered subject-specific morphology (cross-subject r range 0.773-0.9999; ground-truth ceiling 0.601). Supervised Contrastive (SupCon) converged to log N = 4.844, constituting the strongest available empirical evidence that no discriminative morphological structure is extractable from single-cycle rPPG. The VAE decoder restores population-level harmonic content absent from the rPPG input (H2/H1: 0.310 output vs. 0.275 input), generalising zero-shot to UBFC (r = +0.708); a directional hallucination gap (p = 0.150) suggests partial signal reading. Anti-collapse objectives fail when input carries no discriminative structure.
AI.conclusion: Consumer cameras cannot encode individual arterial morphology; cross-subject r is a necessary collapse diagnostic for waveform reconstruction benchmarks. Individual-specific arterial stiffness biomarkers are NOT recoverable from single-cycle rPPG measurements using current encoder architectures.

relevance_reason: Complete mismatch. This paper is about remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) for medical/cardiovascular monitoring - measuring pulse waves from consumer cameras to assess arterial stiffness. This is biomedical signal processing, NOT Computer Graphics. The research profile needs video-to-motion conversion, 3D motion generation, and cross-modal alignment for graphics applications. While both involve video input, the application domains are completely different - medical monitoring vs computer graphics animation. The methods (VAE, SupCon for signal recovery) address根本没有涉及视频生成 motion generation or any computer graphics concerns.

title: TeX-1500: A Paired Real-World LWIR Hyperspectral Dataset and Benchmark for Temperature-Emissivity-Texture Decomposition
summary: Temperature-emissivity-texture (TeX) decomposition seeks to recover object heat state, material spectral response, and visible-like geometric texture from long-wave infrared hyperspectral imaging (LWIR HSI). Existing TeX pipelines are mainly scene-specific inverse solvers, and the lack of paired LWIR HSI-TeX supervision has limited learning-based decomposition. To address this gap, we introduce TeX-1500, a large-scale paired LWIR HSI-TeX dataset and benchmark for supervised HSI-to-TeX decomposition. TeX-1500 contains 1,522 calibrated real-scene pairs from DARPA Invisible Headlights (DARPA IH) pushbroom imagery and our FTIR acquisitions, covering five locations, four seasons, diverse acquisition times, heterogeneous wavelength layouts, and two sensor families. Each sample stores a calibrated valid-band radiance cube, calibrated wavelength positions, and aligned temperature, emissivity, and texture supervision constructed through a consistent restoration and TeX-construction protocol. We further provide TeX-UNet, a simple wavelength-aware baseline that maps calibrated HSI bands and wavelength positions to TeX fields. Experiments on the held-out DARPA IH pushbroom scenes and zero-/few-shot transfer to FTIR scenes show that TeX-1500 provides usable paired supervision and a measurable benchmark for data-driven physical-property-centered thermal perception.

AI.tldr: TeX-1500是一个新发布的大规模配对LWIR HSI-TeX数据集和基准，用于长波红外高光谱图像的监督学习式温度-发射率-纹理分解。
AI.motivation: 现有TeX管道主要是场景特定的逆求解器，缺乏成对的LWIR HSI-TeX监督数据，限制了基于学习的分解方法发展。
AI.method: 构建了包含1522组校准真实场景配对的数据集，包含5个地点、4个季节、不同采集时间、异构波长布局和两个传感器系列；提出TeX-UNet作为简单的波长感知基线方法。
AI.result: TeX-1500提供了可用的配对监督，为以物理属性为中心的热感知提供了可测量的基准。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和基准能够支持数据驱动的物理属性热感知研究。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for video-to-motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, and text-to-motion synthesis. The paper is about LWIR hyperspectral imaging for temperature-emissivity-texture decomposition in thermal sensing - a completely unrelated field in physics-based remote sensing. There is no overlap in application domain, methods, or research goals.

title: Conditional Latent Diffusion Model with Fourier-based Motion Modelling for Virtual Population Synthesis
comment: This work has been early accepted by International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2026
summary: In-silico trials of medical devices require the generation of virtual populations of anatomies. In cardiovascular applications, virtual anatomy is typically represented as a 3D+t mesh sampled from a generative model. However, most existing mesh generators focus on static anatomy, while sequence models often lack explicit periodicity. To this end, we propose 4D F-MeshLDM, a conditional generative framework comprising a convolutional mesh VAE to encode meshes, a structural latent space that parameterises motion using a truncated Fourier series, and a diffusion prior that learns the latent distribution over Fourier coefficient tokens. By conditioning the diffusion process on clinical covariates via affine modulation, we enable controllable synthesis. Sampling tokens and performing inverse Fourier synthesis yield cycle-consistent latent trajectories, which can be decoded into 3D+t cardiac mesh sequences. Experiments on 5,000 UK Biobank subjects demonstrate that 4D F-MeshLDM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in anatomical fidelity and achieves near-zero cycle closure error. Furthermore, the generated cohorts accurately preserve clinical functional indices, highlighting the potential of our framework for reliable in-silico cardiac trials.

AI.tldr: 提出了4D F-MeshLDM框架，一个用于生成虚拟3D+t心脏 mesh序列的条件生成模型，结合卷积mesh VAE、傅里叶级数运动参数化和扩散先验，可实现可控的心脏解剖Morphing生成。
AI.motivation: 心血管领域的虚拟解剖通常表示为3D+t网格，但现有网格生成器多聚焦于静态解剖，序列模型又缺乏明确的周期性表达，因此需要一种能生成周期一致性解剖轨迹的虚拟人群生成方法。
AI.method: 构建了包含三个核心组件的条件生成框架：(1)卷积网格VAE用于编码网格；(2)结构潜在空间使用截断傅里叶级数参数化运动；(3)扩散先验学习傅里叶系数token的潜在分布。通过仿射调制对临床协变量进行条件控制，实现可控合成。采样token并进行逆傅里叶合成产生周期一致的潜在轨迹，再解码为3D+t心脏网格序列。
AI.result: 在5000名UK Biobank受试者上的实验表明：4D F-MeshLDM在解剖保真度上优于最先进的基线方法，达到近零的cycle闭合误差，生成的队列准确保留了临床功能指标。
AI.conclusion: 该框架展现了用于可靠的心血管器械in-silico临床试验的潜力，为虚拟人群生成提供了有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical/cardiovascular domain (generating 3D heart mesh sequences from cardiac data) rather than Computer Graphics in the sense of video-to-motion conversion. Although it uses diffusion models similar to the research profile, the APPLICATION DOMAIN is completely different - this is medical imaging/virtual population synthesis for cardiovascular analysis, not 2D video to 3D motion generation, video generation quality assessment, or text-to-motion synthesis. The pain points are also mismatched: this addresses periodic cardiac motion consistency and clinical covariate control, not temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion or cross-modal alignment between video and 3D.

title: Where Do We (Not) Need Temporal Context in Low-Resource Video Task Adaptation?
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) and probing enable adaptation of foundation models using only a small number of trainable parameters, making it attractive for video understanding where annotation and computation are expensive. However, video PEFT has focused on adapting image-pretrained models, while standard PEFT methods can also be applied to video representations. These settings are rarely compared and both confine temporal reasoning to a single component of the model, leaving open how temporal context should be distributed across backbone, PEFT and probe. In this work we provide a systematic study of model adaptation strategies for video understanding. We evaluate methods across appearance-focused, motion-focused and spatially dense settings, with a particular focus on scenarios with limited data where parameter-efficiency is most beneficial. Our results provide new insights into PEFT and probing across settings and demonstrate the importance of temporal context allocation for effective video adaptation

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了视频理解中模型适配策略，对比了参数高效微调(PEFT)和探测方法在外观聚焦、运动聚焦和空间密集设置下的表现，特别关注有限数据场景。
AI.motivation: 视频理解任务标注和计算成本高，PEFT和probing提供了参数高效的模型适配方案。现有工作主要关注图像预训练模型向视频的迁移，且将时间推理限制在单一组件，缺乏对时间上下文如何分配的 系统性研究。
AI.method: 在不同设置下（外观聚焦、运动聚焦、空间密集）系统比较PEFT和probing方法，重点评估有限数据场景下的表现，分析时间上下文在backbone、PEFT和probe中的分配方式。
AI.result: 发现了PEFT和probing在不同设置下的新见解，证明了时间上下文分配对有效视频适配的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 时间上下文的合理分配对于视频模型适配效果至关重要，需要在模型各组件中综合考虑时间信息的整合。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on VIDEO UNDERSTANDING/ADAPTATION for video recognition tasks (e.g., action classification), which is a completely different application domain from VIDEO-TO-MOTION GENERATION in Computer Graphics. The research profile deals with converting 2D video to 3D motion (generation task), while this paper deals with analyzing/understanding video content (recognition task). Although both involve video, these are inverse problems - generation vs. recognition. The methods (PEFT, probing for video adaptation) are also unrelated to the profile's methods (Video Generation like Seedance, VLM for quality assessment, 3D Motion Generation). The paper doesn't address any of the pain points: cross-modal 2D video-to-3D motion alignment, temporal consistency in video-to-motion conversion, quality control of visual features, or text-to-motion semantic alignment.

title: Unified Video-Action Joint Denoising for Dexterous Action and Data Generation
summary: Recent world action models leverage video foundation models by aligning broad visual-dynamics priors with executable robot actions. We revisit this alignment from a distributional perspective. Existing formulations typically narrow the aligned prior into an observation-conditioned policy distribution over future actions. In contrast, we keep the distribution broader by modeling the joint space of interaction videos and executable hand trajectories under multiple conditioning regimes. We propose Donk, a unified video-action denoising model for dexterous hands. With language, an initial image, and the initial hand state, Donk samples future videos and bimanual MANO trajectories as an action policy. Without the image condition, the same denoising architecture samples paired video-action rollouts from a text-conditioned distribution, turning the aligned video prior into a data engine. Across action, video, and text-only generation evaluations, Donk improves dexterous trajectory accuracy, preserves strong video fidelity, and produces smooth text-conditioned action rollouts under the same unified training recipe.

AI.tldr: Donk是一个统一的视频-动作去噪模型,用于灵巧手操作。该模型通过保持视频先验的分布更宽泛(建模交互视频和可执行手部轨迹的联合空间),在语言、初始图像和初始手部状态的条件下,可以采样未来视频和双手机器人轨迹作为动作策略,且无需图像条件时也可从文本条件分布中采样配对的视频-动作 rollout。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将对齐的先验收窄为观察条件的动作策略分布。本文认为应该保持分布更宽泛,建模交互视频和可执行手部轨迹在多种 Conditioning  Regime 下的联合空间。
AI.method: 提出Donk:一个统一的视频-动作去噪模型,用于灵巧手。(1)以语言、初始图像和初始手部状态为条件,可采样未来视频和双手MANO轨迹作为动作策略;(2)无图像条件时,同一去噪架构可从文本条件分布中采样配对的视频-动作 rollout,将对齐的视频先验转化为数据引擎。
AI.result: 在同一统一训练配方下,Donk在动作、视频和纯文本生成评估中都取得提升:提高了灵巧轨迹精度、保持了较强的视频保真度、并产生了平滑的文本条件动作 rollout。
AI.conclusion: Donk展示了统一的视频-动作去噪方法在动作生成、视频生成和文本条件动作生成上的有效性和泛化能力,为灵巧手操作的视频基础模型对齐提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses cross-modal alignment between video and motion/trajectory generation, which matches some pain points in principle. However, the APPLICATION DOMAIN is fundamentally different: this paper focuses on ROBOT manipulator trajectories (dual-arm robot hands), NOT human motion generation in Computer Graphics. The research profile explicitly needs 3D human motion generation from video, while this paper targets robotic action policy generation for dextrous manipulation tasks. While both use similar techniques (joint video-motion generation, conditioning on language/image/initial state), they serve different application domains - robotics vs. human motion synthesis. The paper would be relevant if the profile needed robot motion generation, but for human 3D motion generation from video, it's in the wrong application domain despite methodological similarity.

title: Visual Instruction Tuning Aligns Modalities through Abstraction
summary: Visual instruction tuning effectively adapts a pre-trained Large Language Model (LLM) to process image information alongside text. Yet, it remains unclear how visual features are embedded into the layer-wise hierarchy of abstractions of the LLM backbone. Across a diverse set of vision-language architectures, we show that instruction tuning primarily serves as a bridge, embedding visual features directly into the intermediate semantic layers of the LLM, bypassing the early layers devoted to unimodal processing. With probing analyses and causal interventions, we show that these intermediate layers are the semantic core of vision-language processing and play a critical role in the performance on a broad set of multimodal benchmarks. In addition, by comparing the geometry of semantically equivalent visual and textual representations, we find that fine-tuning extends and strengthens the existing abstraction phase, aligning visual features with pre-existing textual ones. Finally, we confirm the functional role of this localized alignment by restricting fine-tuning to intermediate layers alone: this strategy preserves the performance of full fine-tuning on vision-centric benchmarks while reducing training time. Our results suggest that multimodal integration is a localized phenomenon driven by the repurposing of the internal abstraction engine of the LLM.

AI.tldr: 研究视觉指令微调如何在预训练大语言模型(LLM)的层级结构中嵌入视觉特征，发现中间语义层是视觉-语言处理的核心。)
AI.motivation: 探索视觉特征如何嵌入LLM的层级抽象架构，以及指令微调在多模态融合中的作用机制。
AI.method: 通过探针分析和因果干预方法，对比不同视觉-语言架构，并分析视觉与文本表示的几何关系。
AI.result: 视觉特征被直接嵌入到中间语义层，绕过早期单模态处理层；中间层是多模态性能的关键；微调扩展并强化了现有的抽象阶段，使视觉特征与文本特征对齐。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合是一个局部现象，由LLM内部抽象引擎的重用驱动；仅对中间层进行微调即可保持视觉中心基准的性能，同时减少训练时间。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. The paper is about Visual Instruction Tuning in Large Language Models (NLP/Vision-Language area), studying how visual features embed into LLM architectures. While it touches on cross-modal alignment between visual and text features, this is fundamentally an NLP/ML research topic, NOT related to Computer Graphics, video-to-motion conversion, or 3D motion generation. The research profile targets video generation models (Seedance/Wanxiang) for converting 2D video to 3D motion, which is completely different from studying modality alignment in LLMs.

title: DyaPlex: Full-Duplex Speech-Motion Model for Dyadic Interaction
summary: We present DyaPlex, a streaming, full-duplex speech-and-motion model designed for dyadic interaction. To capture the continuous and reciprocal nature of human communication, this full-duplex capability empowers the agent to simultaneously perceive and generate both speech and physical motion in a streaming fashion. At its core, our method leverages the strong priors of a foundational full-duplex speech model and integrates a novel motion pathway, thereby achieving fully synchronized multi-modal interaction. Specifically, we design a dual-tower Transformer architecture that preserves the zero-shot conversational reasoning of a frozen base speech model while constructing a deeply coupled, streaming motion pathway. By introducing a unified dyadic token interleaving mechanism and guiding cross-attention via a time-aligned speech-motion RoPE, our model effectively aligns autoregressive motions with rich latent speech features. Trained on the 4,000-hour Seamless Interaction dataset, our model effectively captures cross-speaker dependencies and establishes new state-of-the-art performance across both monadic and dyadic human interaction benchmarks.

AI.tldr: DyaPlex是一种流式全双工语音-动作模型，专门用于双人交互场景。该模型能够同时感知和生成语音及身体动作，实现多模态实时交互。
AI.motivation: 解决现有模型无法实现真正全双工通信的问题，需要让智能体能够同时感知和生成语音与动作，以捕捉人类沟通的连续性和交互性。
AI.method: 采用双塔Transformer架构，保留冻结基础语音模型的零样本对话推理能力；引入统一双人标记交织机制；使用时间对齐的语音-动作RoPE引导跨注意力；结合4000小时的无缝交互数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 模型有效捕捉跨说话者依赖关系，在单人交互和双人交互基准测试中均达到最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功实现了完全同步的多模态交互，为人机交互领域提供了新的技术方案。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. This paper focuses on speech-to-motion generation for conversational agents/human-robot interaction, which is a different field from the Computer Graphics research profile focusing on video-to-3D motion conversion. While both involve generating human motion, they use different input modalities (speech vs video) and target different applications (real-time conversation vs video-driven animation). The methods (dual-tower Transformers vs video generation models like Seedance/VLMs) and primary research communities are distinct.

title: Seg2Track++: Probabilistic Track Validation and Data Association for Multi-Object Tracking and Segmentation
summary: Autonomous systems require robust Multi-Object Tracking and Segmentation (MOTS) to operate reliably in dynamic environments, ensuring consistent object identities and precise mask-level delineation. Foundation models such as SAM2 have shown strong zero-shot generalization for segmentation, but their direct application to MOTS is limited by unreliable track association and false-positive propagation. This work introduces Seg2Track++, a framework that integrates instance segmentation with SAM2 and a novel track management module to perform zero-shot MOTS with enhanced temporal consistency. Tracks are associated using Mask Centroid Distance (MCD) and Confidence-Aware Cost Modulation (CCM), while Probabilistic Track Validation (PTV) employs a Bernoulli filter to validate track existence and suppress ghost tracks. Experimental results on KITTI MOTS demonstrate improved identity preservation, reduced false-positive propagation, and robust track management without fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: Seg2Track++是一个将实例分割与SAM2结合的零样本多目标跟踪与分割(MOTS)框架，通过引入轨迹管理模块增强时间一致性，无需微调即可在KITTI MOTS数据集上实现改进的identity保留和减少假阳性传播。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要在动态环境中进行稳健的多目标跟踪与分割(MOTS)，以确保一致的对象身份和精确的掩码级分割。当前基础模型(如SAM2)在零样本泛化方面表现强劲，但其直接应用于MOTS时受到不可靠的轨迹关联和假阳性传播的限制。
AI.method: 提出Seg2Track++框架，集成了实例分割与SAM2以及新的轨迹管理模块。使用掩码质心距离(MCD)和置信度感知成本调制(CCM)进行轨迹关联，同时采用概率轨迹验证(PTV)利用伯努利滤波器验证轨迹存在并抑制幽灵轨迹。
AI.result: 在KITTI MOTS数据集上的实验结果表明，所提方法实现了更好的identity保留、减少的假阳性传播和稳健的轨迹管理，且无需进行微调。
AI.conclusion: Seg2Track++成功实现了具有增强时间一致性的零样本MOTS，为自动驾驶系统在动态环境中的可靠运行提供了有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about multi-object tracking and segmentation (MOTS) for autonomous driving, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on video-to-3D motion generation with cross-modal alignment. The paper addresses computer vision for vehicle perception, not 3D motion synthesis. Although both involve temporal consistency, they solve fundamentally different problems using different methods - this is a case where even surface-level similarities don't justify relevance.

title: MLP Splatting: Object-Centric Neural Fields
summary:
3D representations are fundamental to scene rendering, understanding, and interaction. Recent approaches, such as 3D Gaussian Splatting and Neural Radiance Fields, achieve impressive photorealistic novel-view synthesis, but lack the ability to easily decompose scene elements into a few primitives, requiring additional segmentation or grouping for object-level manipulation. We present MLP-Splatting, a method that enables scene decomposition via a few expressive light-field primitives while providing photorealistic novel-view synthesis.
  MLP-Splatting models each primitive as an independent compact MLP with localized spatial support that predicts radiance and opacity. In contrast to low-level Gaussian primitives or a single global radiance field, our neural primitives provide greater expressive capacity while remaining spatially localized. Rendering is performed through efficient sparse volumetric compositing over ray-primitive interactions.
  Our primitives are supervised using RGB supervision alone, which yields primitives that represent local scene regions often corresponding to objects or object parts, enabling interactive object-level editing without segmentation masks by selecting a handful of primitives. Our method, augmented with optional semantic feature distillation, enables open-vocabulary scene interaction and open-set instant segmentation. Compared to state-of-the-art methods, we achieve substantially lower memory usage (1/15$\times$) and faster rendering (3$\times$), as we show in our experiments compared to semantic 3DGS methods. Project Page: https://shinjeongkim.com/mlp-splatting

AI.tldr: 提出MLP-Splatting方法，通过将场景表示为多个紧凑的MLP神经原语，实现可分解的3D场景渲染，在保持照片级真实感的新视角合成同时，支持交互式对象级编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有3D Gaussian Splatting和NeRF方法虽然能实现高质量的渲染，但难以将场景分解为单独的对象进行操作。需要额外的分割或分组算法才能进行对象级处理，这限制了场景理解和交互能力。
AI.method: 将每个神经原语建模为一个独立的紧凑MLP，具有局部空间支撑用于预测辐射率和不透明度。通过稀疏体积合成对射线-原语交互进行高效渲染。仅使用RGB监督训练原语，使原语自然对应场景区域或对象部件。结合可选的语义特征蒸馏可实现开放词汇场景交互和开放集即时分割。
AI.result: 相比SOTA方法，内存使用降低至1/15，加速渲染3倍。在实验中比语义3DGS方法表现更优。
AI.conclusion: MLP-Splatting成功实现了场景的神经原语分解，在照片级真实感渲染和用户可控编辑之间取得平衡，为3D场景交互提供了新的可能。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper focuses on 3D scene representation and novel view synthesis using MLP-based neural primitives (for object-centric rendering/editing), while the research profile is about cross-modal video-to-3D motion generation. Both are in Computer Graphics but address entirely different problems - one is about rendering/scene decomposition, the other is about converting video to human motion. The methods (MLP splatting vs video generation + VLMs) and target outputs (3D scenes vs 3D motion) are unrelated.

title: Beyond Encoder Accumulation: Measuring Encoder Roles in Multi-Encoder VLMs
summary: As foundation models scale toward fusing more heterogeneous visual streams, understanding how diverse encoders interact under joint training becomes a prerequisite for principled design. Yet large vision-language models (LVLMs) currently lack the tools to do so, and parameter-efficient encoder configurations remain hard to identify before training. To re-examine encoder roles under joint training, on the 16-benchmark Cambrian-1 suite we retrain and evaluate all 31 non-empty subsets of five common vision encoders under a unified pipeline (~20k GPU-hours total), and report three findings. First, retraining each subset from scratch reveals encoder rankings that differ from those obtained by masking encoders on a fixed checkpoint, including which encoder ranks first overall. Second, we decompose each encoder's contribution into two axes, Capacity, the score an encoder reaches on its own, and Necessity, the drop when it is removed from the full pool. The two axes are not interchangeable. Pairing the two highest-Capacity encoders is suboptimal, while pairing a high-Capacity anchor with an adaptive complement matches the full five-encoder model. Adding further encoders beyond this pair yields only marginal gains. Third, at fixed parameter count, per-encoder pre-projector effective rank explains the residual score variation. The strongest pairs combine an anchor whose rank survives joint training with a complement whose rank expands under it, suggesting that higher-rank, less-collapsed projector inputs correspond to a more favorable optimization regime at the encoder-projector interface. Together, the Capacity-Necessity decomposition and the pre-projector rank analysis, along with comprehensive evaluation through retraining, expose a methodological gap in multi-encoder LVLM design, and offer concrete primitives for closing it.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统性地重新训练和评估Cambrian-1基准测试套件中五个视觉编码器的所有31个子集，揭示了多编码器 LVLM 设计中的关键方法和设计原则。
AI.motivation: 随着基础模型向融合更多异构视觉流扩展，理解不同编码器在联合训练下的交互变得至关重要。然而，当前的大型视觉语言模型缺乏相应的分析工具，且参数高效的编码器配置在训练前难以确定。
AI.method: 作者在16个基准测试的Cambrian-1套件上，对五个常见视觉编码器的所有31个非空子集进行统一pipeline的重新训练和评估（约消耗20k GPU小时）。他们将每个编码器的贡献分解为两个维度：Capacity（编码器独立达到的分数）和Necessity（从完整池中移除时的分数下降）。
AI.result: 三个关键发现：1）从头重新训练每个子集揭示的编码器排名与在固定checkpoint上屏蔽编码器得到的排名不同，包括总体排名第一的编码器；2）Capacity和Necessity两个维度不可互换——配对两个最高Capacity编码器并非最优，而将高Capacity锚点编码器与自适应互补编码器配对可以达到完整五编码器模型的性能，再添加更多编码器仅带来边际增益；3）在固定参数计数下，每个编码器的预投影器有效秩解释了剩余分数变化。
AI.conclusion: Capacity-Necessity分解和预投影器秩分析，加上通过重新训练的全面评估，暴露了多编码器 LVLM 设计中的方法论差距，并提供了具体的解决方案设计原语。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on analyzing visual encoders in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for general multimodal AI tasks, which is in a different application domain than Computer Graphics. While it uses VLMs and mentions visual encoders, these are used for tasks like image captioning and visual question answering, not for 2D video to 3D motion generation. The paper's methods and benchmarks (Cambrian-1) are designed for evaluating VLM capabilities in general visual understanding, not for video-to-motion conversion or cross-modal alignment in computer graphics. The pain points in the research profile (video-to-motion, temporal consistency, quality control for motion generation) are completely unaddressed. A score of 35 reflects that while there is some overlap in general concepts (visual encoders, multimodal systems), the actual application domains are fundamentally different.

title: CoralBay: A Self-Supervised CT Foundation Model
summary: Self-supervised learning has enabled large-scale pre-training on 2D natural images, producing general-purpose visual representations that transfer effectively across tasks. However, many medical imaging modalities, such as CT scans, are inherently three-dimensional and differ fundamentally from natural images in both structure and semantics. Volumetric modalities capture spatial continuity, organ anatomy, and intensity-based tissue properties (e.g., Hounsfield Units), which are not adequately modeled by 2D pre-training. To bridge this gap, we introduce CoralBay, a self-distillation framework that extends DINO by using a hierarchical 3D Swin backbone and applying self-distillation to concatenated multi-scale features, enabling data-efficient self-supervised learning of rich spatial representations that encode both global semantics and fine-grained local structure. As a result, CoralBay transfers effectively to a wide range of downstream radiological tasks, demonstrating strong and consistent performance across diverse anatomical targets. In addition, we contribute to the open-source \eva framework by introducing a public, reproducible 3D radiology leaderboard that unifies multiple datasets and establishes a standardized benchmark for evaluating volumetric representation learning methods.

AI.tldr: CoralBay是一个自监督学习框架，通过扩展DINO，使用3D Swin骨干网络和多尺度特征自蒸馏，实现3D医学影像的预训练，解决2D预训练无法充分建模3D医学影像空间连续性和解剖结构的问题。
AI.motivation: 自然图像的2D自监督预训练无法有效迁移到CT等3D医学影像任务，因为3D医学影像具有空间连续性、器官解剖结构和组织密度特性（如Hounsfield单位），当前方法缺乏对这类体积数据的有效建模。
AI.method: 采用层次化3D Swin骨干网络，将多尺度特征进行拼接后应用自蒸馏机制，实现数据高效的自监督学习，无需人工标注即可学习包含全局语义和细粒度局部结构的丰富空间表示。
AI.result: CoralBay能够有效迁移到多种下游放射学任务，在不同解剖目标上均表现出色且一致的性能。同时构建了开源的3D放射学基准测试平台，统一多个数据集并建立了体积表示学习方法的标准化评估基准。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功填补了2D自监督学习与3D医学影像之间的鸿沟，为体积医学影像的自监督预训练提供了有效的框架和数据支持，推动了医学影像领域无监督表示学习的发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about self-supervised learning for 3D medical CT imaging (radiology), which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. While it uses 3D Swin networks, the application is medical imaging analysis (CT scans, Hounsfield units, anatomical structures) rather than video-to-motion generation, 3D character animation, or any computer graphics task. The pain points addressed are completely orthogonal - medical image analysis vs cross-modal video-to-motion alignment.

title: OVO-S-Bench: A Hierarchical Benchmark for Streaming Spatial Intelligence in Multimodal LLMs
comment: 48 pages, 12 figures, 15 tables. Project page: https://internlm.github.io/OVO-S-Bench/
summary: Multimodal agents in robotics, AR, and autonomous driving must reason about places and layouts from continuous egocentric streams, often using evidence outside the current view. Existing benchmarks either evaluate offline over full videos or target events rather than spatial structure. We introduce OVO-S-Bench, a fully human-annotated benchmark for streaming spatial intelligence, comprising 1,680 questions over 348 source videos. Annotation involves 12 trained annotators, each also serving as a blind cross-reviewer, across roughly 804 person-hours of multi-round quality assurance. Each question carries a query timestamp and an evidence interval, and at evaluation, the model sees only the prefix preceding the query. Questions span four levels of increasing abstraction: instantaneous egocentric perception, spatiotemporal context tracking, spatial simulation and reasoning, and allocentric mapping. Across 38 proprietary and open-source MLLMs, Gemini-3.1-Pro trails human experts by 27 points, 59.2 vs. 86.6, with allocentric mapping as the dominant bottleneck. Notably, streaming and spatially fine-tuned MLLMs underperform their own backbones. We further find that chain-of-thought reasoning amplifies spatial errors when ungrounded in the stream. By exposing these limitations, OVO-S-Bench establishes a demanding testbed for next-generation streaming spatial MLLMs.

AI.tldr: OVO-S-Bench是一个用于评估流式空间智能的完全人工标注基准，包含1680个问题跨四个抽象级别。评估显示Gemini-3.1-Pro得分59.2，落后人类专家27分，allocentric mapping是最大瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有基准要么在完整视频上离线评估，要么针对事件而非空间结构。多模态智能体需从连续自我中心流中推理地点和布局，常需使用当前视图之外的证据。现有方法无法有效评估这种流式空间智能能力。
AI.method: 构建完全人工标注的benchmark，包含1680个问题跨越348个源视频，经过12名训练有素的注释者进行了约804人时的多轮质量保证。每问题包含查询时间戳和证据间隔，评估时模型仅看到查询前的视频前缀。问题涵盖四个递进抽象级别：即时自我中心感知、时空上下文跟踪、空间模拟与推理和异中心映射。对38个专属和开源MLLMs进行评估。
AI.result: Gemini-3.1-Pro落后人类专家27分（59.2 vs 86.6），allocentric mapping是最主要的瓶颈。流式和空间微调的MLLMs反而不如其原始骨干模型。chain-of-thought推理在未扎根于流时会放大空间错误。
AI.conclusion: OVO-S-Bench成为下一代流式空间多模态大语言模型的要求严格的测试平台，揭示了当前模型在空间智能尤其是allocentric mapping方面的显著局限性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about evaluating multimodal LLMs on spatial intelligence benchmarks (egocentric to allocentric mapping for AI agents), which is in the NLP/AI domain, NOT Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video-to-3D-motion generation with specific methods like Wanxiang/Seedance video generation models, whereas this paper is about MLLM evaluation for spatial reasoning tasks. Despite both dealing with video input, the application domains are completely different - this is benchmark evaluation for AI agents, not motion generation or computer graphics.

title: Electromagnetic Navigation for Femoral Osteotomy Using High-Accuracy X-ray-to-CT Registration
comment: Will be published in the International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery
summary: Accurate execution of preoperative plans in corrective femoral osteotomies remains challenging. Current techniques are limited by variable accuracy, invasiveness, and radiation exposure, with free-hand methods and patient-specific instrumentation (PSI) often requiring >30 and >6 fluoroscopic images, respectively. We present an integrated, electromagnetic tracking (EMT)-based navigation system for femoral osteotomies that minimizes dissection and intraoperative fluoroscopy. The system couples CT-based preoperative planning with one-time intraoperative C-arm calibration and accurate X-ray-to-CT registration from two fluoroscopic images acquired at initialization. This enables real-time, fluoroscopy-free EMT navigation of the saw blade and bone fragments relative to the preoperative plan, and is compatible with uniplanar and biplanar osteotomies. In a feasibility study using 18 synthetic femora, EMT guidance significantly outperformed free-hand execution in total angular error ($(3.05 \pm 0.75)^\circ$ vs.\ $(6.32 \pm 2.36)^\circ$, $p=0.031$), assuming the same minimal surgical exposure for both. No EMT-guided trials exceeded the >5° clinical threshold, whereas free-hand produced 4 outliers of 6 trials. The system achieved statistical equivalence ($\pm 2^\circ$, $\pm 2,\text{mm}$) to PSI for total angular ($p \le 0.02$) and total translational ($p=0.048$) errors, with no significant differences in user questionnaire scores. By transferring preoperative plans using only two fluoroscopic images while matching PSI accuracy without additional surgical exposure, the proposed system motivates subsequent cadaveric and clinical validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于电磁追踪（EMT）的股骨截骨手术导航系统，通过术前CT规划结合术中C臂校准和仅2张透视图像实现X-CT配准，从而实现实时、无透视的电磁导航。该系统在18具合成股骨模型中验证，角度误差显著优于自由手方法，并与患者定制器械（PSI）达到统计等价。
AI.motivation: 目前股骨截骨术前计划的精确执行仍面临挑战。现有技术（自由手方法和患者定制器械PSI）分别需要超过30张和6张透视图像，且准确度、侵入性和辐射暴露均存在局限。
AI.method: 将CT术前计划与一次性C臂校准相结合，通过初始化时获取的2张透视图像进行准确的X射线到CT配准，实现实时、无透视的电磁追踪系统对锯片和骨块的导航，兼容单平面和双平面截骨。
AI.result: 在18具合成股骨的可行性研究中，EMT引导的总角度误差（3.05±0.75°）显著优于自由手执行（6.32±2.36°），p=0.031。EMT引导的试验无一超过5°临床阈值，而自由手组6次试验中出现4个异常值。该系统在总角度误差（p≤0.02）和总平移误差（p=0.048）上与PSI达到统计等价（±2°，±2mm），用户问卷评分无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该系统仅使用2张透视图像即可转移术前计划，同时达到PSI精度且无需额外手术暴露，为后续尸体研究和临床验证提供了依据。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical image registration (X-ray to CT) for surgical navigation in femoral osteotomy. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically converting 2D video to 3D motion using video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance for animation/gaming. While both involve image registration, the application domains are entirely different: medical surgery vs. generative computer graphics. There's no overlap in methods or goals.

title: An Attention-Based Denoising Model for Diffusion Weighted Imaging
summary: Diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI) is used for whole-body cancer screening, but it typically requires a long acquisition time. When the scan time is reduced, the image quality often suffers, leading to increased noise in the scans. Magnitude reconstruction in DWI introduces signal-dependent Rician noise, which makes denoising more challenging for conventional convolution-based methods. To address this limitation, we propose a noise-aware attention-driven denoising framework that integrates hierarchical Swin Transformer window attention with transformer-based multi-dimensional gated refinement for DWI restoration. The model incorporates explicit noise-level conditioning and residual reconstruction to enable adaptive suppression of heteroscedastic noise across a wide range of corruption levels. Experimental evaluation on corrupted DWI scans demonstrates strong restoration performance. Our model achieves a mean PSNR of 33.69~dB and SSIM of 0.8539 across noise levels from 1\% to 15\%, while maintaining stable behavior under severe noise conditions. These results indicate that attention-guided contextual modeling combined with channel-adaptive refinement provides a robust and generalizable solution for DWI denoising.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对扩散加权成像(DWI)的噪声感知注意力驱动去噪框架。该方法结合分层Swin Transformer窗口注意力和多维门控细化模块，利用显式噪声水平条件和残差重建来自适应抑制异方差噪声。实验表明该模型在1%至15%的噪声水平下可实现33.69 dB的PSNR和0.8539的SSIM，并在严重噪声条件下保持稳定性能。
AI.motivation: DWI用于全身癌症筛查，但传统方法需较长采集时间。减少扫描时间会导致图像质量下降和噪声增加。幅度重建引入的信号依赖性Rician噪声使传统卷积去噪方法面临挑战，需要更有效的解决方案来处理这类特定噪声。
AI.method: 提出噪声感知注意力驱动去噪框架，整合分层Swin Transformer窗口注意力与基于Transformer的多维门控细化模块。模型包含显式噪声水平条件化机制和残差重建策略，实现对宽范围异方差噪声的自适应抑制。
AI.result: 在 corrupted DWI扫描上验证了强大的去噪性能。在1%至15%噪声水平下，平均PSNR达33.69 dB，SSIM达0.8539，在严重噪声条件下保持稳定行为。
AI.conclusion: 注意力引导的上下文建模结合通道自适应细化为DWI去噪提供了稳健且通用化的解决方案，能够有效处理医学影像中的Rician噪声。.

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about medical imaging (Diffusion Weighted Imaging for cancer screening), which is in the healthcare/biomedical domain - NOT Computer Graphics. While the research profile concerns video-to-3D motion generation with cross-modal alignment and quality assessment, this paper addresses medical image denoising. Even though both use transformer-based methods, the application domains are entirely different (medical imaging vs computer graphics/motion generation). "Diffusion" in this context refers to MRI diffusion weighting, not generative diffusion models.

title: SparseStreet: Sparse Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Street Scene Simulation
summary: While 3D Gaussian Splatting has shown promising results in street scene reconstruction, existing methods require massive numbers of Gaussian primitives to capture fine details, leading to prohibitive storage costs and slow rendering speeds. We observe that dynamic objects (e.g., vehicles and pedestrians) demand high-fidelity representations to maintain temporal consistency, while static background regions often contain substantial redundancy. Motivated by this, we propose SparseStreet, a general compression framework specifically designed for street scenes. First, we introduce a node-based learnable pruning strategy that systematically removes low-contributing Gaussian primitives while preserving visually critical regions. Second, after the scene representation stabilizes, we apply background compression, further reducing redundancy in static regions. Our method effectively preserves the geometry and appearance of dynamic objects while significantly reducing the total number of Gaussian primitives. Extensive experiments on the Waymo and nuScenes demonstrate that SparseStreet achieves up to 80% compression ratio with minimal quality degradation, enabling resource-efficient, high-fidelity dynamic scene reconstruction. Project website: https://sparsestreet.github.io/.
